I want to crush the liberal agenda and keep this administration in check. Our country needs America First, conservative values back in control. Don't you agree? With the countdown to the primary started, I hope I can count on your continued support. I am ready to fight for the rights of North Carolinians in the Senate and cannot do it without your help. body:
GOP leadership is FURIOUS
| **Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220112_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=1113%2E878179%2EG40xbt) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220112_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1113%2E878179%2EG40xbt) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220112_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1113%2E878179%2EG40xbt)
---
* * *
Team, we’re DISGUSTED by the GOP’s leadership.

**FIRST:** Liz Cheney bravely spoke out and told Trump he’s FULLY RESPONSIBLE for the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. She’s _AMAZING!_

**THEN:** GOP leadership publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to silence her.

**NOW:** Liz Cheney is refusing to back down! Instead of bowing down to Trump, she’s following the FACTS!!
[**But she’s still facing brutal attacks – so we need 35,000 signatures to show Liz Cheney that we stand with her. Will you sign?** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220112_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1113%2E878179%2EG40xbt)

body:
Things have never looked better for Republicans [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a71ec03057964cedb50177d8c488db03&_e=Yuc3o4hcMdpeqTMz9RlgN0vspZO5ND2Oc1AkhCC9m3RaWh38uXPfS8lEC2MwJvR7Qh5S-QD9j-cmfO83mTwSDlbrTz0JupBInGihzs5JT0TyKs77n1UmdIwoX3lUc3oq6z3bGxfeu2Lm_De_QfDaNnFSFXKqU4l2xj4UQ_566NrdxrNUhGUMLO-LgUEIGYNtNiDjuMZb3gKQ5nh16N2ifvF_iyhCkVCutNtVu9kQrbcellWJ0JPcuLTyAXLyAA7iLLPl3xuMBlWGHKQBJYHueg%3D%3D) Hey Peter, I have some EXCITING updates to share with you: RECORD SETTING CAMPAIGN
* We **raised a record $850,000+** from over **1,500 donors** in 2021—the most ever by a challenger here in the non-election year.
* Thanks to supporters like you, we will have the resources to compete and win in November.

HOW WE DID IT
* People believe in our message. When it comes to public safety, education, the economy and so much else, we’re focused on the issues that matter to voters.
* People know we can win. Redistricting has made our path to victory even clearer – according to the **Thousand Oaks Acorn** , CA26 is back in the “** _national spotlight_** ,” and the **Ventura County Star** says CA26 is “** _up for grabs again_** ”!

Friend,
President Trump has endorsed our campaign to oust Liberal Lisa Murkowski, and he’s throwing a big event at his Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida to help support us!
He asked me to reach out to you personally to see if you wanted to join us for this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity?.

clean_body: | | | | We can’t wait to meet you. | Friend, President Trump has endorsed our campaign to oust Liberal Lisa Murkowski, and he’s throwing a big event at his Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida to help support us! He asked me to reach out to you personally to see if you wanted to join us for this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity?. If YOU are selected, my campaign will cover the cost of your flight, hotel, ground transportation and ticket to the event. You’ll even get to take a picture with President Donald J. Trump himself! Hurry, we are closing entries at 11:59 PM TONIGHT. RESERVATION NUMBER:4821879 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ENTRY STATUS: INCOMPLETE**** You’ve been one of our top supporters, and I’d hate for you to miss out on this incredible opportunity. There are only a few hours left to complete your entry, so be sure to confirm your contribution NOW. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka | | | | ==

The good news is that our Senate campaign is off to a tremendous start! While I am not a politician, there has been an outpouring of support from conservatives across Georgia and around the country for our campaign.

The bad news is that our Democrat opponent is the #1 fundraiser in the country and has $17 MILLION in his campaign war chest, which is growing by the day.

The bad news is that our Democrat opponent is the #1 fundraiser in the country and has $17 MILLION in his campaign war chest, which is growing by the day. | | | | National Democrats are determined to hold this Senate seat and dump MILLIONS more into my opponent's staggering war chest to defeat us. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Bidenflation: Inflation is at its highest level in 40 years!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
In as little as 365 days, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have managed to cause
rampant inflation across our country. Prices have increased by 7% over the past
year, which is the fastest price spike in 40 years. At a time when our country
is recovering from the loss of millions of jobs due to unconstitutional
lockdowns during the pandemic, the last thing we need is more historic economic
hardship for working class families. The price of gasoline, energy,
automobiles, eggs, milk, and nearly everything else has increased tremendously
under Joe Biden with no end in sight!

Fueled by immense record spending, inflation is so high right now that it is
easily outpacing the average salary increase employees are receiving, further
harming millions of hardworking middle class Americans. Joe Biden and his
radical allies in Congress have continuously shown us that they cannot be
trusted to lead our country. If we don’t take back the House in 2022, there’s
no way to stop the bleeding. This is why I am running for Congress. We need to
get our economy back on track and ensure that our Federal government finally
addresses the outrageous debt we continue to accumulate. Our nation cannot
sustain much more of this and that’s why we need patriots like you to help us
flip the House before it’s too late.

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

subject: Major City Passes Ban on “Ghost Guns”
body:
Ghost guns are homemade firearms without serial numbers or markings. As a result, these firearms cannot be traced to their original owners, manufacturer, or seller.

| | |

| | | ### [Denver Passes Ban on “Ghost Guns” Within the City ](https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=73017&L=41992&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9ndW5uZXdzLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9kZW52ZXItcGFzc2VzLWJhbi1vbi1naG9zdC1ndW5zLXdpdGhpbi10aGUtY2l0eT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXI=) [ ](https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=73017&L=41992&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9ndW5uZXdzLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9kZW52ZXItcGFzc2VzLWJhbi1vbi1naG9zdC1ndW5zLXdpdGhpbi10aGUtY2l0eT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXI=) Earlier this month, the city of Denver, Colorado passed a ban on “ghost guns.” Ghost guns are homemade firearms without serial numbers or markings. As a result, these firearms cannot be traced to their original owners, manufacturer, or seller. ### [Pro-Gun Champion Anthony Sabatini Publishes Press Release Urging House Speaker Chris Sprowls to Put Constitutional Carry Before a Vote ](https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=73017&L=41993&F=H&) [ ](https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=73017&L=41993&F=H&) Incumbent Republicans are a complacent bunch that often need a swift kick in the rear in order for them to start acting right. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: November will be here fast.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Our entire Democracy is at stake in the 2022 election. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0ac2bf83dc35/i-am-running-for-congress-8792258?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=ed5c8bafda&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Folks,

The upcoming November election is going to be an uphill battle. Let’s be honest, the odds are not in our favor. But overcoming the odds is exactly what has shaped our country and created our democratic system of government. Time and again, America’s greatness has been realized when the chips were down and our backs were against the wall.

**And now, with our democracy under constant and overwhelming threat, we can’t afford anything other than overcoming the odds — no matter how daunting that may seem.**

I’m running for Congress because standing on the sidelines and watching our friends’ and neighbors’ rights fade and democracy crumble isn’t an option. I’m running to fight for the foundation of our country. I’m running because we deserve a representative who will put in the work of listening and helping solve problems faced by our country — not contribute even more to the extreme polarization that’s already paralyzed our government.

**Scott Fitzgerald has been the opposite of all of those things.** The 5th Congressional District — and Wisconsin as a whole — deserves better.

[**Can you chip in $100, $50, or even just $25 today to help us build the infrastructure and war-chest we’ll need to defeat Scott Fitzgerald?**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=4f7e41a10f&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [DONATE](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=89f7b49210&e=356c0699dd "DONATE")
---
| The odds may be against us, but I won’t let that stop me from advocating for the hard working Wisconsinites like you who just want our government to work again — and for our democracy to survive for our children and grandchildren.

I know that I’m not in this alone. [Anything you can give today makes a difference and is appreciated immensely](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=792f30d986&e=356c0699dd). As our country has proven time and again, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we come together united in a common cause, no matter what the odds may be.

Thank you so much for your continued support,

Forward,

Mike
---
| | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain: I'll do whatever it takes
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-highlights-from-the-first-gop-gubernatorial-debate-8791112?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**JANUARY 12, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain: I will do whatever it takes to protect Pennsylvania
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor of Pennsylvania, today participated in the second GOP Gubernatorial Debate which took place at the Scottish Rite Cathedral in New Castle, PA.

Throughout the course of the debate, McSwain shared his plans for restoring PA's economy, promoting public safety and security, and harnessing the Commonwealth's energy and infrastructure, as well as his support for the second amendment and the importance of defending life.

In his opening remarks, McSwain asserted that his background as a native Pennsylvanian, U.S. Marine, prosecutor, and U.S. Attorney makes him uniquely qualified to do whatever it takes to bring prosperity to Pennsylvania:

---
|
> _**"As a native Pennsylvanian, Marine veteran, a federal prosecutor, and a U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump, public service is in my blood. As Governor, I'll restore freedom and law and order. I'll ensure that every child receives a quality education. I'll revive our economy and restore election integrity to our state. Whatever it takes." **_
---
| McSwain also shared his plan to promote school choice for all Pennsylvanian families:
---
|
> _**"I am the only candidate who has issued a Parents' Bill of Rights, because quality education starts with meaningful school choice. I support public education, and as Governor I will put students, families, and teachers first and the union bosses last - that why I've pledged**_ _** to never take a dime from any teachers union. Every child deserves a quality education that meets their individual needs, and as Governor, I'll do whatever it takes to make sure they have it. **_
---
| McSwain's 'Parents' Bill of Rights' and 'Pillars of Education Reform' are [available here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=2cf6ec50d9&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=6f7dbb464b&e=b1ec95759b)
###

More information on McSwain's background and platform is available | | | | | | | | | | billmcswain.com | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bfykjk-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# Volunteer Meeting Reminder
# Volunteers Needed
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. As you may or may not know Deirdre Gilbert has decided to run as an Independent Candidate. As an independent, she must acquire signatures to get on the ballot in November. We are going to need about 200 Volunteers to assist us with this endeavor. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! Thank you so much for your support!https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bfykjk-iduiyhurdd-y/)

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Baldwin’s Nazism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
Indiana Democrats need your help | |
---
| | **** Hey there, Sometimes Indiana makes national news...for all the wrong reasons. _**Republican State Senator Scott Baldwin, a registered Oath Keeper (one of the groups responsible for January 6th) - said during a recent committee hearing at the Statehouse that he believes Nazism, facism, and other views should be taught impartially by educators.**_ In fact, Baldwin believes teachers go “too far” when they “take a position” on issues like fascism and extremist movements that have killed millions of innocent people. Friend, hearing this type of irrational, un-American rhetoric hurts. This is not what Indiana is about, and it does not represent our Hoosier values. Sadly, this is just one of the out-of-the-mainstream bills the Republican supermajorities are considering during this legislative session that is more about culture wars to divide people than kitchen table issues to help people. [Please chip in now to help us fight back against the INGOP’s dangerous partisanship.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40628129/325224918/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJkOTdmMy01Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fOxj4nF6cn5XriEBbcllN5OOmPlKQz752SrhFL9gKI=) The Baldwin headlines are all over the place – The Washington Post, CNN, Vanity Fair, international outlets, and even The Late Show with Stephen Colbert. But his views and behavior are a serious matter and emblematic of a dangerous trend happening at the national level and inside the Indiana Republican Party. This latest incident goes beyond the pale, but it’s also becoming more common. It’s what happens when a major political party fails to call out bad behavior or denounce something when it is immoral. It allows a Nazi flag to fly above the countryside unchecked. It allows an elected official to pay a membership to a domestic terrorist organization. It allows the investigation into the January 6th insurrection against our very nation and house of democracy to become more about partisan politics than seeking the truth and delivering justice. Eventually, it puts all of us at risk and makes all of us less free. We believe the vast majority of Hoosiers want to live in a state that is welcoming and free – and of course a place where students learn about our history. Nazism was defeated by American forces in the last century. We shouldn’t have to defeat it again in this one. _**However, we must call out all forms of hatred when they present themselves.**_ Silence is simply not an option. What can you do? It’s on us to design a strategy, raise the resources, and mount a campaign to beat him – and these dangerous views – at the ballot box. Hoosier voters will have the final say, and I hope you will join us in taking this stand. [Chip in now to help us raise resources to defeat Scott Baldwin when he’s up for reelection in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40628130/325224919/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJkOTdmMy01Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fOxj4nF6cn5XriEBbcllN5OOmPlKQz752SrhFL9gKI=) Thank you for your support.
Mike Schmuhl
Chairman - Indiana Democratic Party |

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Destroying Every Principle
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Sometimes keeping up with the Left's corruption is
like drinking from a firehose. They are doing so much, so wrong,
so fast, that at any moment it's hard to know which fight to
wage.
Conservative Rep. Jim Jordan appeared on TV the
other day and ran through the litany of offenses committed just
by progressives in one house of Congress in one year:

they've closed the Capitol;
they've enacted proxy voting;
they've kicked conservatives off committees;
they wouldn't let conservatives sit on the January
6 committee;
they're trying to make D.C. a state;
trying to end the Electoral College;
trying to end the filibuster;
trying to pack the Supreme Court;
trying to nationalize elections; and
trying to let illegal immigrants vote.

He's not joking! And as crazy as it sounds, New York
City is already letting illegal immigrants vote and that isn't
even the worst thing the Big Apple has done lately.
Recently, it came out that the city government has
been distributing Covid tests and treatments based on patients'
race! The city has decided that white patients are less deserving
of health care than those of different skin colors.

Never mind that this is illegal and
unconstitutional. Never mind that Congress has authorized half a
trillion dollars for Covid-related health expenses specifically
so that these kinds of rationing decisions don't have to be made.

Help CPI fight back by empowering conservative
partners like Stephen Miller's America First Legal.

The Left wants to create a nation where a racist,
elite lives above the law, and the rest of us are subject to its
woke whims. They don't care about democracy or justice or
equality - they care about themselves, their privilege, and their
power.

That's why the Right cannot stop fighting. Our job
is very simple. The only way to defend America is to disempower
the Left. We need to break up their monopolies, destroy their
concentrations of power, cut their budgets, and end their
privileged economy of handouts, bailouts, and carveouts.

That future - where all Americans, regardless of
race, creed, or color, are protected by the Constitution and the
rule of law - is the one we are building every day at
Conservative Partnership Institute.
Working with partner organizations like America
First Legal and the Center for Renewing America, through national
initiatives like the Election Integrity Network and the Revere
Project, and working with conservatives in the U.S. House, the
U.S. Senate, and in state capitals across the nation, CPI is
helping to build the infrastructure, the agenda, and the messages
we need to rescue America and make her great again.

Please continue to support CPI in 2022 and encourage
others to help expand our efforts.

If the Left wants to destroy every American
principle, then we will be there to defend each one, for as long
as it takes. Here, we don't pick and choose fights against the
woke, racist, elite Left - we fight them all. And with your help,
we always will.
Thank you for your continued love of our country,
and your continued support for conservative principles.

For Freedom,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence
Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282
FaxCPI.org

DONATE

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an
IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to
Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the
extent allowed by law.

name: Newsmax Finance
subject: The Government's New 50% Retirement Tax Trap. Are You at Risk?
body:
The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line. Keep reading to see how you can protect yourself. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8311%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=OJ78YkhHOWtC9l3k9bhX8g&sysid=1)
| | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Finance. **Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy!** **The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line. Keep reading to see how you can protect yourself.** Dear Friend, If you or any of your loved ones are planning to retire in the next couple of years, please pay close attention. The government has changed the rules on you, midgame. One wrong move now could trigger a 50% tax on your retirement accounts. Which is why _Barron's_ called this rule change "the most sweeping retirement legislations in more than a decade." And _Forbes_ simply called it a "ticking time bomb." Millions of Americans are unprepared for what's about to come. That's why Newsmax has teamed up with some of the nation's top IRA experts to put together a FREE special report, **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PBegoWX9UGO8uCvWEYoeXQ&sysid=1)The 50% tax is just the beginning of all the sneaky traps that Congress has laid out for you in this new legislation. [**Click here to claim your FREE copy today**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C0AbHhDS72wClAYKT4SwZQ&sysid=1) _._ Inside this brand-new special report, you'll discover: ✔ **"Uh oh... we owe the IRS now..."** Your beneficiaries might be saying this, if you don't read the fine print on your retirement account. But you can protect them from headache and hassle by including this one word... on this one form. Page 27. ✔ **The 20% tax trap.** 1 in 2 Americans make a simple money transfer move every year. But now, this same move could give you a surprise tax bill. But you can avoid this altogether with the simple "triple t" strategy. It's easy to do and it won't sound alarms at the IRS. Page 22. ✔ **WARNING: What never to do with your IRA.** This honest mistake among family members can make every dime taxable and become the kiss of death for your retirement account. See how you can avoid it. Page 27. ✔ **The sneaky IRS move that could cost you dearly.** Did you know that proposed IRS rules - years away from becoming official - could impact your taxes THIS YEAR? It's true. But you can navigate this gray area easily and avoid big surprises. Page 15. ✔ **The simple dispute that can cost you $5,000 to $10,000 or more... plus a year of your valuable time!** Read this warning before you decide to dispute anything with the IRS. Or even ask them for clarification on issues. Page 30. Everything is spelled out in detail in **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PBegoWX9UGO8uCvWEYoeXQ&sysid=1)With your retirement savings at stake, this is the most important briefing you'll read in your lifetime. The stakes are higher than ever. A 50% tax could cut your savings in half. But it's 100% avoidable. This new special report from Newsmax Finance has the solution. [**Claim your FREE copy today**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VEyKtxFYbl67pZB0CQDb9g&sysid=1). Sincerely, Newsmax Finance

name: Trump Rally ALERT
subject: Pres. Trump's first rally of 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need 4500 patriots to step up before President Trump takes the stage. Do you still stand with President Trump or are you with

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7kovnijvlni03nrbv0v7oejpq1affugumj05f80_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7edr7m3ir2o3j65pb6cljeprm6ojgmhom2s5nmhpn4t3j6jgndcb4e5i7eo70cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgb6o30e9omcc9imdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5h60pr4cdj69oh5u)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbsibf7ou8v4brrpdpir6cfp7mgts09bs04rj5jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9rp82tbghet032a89mpcr20gpchth4b6jhmor1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z690u7sro2ecevm5ijj6ionmk3m1rj6sq7864lr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zirjlm8lml824qjlsnuhlnb2ecncndr59ap3ep4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcqi8mj89vlhgesjo3pnucrrl59rnbb5nkq0lq28_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3n07tpqc40n9dqs8q5soolj5sqgbrhjo3qb5vug_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjs789c8ijcktdp6vajkp44jl0bj8g8b49peorb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6b007m58u5stpffc9dvb66urhm8qttr64amivco_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z00j78ft7lf8dn1pdlhto80mc58kjdnj24jv2ga8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuu23unucb7i3309o8oiva92ig27c23t3kg7j5mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8or6cjh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr79dqbvuhcf53urdcl07dbqqrac2j2ufek5pij8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcptmcmo65dj6mpjb2o3mmlj76cllm9i62d5kmco75dr7m5hnct3669hj4pr0msrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1cr0c1p72phhespm1ptgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr3peios543q7hcj5ud67ho8s1u911dte7vcnqbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they’re white they’re evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they’re black they’re helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It’s state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn’t matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk0hhocqldg2kfhf9t2kcirhno0s7uarsnep84do_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won’t survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there’s something you can do.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhg9gasl7c40q54nv6tc2ui0iljvdbnl2umibh78_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs)** That’s why I’m writing to you today. Because our fate isn’t sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I’ve made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won’t and take back our schools. **I’m going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don’t stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfun3n0c75dq7p480i8staaq4t431frm6kt9ilgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs)** And make no mistake -- this isn’t just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It’s happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don’t take action, we’ll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z95gtcm1b97scfijsvrpldrpogkuosdj6flepag8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znnnr4os9sjeitb37grigf2fpt5vgdq8dmq6t6s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2gqo4t0gfhbifk0v5v40mkhdaaeoci1m8eubgd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fc7286kl2p5700afb8ote3lf2f26v7tmmk7ojg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1jm8pr0chh2bs)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

And more!

The CIA **openly admitted before Congress** all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of _“Avoiding the Eye”_ , Richard Marshall, [wants you to have his new book for Free](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/216/56327/8fbd3aa138895571321dd8fa32427851c04b97f5/67d367c2953c2342a04c07cdd8daf54790b1fe69)!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - **and a ton have already been claimed.**

To keep the government’s nose out of your business [click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/216/56327/8fbd3aa138895571321dd8fa32427851c04b97f5/67d367c2953c2342a04c07cdd8daf54790b1fe69)

subject: I’m so excited to support my friend, Greg Abbott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
It’s not often that I reach out, but I wanted to email you today to let you know that my good friend and conservative fighter, Governor Greg Abbott, is running for re-election in Texas!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?39yv9--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | It’s not often that I reach out, Fellow Conservative, _**but I wanted to email you today to let you know that my good friend and conservative fighter, Governor Greg Abbott, is running for re-election in Texas!**_

Fellow Conservative, Governor Greg Abbott is a PROVEN fighter who has ALWAYS fought to SECURE the border, PROTECT the 2nd Amendment, and DEFEND our state’s law enforcement.

He has NEVER backed down from a fight, which is why I know that he won’t back down from his upcoming fight against Beto. **[However, in order to GUARANTEE a victory, he needs our help, Fellow Conservative.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syej-4qqlpo1/ "However, in order to GUARANTEE a victory, he needs our help, Fellow Conservative.")**
**[Will you please chip in ANY AMOUNT today in support of Governor Greg Abbott’s re-election?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syek-4qqlpo2/ "Will you please chip in ANY AMOUNT today in support of Governor Greg Abbott’s re-election?")** **[PITCH IN $1,000 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syel-4qqlpo3/ "PITCH IN $1,000 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $500 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syem-4qqlpo4/ "PITCH IN $500 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $250 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syen-4qqlpo5/ "PITCH IN $250 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $100 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syeo-4qqlpo6/ "PITCH IN $100 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $50 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syep-4qqlpo7/ "PITCH IN $50 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $25 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syeq-4qqlpo8/ "PITCH IN $25 ASAP>>>")**
As an actor on the TV show, _Walker, Texas Ranger,_ I consistently rescued the good guys who were under attack from the bad guys.

And let me tell you, Fellow Conservative, Beto O’Rourke must be confused if he thinks he can convince Texans to give up their freedoms and replace them with his RADICAL, DANGEROUS policies.

He wants to turn Texas into the next New York or California, _**[and Greg Abbott needs OUR HELP to stop him.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39yv9-1syer-4qqlpo9/ "and Greg Abbott needs OUR HELP to stop him.")**_

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Did you see what Tucker said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there 's something you can do.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r)** That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r)** And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59233431:6X0P2IENB:m:1:3253819041:FB89ACDE367D7EEAF36236EA42F3BD43:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Are you worried about the rising cost of living in Ron DeSantis’s Florida?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
please share your thoughts with me |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40634001/325238015/375808905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE1NTgxNS03OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_gMdT9aIickyH0N-Sjubr5x8oj74vJKGH9w2euK9uo=&emci=49fb8392-df73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=54155815-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)
---
Hi friend,

I’m going to be traveling across our state, visiting with folks and talking to them about the rising cost of living in Ron DeSantis’s Florida.

By now, you’ve heard me talk a lot about building a Florida for All – and part of that means building an _Affordable_ Florida for All.

Unfortunately, our current governor is leaving working people by the wayside. He’d rather focus on his political ambitions and cater to his right-wing, billionaire donors than take steps to bring down costs.

[**So, if you’re worried about the cost of living in our state, can you share your thoughts? My team will be following up with a couple of folks to schedule a sit-down, kitchen table meeting with me. I hope to hear from you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40634003/325238016/375808905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE1NTgxNS03OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_gMdT9aIickyH0N-Sjubr5x8oj74vJKGH9w2euK9uo=&emci=49fb8392-df73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=54155815-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)

– Charlie Crist

name: Val Demings (personal note)
subject: Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead is easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I’m never one to tire from a challenge
| | |
---
Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South – the youngest of seven children who went to segregated schools.
It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40636175/325241754/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzFiODJjYS03OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9yBjXzY0yvSCybM0DyZ3Dhyt3LeWmK6Q_Vug_adiek=)
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – is easy. **But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win.**

**That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most:** [**Will you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race? Whatever you contribute will build up our resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40636177/325241756/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzFiODJjYS03OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9yBjXzY0yvSCybM0DyZ3Dhyt3LeWmK6Q_Vug_adiek=)

Val Demings

clean_body: I’m never one to tire from a challenge | | | Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South – the youngest of seven children who went to segregated schools. It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college. = Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – is easy. But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win. That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most: = | | = I'm proud of this team for the momentum you've helped me build so far, but I'm counting on supporters like you to contribute just $5 or more now if we're going to keep going – together. Thank you, as always, for your support, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

[**Read Dr. Bob's constituent engagement plan. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40636848/325243628/817068520?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU2Y2MwYi03Yzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emVD5u49BwIagi3TknPJUhyrYFt-0pF8lSK4QNXuBYY=&emci=4b1fa476-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=3256cc0b-7c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) **[Register for our town hall event.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40636849/325243629/778450092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU2Y2MwYi03Yzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emVD5u49BwIagi3TknPJUhyrYFt-0pF8lSK4QNXuBYY=&emci=4b1fa476-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=3256cc0b-7c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)** _**IMPORTANT UPDATE: Dr. Lorinser's "Town Hall for All" will move to a live, interactive, virtual-only event. The in-person event at NMU is canceled due to an Omicron variant COVID-19 surge.**_ The virtual stream will proceed as normal on Zoom, Facebook Live, Youtube, and **[VoteDrBob.com/townhall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40636850/325243630/29242929?fbclid=IwAR177xN7DJsFFlXmyF-yYEsB-w6xNLMK7nMQs_v1x4t6D9ojTCjdwuKqUks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU2Y2MwYi03Yzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emVD5u49BwIagi3TknPJUhyrYFt-0pF8lSK4QNXuBYY=&emci=4b1fa476-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=3256cc0b-7c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)**. Attendees are encouraged to engage directly with Dr. Lorinser from the audience on Zoom during the Q&A portion of the evening.

Dr. Lorinser will give a speech and open the second portion of the town hall for questions from a virtual audience. Use the form below to submit and ensure higher priority for the Q&A.

Similar to Northern Michigan University's decision to hold classes virtually this week, high hospitalizations rates of omicron COVID-19 patients make it prudent for the Lorinser campaign to temporarily suspend in-person campaign activities until the surge subsides.

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Dr. Jason Martin
Date: January 10, 2022
Subject: SATURDAY DEADLINE: People all across the state are paying attention
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martin-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113midmonth3_TM_opntl_SLA_hdr)
---

Hey, Peter.
**This Saturday, January 15, is a _really_ big day for us here on Team Martin: it’s our campaign’s very first campaign finance filing deadline. [Will you help us make a final push before the deadline to show the strength behind this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40638458/325250766/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113midmonth3_TM_opntl_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjJkOTRjNi03Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaAr1SPUI7M_c36GBqJ-TYXGugmfDMQLYeK5DCnv3bQ=)**
[Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40638460/325250767/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113midmonth3_TM_opntl_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjJkOTRjNi03Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaAr1SPUI7M_c36GBqJ-TYXGugmfDMQLYeK5DCnv3bQ=)
---
Here’s a little more about why this deadline is so important:
By Tennessee law, campaigns are required to file quarterly campaign finance reports leading up to the election. In Tennessee this year, the very first one is January 15, 2022 — just a few days from now! — and it includes everything we’ve raised since we launched this campaign in August. Put simply: It’s a big deal.
These reports aren’t just a bunch of random numbers. Things like the number of grassroots donors, average contribution, and total dollars raised are key indicators of our strength in this race. People all across the state (and the country) will be paying attention to our fundraising results, and we can’t disappoint them.
**The more we raise before we close the books on Saturday, the better our chances of having the resources we need to go up against the GOP dark money machine, take down Bill Lee, and restore honest leadership to our state.**
[**So, what do you say? Can you pitch in a few bucks to help us reach our goal before midnight on Saturday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40638462/325250768/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113midmonth3_TM_opntl_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjJkOTRjNi03Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaAr1SPUI7M_c36GBqJ-TYXGugmfDMQLYeK5DCnv3bQ=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Sean Hannity and Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
I wanted to share with you what Sean Hannity has said over the last few nights on his prime-time Fox News show: “[Schiff] is the single biggest purveyor of election fraud and lies in the history of this Republic.” “If I were Congressman Schiff, I’d think about another career.” “[McCarthy] will remove far-left extremists like Adam Schiff, the single greatest purveyor of election lies...” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40638525/325250893/1138271422?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220113_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzdhNzk1Yi03Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2pGpjc9lAHlwPSxxt5mPKMqF1cAv5Vg1ys2bGLJW2rY=) This is not the first time my career has been threatened, or my committee assignments, or far worse. And while Donald Trump might be out of office, his henchmen are still targeting me for retribution for doing my job and holding the former president accountable. Kevin McCarthy is a singularly weak leader, and as a result, he is being led around by the most extreme elements of his Party, like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar who want revenge because of their justified removal. It also gives Kevin the attention and admiration he so desperately seeks from Fox News, Tucker Carlson, and Sean Hannity. Cue the “feedback loop” exhibit A: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40638526/325250894/1138271422?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220113_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzdhNzk1Yi03Zjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2pGpjc9lAHlwPSxxt5mPKMqF1cAv5Vg1ys2bGLJW2rY=) This is the Republican “leader” in the House catering to the lowest common denominator in his base — his QAnon members. If Kevin is this craven now, imagine what will happen in 2024. Kevin will do whatever Donald Trump demands of him. No matter how unethical. And if Trump wants him to overturn the election — which we were able to stop in 2020 — Kevin will do it. **That’s why I need your help to fight back against Hannity and McCarthy’s lies about me, and attempts to remove me from my committee assignments as revenge for holding Donald Trump accountable. | | | Fellow Conservative, attached is the memo I sent out to my campaign staff this morning — and, as a valued member of my team, I wanted to loop you in as well. Please do NOT forward this, and delete it after reading.

---
**-Team McCarthy Battleground Update-**
Good morning,

I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but I promised I’d give it to you straight.
* Democrats are surging cash for an all-out assault on our 8 GOP Young Guns we need to secure a Republican Majority this fall
* Big Tech continues to censor conservative voices and defend their Democrat allies
* The Fake News media continues to spread lies and misinformation about our House Republicans
* Pelosi and her House Democrats are raking in HUGE fundraising numbers...

Team — Momentum is on our side, but I’m worried that our supporters will take a back seat, and expect these races to win themselves. **[I need you to help me rally support around these top notch candidates:](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3a0nu-1szq8-4qqlpo3/ "I need you to help me rally support around these top notch candidates:") **
* Esther Joy King (IL-17)
* Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
* Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
* Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
* Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
* Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
* Wesley Hunt (TX-38)

body:
| |
---
Hey, did you see Chris’ message on the importance of passing voting rights before it’s too late? [Add your name here to stand with Chris and President Biden in demanding immediate action to pass voting rights, and read his message below!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40641826/325266689/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220113_1_2&refcode2=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&contactdata=MVG2sVfUNOiohpdkWzGTOiES4dOuh1zxoGGZJm1SA9XkP%2B1uX12sMNZP%2B3KZV8%2BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc3OTc2Mi04NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30bIGlDxEczcTCr-mThFfR5PZ-Z97Fr7k7Nl69duZxE=&emci=099adf79-7f74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2216363) **_\- - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - -_** From: Chris Van Hollen
Date: Wed, Jan 5, 2022
Subject: we must act NOW on voting rights **_"To protect our democracy, I support changing the Senate rules whichever way they need to be changed to prevent a minority of senators from blocking action on voting rights."_** **_\- President Joe Biden _** | [](https://secure.ngpvan.com/PLlSLRR1JEmlSXqzjpzmXA2)[DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40641828/325266691/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220113_1_2&refcode2=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&contactdata=MVG2sVfUNOiohpdkWzGTOiES4dOuh1zxoGGZJm1SA9XkP%2B1uX12sMNZP%2B3KZV8%2BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc3OTc2Mi04NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30bIGlDxEczcTCr-mThFfR5PZ-Z97Fr7k7Nl69duZxE=&emci=099adf79-7f74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2216363)

Friends,
President Biden gave an important speech yesterday in Georgia where he outlined the grave threat to democracy we face as a country.
I couldn’t agree more with his urgent call to stop delaying and take immediate action to change the Senate rules and to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act — two critical bills essential to protecting our right to vote and defending our democracy.
[Add your name if you agree that our democracy is too important to let Republicans spread lies and push voter suppression without taking action to defend access to the ballot box!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40641828/325266691/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220113_1_2&refcode2=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&contactdata=MVG2sVfUNOiohpdkWzGTOiES4dOuh1zxoGGZJm1SA9XkP%2B1uX12sMNZP%2B3KZV8%2BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc3OTc2Mi04NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30bIGlDxEczcTCr-mThFfR5PZ-Z97Fr7k7Nl69duZxE=&emci=099adf79-7f74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2216363)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40641829/325266692/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220113_1_2&refcode2=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&contactdata=MVG2sVfUNOiohpdkWzGTOiES4dOuh1zxoGGZJm1SA9XkP%2B1uX12sMNZP%2B3KZV8%2BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc3OTc2Mi04NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30bIGlDxEczcTCr-mThFfR5PZ-Z97Fr7k7Nl69duZxE=&emci=099adf79-7f74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2216363)[DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40641830/325266693/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220113_1_2&refcode2=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&contactdata=MVG2sVfUNOiohpdkWzGTOiES4dOuh1zxoGGZJm1SA9XkP%2B1uX12sMNZP%2B3KZV8%2BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc3OTc2Mi04NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30bIGlDxEczcTCr-mThFfR5PZ-Z97Fr7k7Nl69duZxE=&emci=099adf79-7f74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2216363)
---
Throughout 2021, I warned again and again about how our democracy faces a growing threat of authoritarianism from a Republican Party increasingly willing to abandon our core values to appease Donald Trump and his lies about winning an election that he clearly lost.
Voting rights is a right from which all others flow. If we don’t protect that right we turn our backs on the Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, my late colleague John Lewis and so many others who sacrificed so much to secure the right to vote and make our democracy live up to its promise of 'one person one vote'.
As the President said yesterday, having greater numbers of eligible voters VOTE is not a "problem" in a democracy. Elections are about voters selecting their representatives, not about partisans selecting who should vote!
[_Sign here if you agree that this critical moment requires decisive action to pass voting rights legislation and defend our democracy!_ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40641831/325266694/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220113_1_2&refcode2=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&contactdata=MVG2sVfUNOiohpdkWzGTOiES4dOuh1zxoGGZJm1SA9XkP%2B1uX12sMNZP%2B3KZV8%2BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc3OTc2Mi04NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30bIGlDxEczcTCr-mThFfR5PZ-Z97Fr7k7Nl69duZxE=&emci=099adf79-7f74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=80779762-8574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2216363)
Onwards
Chris

body:
I’m reaching out today because it looks like we’re still missing your response on our 2022 Campaign Strategy Survey.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40642673/325270344/-1855446146?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDI4YmZkYi04Njc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Sqjwt3r4IUdDPObVo488TDP-s9dC9m_uVMUyUy6F0s=&emci=d9bcd8ce-cb73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7d28bfdb-8674-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4588596)
---
| Peter,

I’m reaching out today because it looks like we’re still missing your response on our 2022 Campaign Strategy Survey.

Tonight, I’m holding a strategy meeting with our campaign team and we’ll be going over the survey’s results. It’s crucial that I get your input here, Peter.

**One of the things we hope to see in 2022 is to get Democrat Valerie Foushee elected to represent North Carolina.** We will do everything possible to achieve this, but we need your support.

By chipping in now, you're providing us with the critical resources necessary to reach voters across the district in the months ahead.

**While we know how great Valerie is, not everyone in our district does.** We need your support to spread the news far and wide that Valerie is the most experienced and most capable progressive in this race and needs to be the Democrat we send to Washington. She will deliver for us in Congress, but first, we need to work together to get her there.

If we want our country to continue functioning as a democracy, **Congress must pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.** No ifs, ands, or buts.
Any day now, the Senate will decide whether they’ll do what’s necessary: abolish the filibuster and protect and expand voting rights for all Americans. **The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is our last best shot to put a stop to that, and restore power to the people. That power belongs with no one else: not presidents, not state legislatures, not Democrats, and certainly not far-right Republicans.**
But here’s the thing: Because Senate rules require a 60-vote threshold in order for this legislation to pass, and Republicans refuse to support it, Democrats _must_ abolish the filibuster to pass this immensely popular legislation.
[**That’s why I’m demanding that our Democratic Senators do what is necessary, abolish the filibuster, and protect our democracy by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. I had to make a tough choice, Peter.
I looked at our fundraising numbers and decided that if we’re going to compete with Republicans' attempts to rig our elections, we have to increase our goals.
We cannot wait for the North Carolina Supreme Court to review the gerrymandered maps on appeal – we must keep fighting for the leadership Western North Carolina deserves. Now that we’re in an election year, there’s no time to rest.
Absentee voting in Jasmine’s primary starts in just _two_ months, and it’s clear that if we want to win and replace Madison Cawthorn’s right-wing extremism with love, hope, and empathy, we need to step up our game, fast.
That’s why I set our mid-month goal to $20,000. It’s a big risk, but we’re counting on this grassroots team to help us achieve a big reward.
[**We have $9,313 left to raise before tomorrow at midnight, and this is our first important goal of the election year. Will you donate $25 or more to help us create a future in WNC that we deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40643624/325276226/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220113_FR_MM3ToughChoice_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODdjYWZkYS04OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wP2b4cw3XKincV1s4x9wrM9tEdghs24XqnOlXauIN24=)

**ICYMI: Yesterday the Ohio Supreme Court struck down the GOP-drawn district maps that created gerrymandering throughout the state.**

But the decision was close.

In just a 4-3 decision, these maps go back to the drawing board and give us more time to stop unconstitutional gerrymandering for Ohioans. Although this is a good thing, the closeness of this decision proves that Democrats are hanging on by a string.

This map would have given Republicans a 62-37 advantage in the House and 23-10 in the Senate.

It’s imperative that we go out and win local, state, and national elections this year to stop voting injustice. With a supreme court being so close, it came down to a swing vote by a moderate republican, Chief Justice Maureen O’Connor.

She mentioned her opinion in a concurring thought that the Ohio Redistricting Committee cannot put aside their partisan concerns. **This committee is made up of statewide elected officials. We have the power to end this!**

There is a real chance we can flip Ohio and we are already making progress. Our PAC helped elect Shenise Turner-Sloss in Dayton in November and she is ready to tackle these huge issues her state is facing.

Barrier To Entry PAC is doing as much as we can to support candidates across the board. We helped elect Shenise Turner-Sloss in Dayton in November and she is ready to tackle the larger issues at hand. But the decision was close. In just a 4-3 decision, these maps go back to the drawing board and give us more time to stop unconstitutional gerrymandering for Ohioans. Although this is a good thing, the closeness of this decision proves that Democrats are hanging on by a string. This map would have given Republicans a 62-37 advantage in the House and 23-10 in the Senate. It’s imperative that we go out and win local, state, and national elections this year to stop voting injustice. With a supreme court being so close, it came down to a swing vote by a moderate republican, Chief Justice Maureen O’Connor. I wouldn’t be writing to you if this wasn’t true: if my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House.

I’m incredibly proud of the campaign he’s been running so far, but a well-funded right-wing Super PAC just endorsed his opponent, Derrick Van Orden, and it’s only a matter of time before outside money begins flooding this district.

**Here’s the truth: Right now, Brad doesn’t have the resources to fight back against that kind of attack.**

But if he can hit Sunday’s mid-month fundraising goal, he’ll be able to mount the kind of defense he needs to counter these lies. He only needs to raise $3,500 more to hit his goal!

**[So I’m asking, will you chip in $5 to Brad’s campaign right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40644559/325280963/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.13_b1_MMD-ron_X_F1_S2_C1__ac_T2&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.13_b1_mmd-ron_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRmNTBmMy04Yjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zD6EdBL2Cy9ZOpuCIWqQke-nLx_8pDUliUqDFP0DoQY=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40644560/325280965/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.13_b1_MMD-ron_X_F1_S2_C1__ac_T2&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.13_b1_mmd-ron_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRmNTBmMy04Yjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zD6EdBL2Cy9ZOpuCIWqQke-nLx_8pDUliUqDFP0DoQY=)

clean_body: If my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House. | = = Friends, I wouldn’t be writing to you if this wasn’t true: if my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House. I’m incredibly proud of the campaign he’s been running so far, but a well-funded right-wing Super PAC just endorsed his opponent, Derrick Van Orden, and it’s only a matter of time before outside money begins flooding this district. Here’s the truth: Right now, Brad doesn’t have the resources to fight back against that kind of attack. But if he can hit Sunday’s mid-month fundraising goal, he’ll be able to mount the kind of defense he needs to counter these lies. He only needs to raise $3,500 more to hit his goal! = | = = = = = = Don’t forget -- Derrick Van Orden is a dangerous Capitol Insurrectionist. If he’s elected he will try to reverse all of the progress I’ve already made for the people of Wisconsin. But as the current Congressman of this district, I can tell you how difficult it is to win this election. I ran against Van Orden last year, and he came within a few votes of victory. So take it from me, the only way Brad is going to be able to win is with supporters like you chipping in $5 when he needs it most. = Thanks for your support, Ron Kind Congressman, WI-03 | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .
