body:
Help me break this endless cycle of violence for a safer future | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40645588/325285424/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU5NTRjMS04ZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtNRLtrwSVuHIc2Up-eBbWAZH4dOQCFAo7UB3I7ihAc=) | Peter, More than 45,000 Americans died by gunfire in 2020. That is a 14 percent jump over the previous year and the largest increase on record. Gun violence is ravaging our communities, and it must end. **To ensure our children have a safer future, we have to break this seemingly endless cycle of violence. This starts with our elected leaders.** As a gun owner myself, I believe we need sensible gun safety measures in place that will keep us all safe from the gun crisis we face in our country. [**I can advocate for universal background checks, stronger red flag laws, and expanded community violence intervention programs in Congress. Send a grassroots donation of $25 right now to help me get there.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40645589/325285426/694734457?refcode=gunreform011222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU5NTRjMS04ZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtNRLtrwSVuHIc2Up-eBbWAZH4dOQCFAo7UB3I7ihAc=) Every day, we hear of another life lost to guns. Just last year, Champaign reported 259 shootings. **That is 259 opportunities for someone to get injured or killed in our communities.** [**We can never forget that gun safety is public safety. Will you stand with me in my fight to push for gun reform that puts people first? Make a contribution right now to support my plans for a safer Illinois.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40645590/325285429/694734457?refcode=gunreform011222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU5NTRjMS04ZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtNRLtrwSVuHIc2Up-eBbWAZH4dOQCFAo7UB3I7ihAc=) We the people hold the power to make changes that benefit us all. Thank you for being by my side in this important fight. Thank you, David Palmer

They’ve set a goal to hit 1,000 new donations by midnight on Saturday. Friend,
**Just 400 votes** \-- that's how many (or rather, few) votes President Joe Biden won our new district by in 2020.
We know we don't need to tell you that elections have major consequences, friend.
But we do want to remind you that just 10 months from now, we'll have a new Member of Congress representing us in Washington. We have the power to decide who that representative will be: **Kirsten Engel, a leader who understands the needs of everyday Arizonans and who will always prioritize them OR a Republican who supports the GOP's extremist ideals and conspiracy theories.**
Right now we are certain of two things:
1.) Democrats _can defy the odds and win big in this year’s midterm elections_. We've seen it before and _we can do it again._
2.) The funnel of GOP and corporate dollars will only continue to pour into this district. That's why _every single dollar makes a huge difference._
Running this campaign, reaching our fundraising goals, and everything else we do is made possible by small-dollar donations from supporters like you.
[**Please help us stay ahead and chip in whatever you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40646505/325290277/41694283?refcode=X_011322_400Votes&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRhODAzOS05Mjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-tJRW7ADRx9hMHmEDhUH2qbQVzx84KU7vxAYdZaxZQ=)

body:
This is our best chance to secure voting rights. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40646901/325292148/823540626?refcode=ea.97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NiZmNlZi05Mjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spUoev7F1vZJb_-ZiOd3d-Q7Rg98wxIZpYluZ92FO10=&emci=43ffeec9-fc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1049176)
Peter, After spending most of last year negotiating and facing down Republican roadblocks, Democrats in Washington are on the way to PASSING a historic voting rights package! **[Sign on to urge the Senate to pass voting rights reform>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40646902/325292149/796200682?refcode=ea.97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NiZmNlZi05Mjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spUoev7F1vZJb_-ZiOd3d-Q7Rg98wxIZpYluZ92FO10=&emci=43ffeec9-fc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1049176)** **Roy said it right: Democratic governors are saving our democracy. But they can’t do it alone, and they’re being spread thin.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40646903/325292150/796200682?refcode=ea.97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NiZmNlZi05Mjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spUoev7F1vZJb_-ZiOd3d-Q7Rg98wxIZpYluZ92FO10=&emci=43ffeec9-fc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=97cbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1049176) Republicans in states like Texas, Georgia, Florida, and even right here in North Carolina have consistently attacked voting rights ahead of the 2022 midterm elections — they know that their best chance at winning comes by preventing some of us from having our voices heard at the polls. But by protecting access to the ballot box at the federal level, we can ensure that voters in _every_ state have their rights respected and can have their say in our democracy. If Republicans are allowed to continue suppressing the vote across the country, it imperils the very foundation of our government. Leaders in Washington MUST ACT NOW — before it’s too late. **[We need 500 supporters to sign our petition in the next 24 hours. clean_body: This is our best chance to secure voting rights. | Peter, After spending most of last year negotiating and facing down Republican roadblocks, Democrats in Washington are on the way to PASSING a historic voting rights package! Roy said it right: Democratic governors are saving our democracy. But they can’t do it alone, and they’re being spread thin. Republicans in states like Texas, Georgia, Florida, and even right here in North Carolina have consistently attacked voting rights ahead of the 2022 midterm elections — they know that their best chance at winning comes by preventing some of us from having our voices heard at the polls. But by protecting access to the ballot box at the federal level, we can ensure that voters in every state have their rights respected and can have their say in our democracy. If Republicans are allowed to continue suppressing the vote across the country, it imperils the very foundation of our government. Leaders in Washington MUST ACT NOW — before it’s too late. | Thanks for taking action, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Peter – I'm about to ask you to make a donation to defeat Sen. Grassley. I know that the election feels far away, but I hope you can give me a minute of your time to explain why I'm asking you to invest in my campaign right now.
I'm asking you _now_ because these early investments are how we build the capacity that will push us across the finish line to victory in November.
I'm asking you _now_ so that our campaign will be able to compete with GOP spending today and every day through Election Day. (As a reminder, Mitch McConnell's allies already have a $30 million campaign war chest at their disposal.)
I'm asking you _now_ so we have the resources to get television ads up on the air early and fight back against GOP misinformation and far-right attacks.
I'm asking you _now_ so that we can talk to every single one of the critical voters who will decide this election – who will decide whether Democrats expand our Senate control.
I'm asking you _now_ because this is a marathon, not a sprint, and I'm going to need you with me every mile and every step of the way.
**[So Peter, if you're with me to flip this seat blue, expand our Senate majority and fight for the working families in Iowa who Sen. body:
This is the largest investment in infrastructure in generations.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647259/325294029/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220113oped_N_SB_ALL_5_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc5Mzc1MS05NDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnDfXe8UmIYDhjE5wOS9CA_V46JRKe4Iun_ZfFDqtWw=) Peter,

I may have only been in Congress for a couple of months, but __I’m hard at work delivering results.__

[**_I am about to tell you all the ways we are already delivering for the people of Ohio. But first, can you contribute $5 today to help keep me in Congress and turn Ohio blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647260/325294030/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220113oped_N_SB_ALL_5_G_N_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc5Mzc1MS05NDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnDfXe8UmIYDhjE5wOS9CA_V46JRKe4Iun_ZfFDqtWw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647261/325294031/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220113oped_N_SB_ALL_5_G_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc5Mzc1MS05NDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnDfXe8UmIYDhjE5wOS9CA_V46JRKe4Iun_ZfFDqtWw=) As a native Clevelander and former Cuyahoga County Council member, I know firsthand how badly our roads and bridges, airports and rail systems, and water infrastructure and broadband networks need updating and repair. **That is why I was proud to support the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, the largest investment in infrastructure in generations.**

Here are just a few ways the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is delivering for Ohio:
* **$1.8 billion** to repave roads, modernize highways, and reduce commute times
* **$240 million** to update drinking and wastewater systems
* The largest investment in public transit, including our bus and rail systems, in our nation’s history
* Expanded access to high-speed internet to more than **250,000 Ohioans**

People have talked for decades about delivering on infrastructure. _In 2021, we actually got it done._ We have so much more work to do, but we must hold our Democratic majority in Congress to do it.

[**_So, Peter, will you join me in celebrating the successes of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act and ensuring we continue on this road of progress by donating $5 today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647262/325294032/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220113oped_N_SB_ALL_5_G_N_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc5Mzc1MS05NDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnDfXe8UmIYDhjE5wOS9CA_V46JRKe4Iun_ZfFDqtWw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647263/325294033/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220113oped_N_SB_ALL_5_G_N_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc5Mzc1MS05NDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnDfXe8UmIYDhjE5wOS9CA_V46JRKe4Iun_ZfFDqtWw=)**

Onward,

Shontel Brown

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

That is why I was proud to support the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, the largest investment in infrastructure in generations. Here are just a few ways the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is delivering for Ohio: $1.8 billion to repave roads, modernize highways, and reduce commute times $240 million to update drinking and wastewater systems The largest investment in public transit, including our bus and rail systems, in our nation’s history Expanded access to high-speed internet to more than 250,000 Ohioans People have talked for decades about delivering on infrastructure. In 2021, we actually got it done. We have so much more work to do, but we must hold our Democratic majority in Congress to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Onward, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvfs8rv5t57vn6uhaivn0o21uvh9ntju0nc1e5fg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8shj62prec7562rm4pjmc9q38p77cso7apr6mdoe5ddgctib4cjkesp3fd1im3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8p6cd34mkp60tj1copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm4o34s5i68p724no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn5bi5ijoels95cmlb1j4tid1tk8je5ckl7i5akg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1ie2p34cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcsnag2r8hi4io623o3fqhd1t0a364lin62830eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1ie2p34cjh2bs) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhuf0akotl7hqani48fvpoif4mhl0onae66lkte0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1ie2p34cjh2bs) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: From the bottom of my heart -- thank you.
body:
We raised $2.7M just six months after entering this race!
#

Team,

From the bottom of my heart, I wanted to personally thank you.

Thanks to the support of Team Tom members like you, **we raised $2.7 million with donations coming from ALL of Maryland’s 23 counties, Baltimore City, and across the country just six months after entering this race**. And **65%** of our donations came from _gifts under $200_! This is a true, growing grassroots movement, and I’m proud to show everyone watching the momentum we’ve been building.

I’m also more inspired than ever to hit the ground running to create a better future for Maryland families – but the road to Annapolis is long. It will be filled with more crucial deadlines and even bigger challenges. There’s a lot of work to do, and I hope I can count on your support moving forward.

For now, I want to thank you personally for all the support you’ve shown me and this campaign so far. **Will you join me for a call I’m hosting at 6:30 ET tonight for some of our top supporters?**
******[RSVP>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647463/325294932/347120977?contactdata=39KQ5QE6HIOA65YX7OZQRHoYHL7enRy3jLNMsiCpwwYj6ZF2MtTE9jvYQWKv6FRd2jT1GxhjtzcsvYv%2FQ1FBvfjD0eAESEJGJHSXyn6vftTH4NO8f2aXyl50KbvW%2FK%2FpSO72BTpCVK5vTH2M0DIdi4L4GI3okKuMQpAGHubHP3c%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUwNjE0ZS05NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80JhQXXX7MmSfD3vhViIp7g7FYnmJ6GPwkVQ3o8A2kg=&emci=2dc178b7-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0de0614e-9574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)******
Thank you for believing in me,

Tom

P.S. We earned donations from every county in Maryland – all 23 – **AND** Baltimore City! If you didn’t have a chance to donate ahead of our public filing deadline, **[I’m humbly asking that you chip in $23 (for 23 counties!) today to help us celebrate this moment and ensure we can keep building our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40647464/325294933/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220113-filingty-ND&amount=23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUwNjE0ZS05NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80JhQXXX7MmSfD3vhViIp7g7FYnmJ6GPwkVQ3o8A2kg=) If you can’t give $23 today, don’t worry. Every donation makes a difference – no matter the size.**
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2dc178b7-7974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/0de0614e-9574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUwNjE0ZS05NTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80JhQXXX7MmSfD3vhViIp7g7FYnmJ6GPwkVQ3o8A2kg=&id=116402624).

Friends,

Happy New Year! Our resolution is to build power for working people here in CA-46, Orange County, and beyond. A big part of that is getting Mike in office this year, and we want to tell your our plan now that we're SIX months out from the primary election (we also have some HUGE news to share!) [Join us for our campaign-wide meeting this Sunday, Jan. 16th at 12PM PT!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648075/325297550/772439369?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdmMGYzMi05ODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unO9GP4CvkIjwGzNlAxpSHwQpSRn5mZXDyt4j0PqGu0=&emci=8fcbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f57f0f32-9874-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12523946)

This Sunday, January 16th at 12PM PT we're going to have a virtual meeting to share our updates and plans. We absolutely cannot do this without you - so if you can give an hour of your time this holiday weekend, it would mean the world to us here at Ortega For Congress. [Sign up here and get the link for the event!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648076/325297551/772439369?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdmMGYzMi05ODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unO9GP4CvkIjwGzNlAxpSHwQpSRn5mZXDyt4j0PqGu0=&emci=8fcbfcef-9274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f57f0f32-9874-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12523946)
We hope to see you soon!

In Solidarity/En Solidaridad,

Alex Coronado
Campaign Manager

**[I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my sister’s reelection campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648102/325297688/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220113mm1_mm_gst_actives_7_ng_na_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzBmNzM2My05ODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRhCfq0CfvVftIES4S1wYj8iQwqoQVwMBchheu1ORU0=)** , but first, let me tell you a little bit about why she’s such a great Congresswoman.

When Lisa first ran for Congress, there was something that she said at almost all of her events that resonated with the crowd, so much so that it turned into call-and-response.

My sister would say, “When Lisa goes to Washington...” and the crowd would yell back, “...we ALL go to Washington.”

**Those crowds knew that Lisa would have their best interests at heart in Congress, and she hasn’t let them down.**

In Congress, she has fought for affordable, quality healthcare, she has worked across the aisle to ensure Delaware is at the forefront of the economy of the future, and she has looked out for the people she represents.

**[Now, can you help send us all back to Washington with a $15 donation today ahead of her first fundraising deadline of 2022 at midnight on Saturday? name: Tom Malinowski
subject: “Once more unto the breach, dear friends, once more.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648377/325298856/1660491306?refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_220113_1_1&refcode2=9ac3ed36-9974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWMzZWQzNi05OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G6M286CNZfH0_VzGy0WF-A2hGmns-GX9BPMqeYjOU-8=&emci=5ecdc707-8774-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9ac3ed36-9974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19214294)
---
| | “Once more unto the breach, dear friends, once more.” I launched my reelection campaign this week with that quote from Shakespeare, and not just because we like to have fun on Team Tom. I wanted to convey that in New Jersey’s 7th district, we really are standing in the breach, for our country’s sake. For as long as I can remember, Democrats and Republicans have been having debates about taxes, spending, and what role our government should play in our lives. Those issues — from affordable health care, to early education, to fighting climate change — matter profoundly. But the biggest argument in America today concerns something even more fundamental. It is about whether the democracy we have long taken for granted can long endure. On one side in Washington today, we have Democrats and a few brave Republicans trying to do our duty under the Constitution, focusing on delivering for our constituents, finding common ground where we can, and playing by the rules when we can’t. On the other side, we have people who, out of opportunism or cowardice, are increasingly aligned with a mob that attacked the Capitol to overturn an election. Across America, the leaders who summoned and incited that mob are installing state legislators and election officials willing to nullify any election their side loses. We narrowly averted that catastrophe in 2020, because at the critical moment, men and women of integrity (including many Republicans) did stand in the breach. But in the Republican Party today, those men and women are systematically being replaced by people who do little more than lie for social media fame and political power. I do not want Kevin McCarthy to be Speaker of the House, or people like Jim Jordan and Marjorie Taylor Greene to have real power, on January 6th, 2025, when Congress certifies the winner of the next presidential election. Whether that happens or not will depend on races in a dwindling handful of House districts that can go either way. With redistricting in New Jersey complete, mine is likely to be the only competitive district in our state, and one of the few in the country. It will not be an easy race. It will be expensive, because where we see danger, Republicans see an opportunity to seize the House majority, and will invest massively in taking our district back. But at least we know where to concentrate our efforts. This is where we have to hold our ground. This is where we have to fill the breach. The game’s afoot! So follow your spirit, and upon this charge — let’s go fight and win. [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648378/325298857/-1267168964?amount=15&refcode2=9ac3ed36-9974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_220113_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWMzZWQzNi05OTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G6M286CNZfH0_VzGy0WF-A2hGmns-GX9BPMqeYjOU-8=)

---
|
---
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.
Tom Malinowski for Congress
P.O. Box 263
Somerville, NJ 08876
United States

name: Derek Marshall
subject: To change everything, we need everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Last week was eventful here in Victorville, and I want to share it with you. Our week was jam-packed with political and community events that reinvigorated my faith in our democracy after the sobering reminder of last year’s insurrection on January 6th.**It’s important to remember that even in the face of such challenges, and especially then, we must come together in our communities to work for positive change.** That’s what we’re doing in California’s 23rd.
First, we started off with an amazing voter registration event in Victorville.**I love doing the work to register voters because it reminds me how crucial it is that everyone can participate in our democracy.** Keeping a democracy alive takes work, and I’m proud to play my part on this campaign by registering first-time voters who will finally have the opportunity to make their voices heard at the ballot box this November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648764/325300795/1745779731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDliYTc5Zi05YTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZwYZiMKT8PkE2wfzjw3yu4VdLh9ekJtYLk_aymh9D6k=)
This is Herb. He drives the bus for the Victor Valley Transit System and has never voted before.**Last week, I met him, and at the end of our conversation, he registered to vote.** It’s moments like these that make our democracy work. One more voter may not seem like a big deal, but I believe every single person’s voice counts. **And in a day and age when voting rights are constantly under attack, standing up and declaring that your voice matters does count for something.**
**[It’s crucial that we raise the resources to fund extensive voter registration efforts as well as a comprehensive field program to ensure we also reach and persuade first-time voters, disenchanted Democrats, and independent non-partisan voters. Can you support our mission with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648765/325300796/1745779731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDliYTc5Zi05YTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZwYZiMKT8PkE2wfzjw3yu4VdLh9ekJtYLk_aymh9D6k=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648766/325300798/1745779731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDliYTc5Zi05YTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZwYZiMKT8PkE2wfzjw3yu4VdLh9ekJtYLk_aymh9D6k=)**

We then attended a vigil in remembrance of the somber events of the January 6th riots at the Capitol, a moment that we will never forget. **It reinforced my commitment to fighting against the hatred and extremism that the Republican Party has endorsed, ideologies that will lead to more events like it if we don’t fight back, together. **

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648767/325300801/1745779731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDliYTc5Zi05YTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZwYZiMKT8PkE2wfzjw3yu4VdLh9ekJtYLk_aymh9D6k=)

I ended the week at a rally for CalCare, or California Guaranteed Healthcare for All. AB1400 would provide single-payer, universal healthcare to everyone in the state, regardless of their immigration status. It would be the largest system of universal healthcare in the United States. **It was thrilling to join our community members in advocating for this bill that would save thousands and thousands of lives and change the fortunes of millions.**

When I reach the halls of Congress, you can bet I will show up for my community every day. **[California’s 23rd deserves a fighter who will advocate for the bold policies we need here in the desert. Too many of us are struggling. Too many face barriers to economic opportunity. I want to change that, but I need your help. Can I count on you to make a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40648774/325300805/1745779731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDliYTc5Zi05YTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZwYZiMKT8PkE2wfzjw3yu4VdLh9ekJtYLk_aymh9D6k=)**

clean_body: Peter, Last week was eventful here in Victorville, and I want to share it with you. Our week was jam-packed with political and community events that reinvigorated my faith in our democracy after the sobering reminder of last year’s insurrection on January 6th.It’s important to remember that even in the face of such challenges, and especially then, we must come together in our communities to work for positive change. That’s what we’re doing in California’s 23rd. First, we started off with an amazing voter registration event in Victorville.I love doing the work to register voters because it reminds me how crucial it is that everyone can participate in our democracy. Keeping a democracy alive takes work, and I’m proud to play my part on this campaign by registering first-time voters who will finally have the opportunity to make their voices heard at the ballot box this November. = This is Herb. He drives the bus for the Victor Valley Transit System and has never voted before.Last week, I met him, and at the end of our conversation, he registered to vote. It’s moments like these that make our democracy work. One more voter may not seem like a big deal, but I believe every single person’s voice counts. And in a day and age when voting rights are constantly under attack, standing up and declaring that your voice matters does count for something. = = We then attended a vigil in remembrance of the somber events of the January 6th riots at the Capitol, a moment that we will never forget. It reinforced my commitment to fighting against the hatred and extremism that the Republican Party has endorsed, ideologies that will lead to more events like it if we don’t fight back, together. = I ended the week at a rally for CalCare, or California Guaranteed Healthcare for All. AB1400 would provide single-payer, universal healthcare to everyone in the state, regardless of their immigration status. It would be the largest system of universal healthcare in the United States. It was thrilling to join our community members in advocating for this bill that would save thousands and thousands of lives and change the fortunes of millions. = It’s the groundwork like this that distinguishes my campaign from my opponent’s. I believe elected officials should still stand alongside their constituents even when they’re in office. When I reach the halls of Congress, you can bet I will show up for my community every day. = In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Catherine (D)
subject: 3 things to think about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
3 points. 3 consecutive polls. 3rd most vulnerable.
#
Team, I hope you’ll lend me just a moment of your time to explain why your support — particularly today — is so critical to my campaign and our Senate majority. It all starts with the number three:
**3 POINTS.**
The GOP has spent over $4 MILLION relentlessly attacking me and it’s given my Trump-endorsed opponent a 3 point lead over me.
**3 CONSECUTIVE POLLS.**
Democrats cannot afford to lose even one seat or we could lose the Senate majority, but this is the 3rd consecutive poll that shows me losing this race.
**3rd MOST VULNERABLE. **
The Cook Political Report has already downgraded my race to a toss-up, and now CNN ranks me as one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators in the entire country.
**I have to start January off strong to have any hope of turning this campaign around.** Which is why I absolutely must hit my mid-month goal before midnight tonight, but I’m still $5,293 short with just hours to go.
**[Hitting this mid-month goal could not be more important for the future of our Senate majority. Please, donate $5 to my campaign and Jacky Rosen before tonight’s critical deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40649050/325301735/-1290563170?refcode=jr_em_nd_220113_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWRmZWRmMS05YTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTsfYWR30Lv0S1IjX4oe8t20L6NYnbbajpcBMpMNf-o=)**
I overcame tougher odds in my first election to become the first Latina ever elected to the Senate. But the only way we’re going to win is if we do this together.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: This was Mitch McConnell’s top priority:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We need to keep the Senate blue to confirm more judges who are dedicated to defending our rights and protecting our democracy.
#
Peter:
In 2021, the Senate Judiciary Committee confirmed a record number of well-qualified federal judges from a diversity of backgrounds and experiences.
In the coming years, there will be additional judicial vacancies.
We need to keep the Senate blue to confirm more judges who are dedicated to defending our rights and protecting our democracy.
**[We’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 by January 15 to stay on track this month. Can I count on you to make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, now to defend and expand our Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40649129/325302163/-809948504?refcode=dd_em_220113_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzEzODQxZC05Yjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56Kf1INR6aiIe6RvHZQqab11i7yMgywAutI0RjNJ-B0=)**
When Mitch McConnell was Senate Majority Leader, he called himself the “Grim Reaper” of the Senate, refusing to bring up hundreds of bills that would support working families – but he pushed through as many Trump-approved judicial confirmations as possible because he knows the importance of shaping our federal judiciary.
We made tremendous progress last year in appointing judges who will balance the bench and who share our values. Now, we can’t afford to put Mitch McConnell back in charge of the process.
**[Contribute $5 right now to protect our Democratic majority and stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate – and control of our federal judiciary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40649130/325302166/-809948504?refcode=dd_em_220113_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzEzODQxZC05Yjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56Kf1INR6aiIe6RvHZQqab11i7yMgywAutI0RjNJ-B0=)**
Thank you,
Dick Durbin

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm still falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
and the chair of the RNC just attacked me personally
| | |
---
I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $13,441 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40649496/325303601/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2142-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmZkODc1MS05Yjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhL4osnMbKnut1CzfuUe6CTW98EV2mckkW3bHH3g7LA=)**
Thank you for stepping up when it matters most.

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40649497/325303602/1804727444?refcode=jtk2142-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmZkODc1MS05Yjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhL4osnMbKnut1CzfuUe6CTW98EV2mckkW3bHH3g7LA=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: ICYMI: We’re Suing 🗣
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Peter,

In case you missed it, Republicans rigged Tennessee maps in their favor, and we’re preparing to sue. With these new, unconstitutional maps, 1 in 4 Tennesseeans will be discriminated against and underrepresented.

“Equality of population is still the principal consideration.” – Supreme Court of Tennessee, Lockert v. Crowell, 1982

This principle is what should be at the center of drawing district lines. The Republicans’ maps fail to do this, while the maps Democrats proposed were mathematically and proportionally superior in every way. It is possible to draw fair maps, but Tennessee Republicans chose themselves over equality.

We need to raise $30,000 by the end of January to mount our lawsuit — can you chip in now to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to personally thank all of you for helping us over the last few weeks as we approached last night’s deadline. I am humbled by the surge of support that came through to push us across the finish line, and I look forward to proudly sharing our fundraising numbers with you once my finance team has added everything up.

**Reaching this deadline was a team effort, and it took the support of every member of Team King to make it — including you, Peter. I feel more confident than ever that our campaign can and will meet this moment to do what’s right for Marylanders.**

As we look toward the road ahead, I am inspired by all this team has accomplished and the commitment to progress that fuels our work. I know that the next few months will be full of opportunities to build upon our ever-increasing campaign momentum and grow our progressive movement.

Thank you again for your support and for being a valued member of this team.

John
---

name: Patty Murray
subject: Let’s grow our Democratic majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need to keep Washington state blue in 2022.
#
Peter,
The countdown to the November election has begun – and one seat could decide it all.
Democrats can’t afford to lose a single Senate seat, and new polling shows that we can’t take anything for granted. We need to be ready to defend our progress and defeat the Republicans.
**That’s why I’m setting a $15,000 fundraising goal to keep this campaign on track. If we all dig deep and contribute what we can, I know we can reach our goal by this weekend.**
**[This team never fails to help us meet our goals – and with the January deadline just around the corner, we need your support in this crucial moment. Will you chip in $5 to my campaign to defend this seat in Washington state and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40650079/325306385/807277627?refcode=pm_em_220113_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTE3MmY2Yi05ZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrvipSeBCGbVsWkWCCri15SX7hWVx8y1K6rw9nf3SVc=)**
Let’s break it down, Peter. The Republicans only need _**ONE**_ seat to retake the majority. But they have _**TWENTY**_ seats to defend in the midterm elections. So, if we hold on to every Democratic Senate seat, like this one in Washington state, and can defeat a few Republican incumbents, we can build a filibuster-proof majority and make the progress we all want to see.
**Let’s do everything we can to win this race in Washington state and grow our Democratic majority with champions for working families who will support our progressive agenda.**
**[The clock is ticking against our mid-month deadline this weekend. Will you help keep our fight to expand the Senate majority on track? Rush in your $5 contribution right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40650080/325306388/807277627?refcode=pm_em_220113_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTE3MmY2Yi05ZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrvipSeBCGbVsWkWCCri15SX7hWVx8y1K6rw9nf3SVc=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **
** **
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40650081/325306389/807277627?refcode=pm_em_220113_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTE3MmY2Yi05ZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrvipSeBCGbVsWkWCCri15SX7hWVx8y1K6rw9nf3SVc=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court Halts Vaccine Mandates
body:
SCOTUS Pushes Back On Vaccine Mandates Today, we had a BIG win for Freedom and Liberty. SCOTUS halted Biden's illegal vaccine mandate for big busine
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1723.1.86b3ac593bfbf058a2a23b8040fbd795) |
---
## SCOTUS Pushes Back On Vaccine Mandates
---
Today, we had a BIG win for Freedom and Liberty. SCOTUS halted Biden's illegal vaccine mandate for big business. The fight is not over though. We must stay diligent. Companies may try to enforce the mandates and we need to push back with Religious Exemptions. Below is what I have been doing since September:
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1724.1.4dee83c9bce7f84651c34eba3e463cc9)
---
Former Vice President Joe Biden declared WAR on the Freedoms we have as Americans.
In September he issued a "mandate" requiring companies with more than 100 employees to force the COVID19 Vaccine upon them.
That is why I decided to fight back with the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition that over 100,000 people have signed at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1725.1.87a61d05b276f041b18f8bbf13e37bb7)
I also included a [COVID19 Religious Exemption Form](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1726.1.2de19dcf67d2484a5402cb9a00ab571d) that is totally FREE to download. I have signed OVER 50,000 of those exemptions as the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1727.1.bfcd0f4ce2cf3b215f2ab4b1418691ee) in Tulsa, OK and thousands of people have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab.
The Religious Exemptions **WORK**.
If your Pastor will not sign the Religious Exemption Form for you, then I will. In order for my signature to carry any weight though I would have to be your pastor and you would need to be a member of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1728.1.e2386a64da56671997d622db80301dfc) Online (this does not mean you must leave your home church). Here is a link to view how to become an online member of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1729.1.8f9aeb1677515c545b0fe43cd5ff9dd7) today: [https://www.sheridan.church/join-the-online-family](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1730.1.988a0834fc12def3bbaf0b008c82350c)
Once you have become an online member I will contact you and sign a Religious Exemption Form. As the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1731.1.2134327a0f0303706ae34f1cfbbae565), I stand behind your religious conviction to not take the COVID19 vaccine.
I write this email though because now the Biden Administration is in discussions about forcing companies under 100 employees to comply with their illegal vaccine mandate.
**WE MUST FIGHT BACK!**
As a Pastor I am able to help you out as an individual but as a US Senator, I will be able to help out our nation collectively.
I need your help in this fight for Medical Freedom:
Share the [NO VACCINE MANDATE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1732.1.ac032a2f74d05424631216644f5e0f42) petition link w/5 people right now and inform them they can download the COVID19 Religious Form to fight back!
Text them this link to sign the petition and download the exemption: [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1733.1.8d01df2b3cfd0e4226a919c6931145ec)
Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1734.1.c55ad37d26bf563b87207041c6c6cf41), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1735.1.b8a33dc58f42375c203e711a1ac48725), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1736.1.285b0c27b9baa2c9a74babf9fbf62f12), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1737.1.5f3dd0bdd4f283f03b3f9de07985f1f5), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2747084.1738.1.848c20f9d8b56705678dc22fc594b146)).

As a Pastor I am able to help you out as an individual but as a US Senator, I will be able to help out our nation collectively. I need your help in this fight for Medical Freedom: Share the petition link w/5 people right now and inform them they can download the COVID19 Religious Form to fight back! Text them this link to sign the petition and download the exemption: Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com Thank you, Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on , , , , GETTR & ). | | | www.MyPillow.com | ReAwaken America Tour Events in AZ, OH, CA & OR w/Eric Trump, General Micahel Flynn, Mike Lindell and others. body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BMmxsr&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESI5CTf&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/3f9770d1-d1d7-42ca-ae8a-50b8391c33bc.png]

Our borders need to be secured

Fellow Americans,

According to Texas Governor Greg Abbott “...the amount of fentanyl apprehended just by the Texas Department of Safety just this year is more than enough to kill every man, woman, and child in the states of Texas, California, and New York." [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sfk3g3&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwFSGyT&]

That is a sobering statement from the Texas Governor.

The lack of control along the southern border has allowed dangerous and deadly drugs to come into our country, as well as hundreds of thousands of people, and it's all because of Biden's open border policy!

Under President Trump we had a border wall being completed and a secure border. There was no reason to halt Trump's policies that were clearly working.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/bc37ea59-c668-45aa-b431-2a03db8c09b2.jpg]

We must secure our borders once more and ensure the safety of Americans!

We know it can be done. We need a strong Congress to stand up for America and protect the American People. With the drug traffic increasing we've seen, and will continue to see, a rise in drug related deaths and crimes. If we once more take control over our borders we can begin to protect the safety of the American People.

Will you help me get to Congress so I can achieve our goal of a secure border? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sfk3DK&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJNrVaL&]
Loren

clean_body: | | | | He can’t wait to meet you. | Friend, President Trump asked me to reach out to some of my top supporters and extend an invite to join him for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Mar-a-Lago in Florida! All you have to do is contribute any amount to my campaign to defeat Liberal Lisa Murkowski, and you will be automatically entered to win. MEMBER ID:318492-79 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ENTRY STATUS: INCOMPLETE** If selected, YOU will win a round-trip flight to Florida, overnight accommodations in a hotel, ground transportation, and get a personal photo with President Donald J. Trump! What are you waiting for? ** Thank you and good luck, Kelly for Alaska Republican Candidate | | | | ==

subject: Elise just opposed voting rights AGAIN

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40650949/325309985/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113FTVA_BF_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTk1NzVlZi1hMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rX7EdIhwqnIw3GQR9WjwdU20OiVTBnvRtikGI0IlbZE=)
---
Friend, The U.S. House just voted on a historic election reform package that would require same-day voter registration nationwide, curb dark money in politics, and reign in rogue states that are trying to prevent access to the ballot box. _**But Elise Stefanik just voted against this necessary voting rights legislation. Again.**_ We’ve seen what happens when politicians fear losing their power. We saw it in states like Georgia last year, where they restricted voting access, closed polling sites, purged voter rolls, and even threw out ballots, just so fewer people could make their voices heard. Obstructing voter access like Georgia did, and like Elise Stefanik voted to allow them to continue to do, is immoral, undemocratic, and anti-American. I’ve already been endorsed by the Voter Protection Project, and when I get to Congress I will do everything I can to protect your constitutional right to cast your ballot. [**If you agree that we need to protect voting rights, I hope you’ll consider donating to my campaign to flip this seat. I promise to always stand up for your right to vote — whether it’s for me or not.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40650950/325309986/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113FTVA_BF_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTk1NzVlZi1hMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rX7EdIhwqnIw3GQR9WjwdU20OiVTBnvRtikGI0IlbZE=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Meeting tomorrow morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We’re behind on our fundraising progress for January
#

Hey team — it’s Malcolm’s fundraising director, Catherine.
It’s my job to set, track, and hit fundraising goals that will ensure we have the resources to build a coalition of support for Malcolm across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties before the Democratic primary.
I update Malcolm and the team each week on our progress to goal — but this week, we have a problem. The truth is, we’re behind on our fundraising progress for January, but I don’t want to deliver bad news to the team this early into 2022.
So I calculated that if we can get two of Malcolm’s supporters in 18326 to step up with a donation by midnight, I can report we are on track for our January goal by the time of our next team meeting tomorrow morning.
Here comes the part where I ask you to be one of those donors. Because the only way we can win this seat and send a real champion for working families to the U.S. Senate is if we all do our part.
[Could you please pitch in $3 to Malcolm Kenyatta’s campaign for Senate today? We need a lot of grassroots support to make up for lost ground.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40651007/325310347/-358086307?refcode2=8f3a544d-a274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220112-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjNhNTQ0ZC1hMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8WbhTPnvYQ803uPXzyEa5DZJANPVQyBkwgrl6V057o=)
Thank you in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in. Malcolm isn’t taking money from corporate PACs or corporate lobbyists, so donations from emails like these are essential in fueling our path to victory.
Best,
Catherine McParland
Fundraising Director
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40651008/325310348/-358086307?refcode2=8f3a544d-a274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220112-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjNhNTQ0ZC1hMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8WbhTPnvYQ803uPXzyEa5DZJANPVQyBkwgrl6V057o=)**

subject: [BREAKING NEWS] David McCormick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Not familiar with McCormick? Let us introduce you.
#
Breaking news, Derek:
**Another Republican just launched his campaign for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania: David McCormick.** Just like Dr. Oz, McCormick is a multi-millionaire ready to spend millions of his own money to buy PA’s Senate seat. His campaign advisers include Trump lackeys like Hope Hicks and Stephen Miller.
**[Can you rush a donation of any amount towards our campaign today to help fight back against our new GOP opponent + send John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40775?refcode=ema20220113-4178&t=1&akid=4178%2E434096%2ELfnw68)**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40775?refcode=ema20220113-4178&t=2&akid=4178%2E434096%2ELfnw68)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40775?refcode=em20220113-4178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4178%2E434096%2ELfnw68)**
Not so familiar with David McCormick? Let us introduce you:
* Until a few weeks ago, McCormick was the CEO of the LARGEST hedge fund in the world
* As a CEO, McCormick laid off PA workers and hired workers in China and India
* As of now, he’s *still* registered to vote in Connecticut — and hasn’t lived in PA since 2007
* He’s bringing former Trump advisors Stephen Miller and Hope Hicks to PA along with him

McCormick is just another wannabe Trump trying to buy his way into the U.S. Senate. **And Derek, it’s up to us to stop him from doing that.**
**[Please, rush a donation of $5 or more today to support our fight against Trumpism and to protect our Democratic majority by sending John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate. Any and all donations help when we’re up against self-funding millionaires like McCormick and Dr. Oz.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40775?refcode=ema20220113-4178&t=22&akid=4178%2E434096%2ELfnw68)**
Thank you for your support, Derek. We couldn’t do it without you.
More soon,
Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220113-4178-footer&t=23&refcode2=4178_434096_Lfnw68&akid=4178%2E434096%2ELfnw68)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

**_Jessica Benham & Chris Deluzio_**
Pennsylvania families are suffering because our government is failing people with disabilities and the loved ones who care for them. People can’t find caregivers, families are filling the void at great personal cost and care workers can’t get by on lousy pay. This is a disaster not only for those who need care and aren’t getting it, but also for their families and the caregivers who do this necessary and noble work while struggling to get by. It’s a problem that Harrisburg and Washington cannot keep ignoring.
This is not just a Republican or Democratic problem, nor is it just an urban, rural or suburban one: People all over the Commonwealth are in crisis. And the COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the shortage of the essential workers providing care to people with disabilities. Many have waited for years for state funding for home care services, yet they may find no caregiver available after that long wait. And with pay for workers across our economy finally rising after years of skyrocketing inequality, now is the time for more public investment in the low-wage care economy.
The essential workers who care for people with disabilities often help with many core, everyday tasks: eating, socializing, hygiene. Their work is difficult, stressful and demanding. Yet their pay does not reflect those costs or the importance of the work to those they serve: The typical home care worker earns barely more than $18,000 a year. The Commonwealth has stubbornly kept Medicaid reimbursement rates low, and workers rarely have a meaningful chance to form or join a union.
It is no surprise that there is a shortage of these workers. As of this fall, according to a Pennsylvania official, there were more than 12,000 people with disabilities on state waitlists for Medicaid waiver funding for care. Even if someone makes it off the multi-year waitlist, providers may not have any care workers to offer. This dysfunction has left families scrambling to find care, with many being forced to leave the workforce to provide it themselves.
In Harrisburg, the majority party has chosen to lock away federal American Rescue Plan funding in a rainy day fund instead of using the money to benefit those who need it most today. Some of those federal dollars could have been used to fund additional waiver slots and increase wages for care workers, allowing individuals with disabilities to receive care in home- and community-based settings. In addition to the many other benefits of receiving care outside of an institutional setting, home care also has the benefit of reducing the spread of COVID-19 that we saw in state centers in Pennsylvania.
It doesn’t have to be this way. Our state government could fight for the civil rights of people with disabilities and for the rights of those who care for them. State House Democrats are fighting to pass legislation that increases the wages of care workers and to direct additional funding to our Medicaid waiver programs, decreasing (and eventually eliminating) lengthy waiting lists.
And in Washington, President Biden and Congressional Democrats are fighting hard to deliver robust funding to tackle the care crisis. The Build Back Better plan, which the House passed in November, includes $150 billion in care funding, the largest investment in the care economy in decades. These funds, which would improve Medicaid coverage for both community- and home-based care, would help to shorten waitlists. They would also raise pay for caregivers, helping those workers to earn a decent living and thus enticing more people to fill these needed jobs.
Yet corporate-backed politicians have thus far blocked people from getting the federal relief they so desperately need. But we think our government and economy ought to offer folks the basic dignity that quality care can provide — regardless of how rich you are.
Our society should not turn a blind eye to this crisis. The problems in the care economy are not going away. If anything, they are going to get worse as Pennsylvanians age and will increasingly need the support of care workers. We’ll be fighting to make sure our government does right by people with disabilities, families and care workers alike.
**_Rep. Jessica Benham is a Democrat who represents Allegheny County (36th District) in the Pennsylvania House of Representatives; Chris Deluzio is a Democratic candidate for the U.S. Congress in Pennsylvania’s 17th district._**

| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. The problems in the care economy are not going away. If anything, they are going to get worse as Pennsylvanians age and will increasingly need the support of care workers. We’ll be fighting to make sure our government does right by people with disabilities, families and care workers alike. Rep. Jessica Benham is a Democrat who represents Allegheny County (36th District) in the Pennsylvania House of Representatives; Chris Deluzio is a Democratic candidate for the U.S. Congress in Pennsylvania’s 17th district.** | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: David
subject: 3 p.m. call with AG James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, I had to make sure you saw the email AG James sent yesterday.
---
In just over 24 hours, we must submit our first PUBLIC fundraising report since July – and it's crucial we prove to the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and the wealthiest, most powerful interests in this country that the AG has the resources she needs to continue defending the vulnerable and voiceless as attorney general of New York.
**Here's the problem: I have a 3 p.m. call with the AG, and if we don't get about 50 more donations before then, I'll have to tell her that we're still falling more than halfway short of our goal. **
Please, will you make a donation right now so I can give her the good news about our progress and tell her we're still on track to reach our $20,000 goal by 11:59 p.m. tomorrow night?

Here's the best link to give:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40652086/325314881/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk298-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjY5Y2RiMC1hMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gx6ld1iR_VC87bw4n91k5mne4hNBXx4lbT13O8mLfGw=)**
Thank you so much for helping us turn things around as soon as possible and reach this vital goal on time.

David
Team Tish
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Wed, Jan 12, 2022
Subject: Big Pharma and the gun lobby are watching
| | |
---
Peter,

Team Tish has a major fundraising deadline in just two days.

We've set an ambitious fundraising goal because this date marks our six-month reporting deadline – **our first PUBLIC reporting deadline since July 2021.**

name: Christian Collins for Congress
subject: I am once again mobilizing our youth to Save America.
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GPisLrkGw0McHOtkjsbVZv-Oz9QZGNXZee5NxCuyZWAaDrGA8NVEi1HTZOqPJIzGdsrvnARDPLCs1OhZ8vvJ-23QhAZLx1cwr1C0dVTZbjnQ8P89mdwp2f0xTze1chIMkrNOAviJ8Oua8ARk3CB7Jg==&c=QQU4wf-KPfprvkkrb4BymDAg-N6o9F8u3Au-zonms0bGaAIUe1lVpQ==&ch=m3EIo4qxDWFzTeIi1f2iCsHZHVCuD3Brt9DHYHKCytBeg0p5mzlV2A==)

| Friends and fellow patriots,
America is at a crossroads. Our children will inherit a nation where cops are killed, businesses are looted, and basic facts are disregarded if we don't stand up and fight for what we believe.
I'm running for Congress for one simple reason - to Save America. To Save America we must first save our children. I started the Texas Youth Summit to educate the next generation of Americans on the principles of limited government, religious liberty, and the Judeo-Christian values our nation was founded upon. Within two years I grew our conference from 600 to over 1,200 students from across Texas. Most recently, I was honored to host Charlie Kirk, Donald Trump Jr., and Kayleigh Mcenany as speakers at the 2021 Texas Youth Summit.
Liberal Democrats realize that young people hold the keys to our nation's future. That's why universities have become breeding grounds for leftist indoctrination and radical ideas such as socialism, vaccine mandates, and critical race theory. These ideas will destroy America unless we act.
I am once again mobilizing our youth to Save America.
Will you join me?

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, JAN. 13, 2021
REWIND: GREATER GEORGIA FEATURED IN STRING OF RECENT INTERVIEWS Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler discusses Greater Georgia's goals for 2022
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler sat down for a string of recent interviews, where she discusses the progress Greater Georgia has made so far, as well as the organization's goals for 2022 and beyond. She also touts Greater Georgia's goal to promote Georgia's Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) in order to restore confidence in the hundreds of thousands of disenfranchised voters who have stayed home in prior elections because they feel their votes were not secure.
Catch the interviews below:
---
| |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdl416unno912agourc8i1dbbjlcqojvu9ogub60_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chg60ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdkmup30t3gm4ojcs5i6kqbeohgsapbedphegor2tj0mpr68sthmhr3ddhgearjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup34phgmspm0pti65j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf27tvkd4299c07vmab4e3mpesjnhhb35bft7pe8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chg60ob4c5h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcalpdb9jp87634uifigigrgss5ivj5849ji57eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chg60ob4c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvnjiitau84hf52ulcasn6mdf64j5as12d6cs6ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chg60ob4c5h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmlr62em58v37vuglosg482hclic6sav1l61agbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chg60ob4c5h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

The socialist policies of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the rest of the far-left liberals in D.C. are making this crisis even worse. And our country literally cannot afford another two years of destructive one-party Democrat rule. That’s why I’m asking you for a favor, Peter. Will you please consider setting up a recurring monthly donation? It’s a great way to stay involved and make sure we DEFEAT Pelosi and the socialist Democrats in 2022 and beyond. I know it sounds cliché, but 2022 really will be the most important election of our lives. And I need you fighting by my side in this do-or-die battle. So please, don’t miss out on this chance to help flip the House red and get America back on track. There’s no telling what will happen if the radical left gets another term at the helm.
