name: John Gibbs
subject: Impeach Biden!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress
body:
Dear Peter --

RINO Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald Trump.

Once elected to Congress, **I promise to impeach Joe Biden.**

Thanks to Joe Biden's betrayal, Mexican drug cartels, Islamic terrorists, and human traffickers poured into the country.

**If aiding and abetting an invasion of illegal aliens, terrorists, and drug dealers into America isn't a high crime and misdemeanor, I don't know what is.**

Do you support impeaching Joe Biden?

**[If you do, I hope you will join me by signing your"Impeach Joe Biden" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r) President Trump endorsed my campaign for Congress in Michigan because Peter Meijer represents everything wrong with the D.C. swamp.

**[So, after you sign your petition, will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign to remove pro-impeachment RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in $10 or $25 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r)?**

Your generous contribution will ensure that my campaign has the resources to run TV, radio, and social media ads exposing Peter Meijer for the Never Trump turncoat that he is.

Peter Meijer loves to grandstand on the fake news media echoing Nancy Pelosi talking points.

**I'm not running for Congress to make friends with the fake news media and the swamp lobbyists.**

I'm in this race to put America First. ALWAYS.

And that means voting to impeach Joe Biden over Sleepy Joe's dereliction of duty at the southern border. [_**SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT AWAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r) **Thanks to President Trump's America First immigration policies, our nation saw the most secure southern border in history.**

The Biden regime threw that all away on purpose because Democrats believe illegal aliens provide a massive pool of potential new voters.

Congress must impeach, convict, and remove Joe Biden from office for turning the southern border into a sieve allowing drugs, crime, and COVID to pour into the country.

I'm ready for this fight.

**That's why President Trump endorsed my campaign.**

But I need to know if you are with me.

**[If you support holding Joe Biden accountable for permitting a record invasion of illegal aliens across our southern border, I hope you will immediately sign your"Impeach Joe Biden" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r) And after you sign your petition, please join President Trump in supporting my campaign **[by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r).**

Peter Meijer chose poorly in stabbing conservatives in the back to support Nancy Pelosi's impeachment witch hunt.

If conservatives want to stop Joe Biden's rogue regime from allowing an invasion at the southern border, Republicans MUST elect a majority of America First fighters.

RINO Peter Meijer suffers from a massive case of Trump Derangement Syndrome.

That's why I need your help to make sure pro-impeachment RINO Peter Meijer's first term in Congress is his last.

**I need your help to prove that Never Trumper Peter Meijer voted to impeach the wrong President.**

Donald Trump put America First and secured our southern border.

The Biden regime sent out an engraved invitation for illegal aliens, Islamic terrorists, and Mexican drug cartels to violate our border with impunity.

Stand with me in this fight by **[signing your"Impeach Joe Biden" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r).**

**[And after you sign, join President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $2,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r).**

Polls show Americans rebelling against Joe Biden's open borders, America Last agenda.

You and I sit on the verge of holding Joe Biden accountable for lawless behavior.

But that means removing RINO Peter Meijer from Congress - after Meijer marched along with Nancy Pelosi in the January 6 impeachment hoax.

**[Please join President Trump in supporting my campaign with your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r).**

Sincerely,

John Gibbs

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59477116:Wi6nIdHNR:m:1:2365227053:A6D72DC31C41275278CD3B00171D0274:r)

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: Pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40652965/325318655/218260425?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113ftva_DKJ_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMzMGVhOC1hNzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcuKVP4chR7yr1ygyjJ6gIXnGJfYB5yWT7QJfCd9mdA=)
---
Friend, My dad grew up in segregated Arkansas, and my mom in redlined Chicago. One of my first memories is of them teaching me about the civil rights movement — specifically, Rosa Parks’ refusal to back down in the face of injustice. My parents always took my brother and me with them when they voted, and would warn us of literacy tests and poll taxes that were used to suppress the votes of our grandparents. Now, we’re seeing states close polling places in Black neighborhoods, gerrymander maps to dilute the vote of people of color, and impose over-the-top voter ID laws. **I’m calling on the U.S. Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act __immediately__ to protect our democracy from these attacks.** Each day, it seems like we face a new assault on civil rights — and I know that can get exhausting. But for Rosa Parks, John Lewis, and the generations coming after us, we’re going to keep fighting. In solidarity, Dr. Kermit P.S. One of my opponents is GOP assemblyman Kevin Kiley, who ran against Governor Newsom in the recall last year. Kiley was one of a handful of legislators who voted against requiring polling places to offer same-day voter registration. [Can you chip in any amount to help me flip this seat and prevent an anti-democracy candidate from winning?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40652966/325318656/218260425?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220113ftva_DKJ_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMzMGVhOC1hNzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcuKVP4chR7yr1ygyjJ6gIXnGJfYB5yWT7QJfCd9mdA=)

clean_body: | = Friend, My dad grew up in segregated Arkansas, and my mom in redlined Chicago. One of my first memories is of them teaching me about the civil rights movement — specifically, Rosa Parks’ refusal to back down in the face of injustice. My parents always took my brother and me with them when they voted, and would warn us of literacy tests and poll taxes that were used to suppress the votes of our grandparents. Now, we’re seeing states close polling places in Black neighborhoods, gerrymander maps to dilute the vote of people of color, and impose over-the-top voter ID laws. I’m calling on the U.S. Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act immediately to protect our democracy from these attacks. Each day, it seems like we face a new assault on civil rights — and I know that can get exhausting. But for Rosa Parks, John Lewis, and the generations coming after us, we’re going to keep fighting. In solidarity, Dr. Kermit P.S. One of my opponents is GOP assemblyman Kevin Kiley, who ran against Governor Newsom in the recall last year. Kiley was one of a handful of legislators who voted against requiring polling places to offer same-day voter registration. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Whitmer incited a violent mob at the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Did Whitmer forget that she incited a violent mob at the Capitol?I know because I was there. | | | |
---
| | | Peter: When Governor Whitmer last year declared, “we are a nation of laws, not mobs,” she conveniently forgot that **she incited** [_a violent mob at the State Capitol in Lansing_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=12f8e3238b&e=0636b97700) in 2012.

**I know because I was there.**

In 2012, I was the senior executive officer to the Field Commander of the State Police responsible for the mobilization and protection of the State Capitol and the employees who worked there.

I had just witnessed the massive destruction of the Wisconsin Capitol in 2011 and the [hundreds of thousands of dollars in damage](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=e53e725812&e=0636b97700) that was done. My task was to mobilize as many troopers as needed to protect the safety of our legislators and capitol staff, as well as protect the State Capitol property.

_**Little did I know all my efforts and planning would be sabotaged by Gretchen Whitmer.**_

The issue of the day was Right to Work legislation which had just passed. It would prevent forced mandatory dues for workers and would expand job opportunities in Michigan. It was legislation that was good for Michigan.

But for Gretchen Whitmer, it was an opportunity to grandstand.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5363d515eb&e=0636b97700)
---
| After **Whitmer incited the crowd, yelling into a microphone, “We’re gonna fight! Are you?”** she later bragged about how she “threw open the doors of the Capitol” to let thousands of screaming protesters in to disrupt the process.

I had completed many days of planning to mobilize 500 troopers to protect the Capitol. I had no idea that Gretchen Whitmer would endanger every citizen, employee, Representative and Senator by her open disregard for safety and breach of security of the Capitol.

To me, Governor Gretchen Whitmer takes the cake with her hypocrisy. Raging about insurrections when she openly endangered security protocols with raging rhetoric inciting the crowd and then bragged about it on television.

**She was pushing mob rule then, not legitimate government.**

I agree with her statement that we are a nation of laws, not mobs. _The difference is, I believe it._

**Whitmer and her hypocrisy need to go._It’s time for a level headed leader in the Governor’s office, not a grandstanding career politician._**

Won’t you join me?

Consider sending a donation today. **[$100, $50, $25. Any amount helps](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=73fbaa1c98&e=0636b97700).**

Do you agree it is time we _Dump Whitmer_?

Please help today.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---

There are a lot of conspiracy theories that Antifa was at the helm of the Capitol insurrection, aided by some shady federal agents. These rumors have been spread by members of the Treason Caucus like Matt Gaetz, Paul Gosar, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and many more. **Here's what we know: this is a lie.**

Another thing we know is that these "alternative facts" are dangerous and shift blame away from the Republicans that allowed the violence to occur on January 6, 2021. Whether it be convincing people that the insurrection was nothing but a peaceful demonstration of love or denying its existence outright, there are elected officials fighting at every stop to hide the truth.

**We must stand up for the truth and hold the Treason Caucus accountable for the role they played in the coup.**

subject: Inflation is at 7%
body:
You feel the squeeze
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FqYd0thP0DpRpWg5eivdDSPipldw1eod1P9oW7Ti0_VJAe7607zyGdoUyBZp59WHdGlcJCRXY10YyjYESg37h0_HO_y81-COyIn8iQkOfKnKd_9KWDbsJdMMlQx-exwAb-BO3sWxw-kmjdEi28n2TCJGhdGlIIAM&c=CzmxgmaeuprlH99s63eizyAc7pSuv4aUz3eHLLuGIEhsv9TYe_KQOw==&ch=OLWt1NYQGeD68lidLdbED0SUpjQQ7dSafFu3G9QpSzTJO5NR8edsuQ==)
---
|
---
|
# Feeling the pain of bad policy
---
You've seen the headlines, but unfortunately you are feeling the pain from the biggest surge in inflation in four decades.
Overall, inflation rose 7% over last year, and this is the sixth straight month that it has been over 6%.
But these are just statistics. You know the squeeze you are feeling every time you go to buy groceries. And heaven forbid if you need to replace your car right now or are trying to buy a home.
Inflation is nothing more than a tax to pay for the spending spree in Washington, and while it hurts all of us, it is especially devastating to those who struggle to put food on the table. It is even a heavier burden on the poor.
For months, Democrats have claimed that inflation is "transitory." That's just deflection. In fact, it appears that inflation is here to stay for a while, something the Federal Reserve chair Jerome H. Powell said could have a disastrous and lasting impact on our economy and livelihoods. He was quoted in the Washington Post:
"If inflation does become too persistent, if these high levels of inflation become too entrenched in the economy or people's thinking, that will lead to much tighter monetary policy from us, and that could lead to a recession and that would be bad for workers," Fed Chair Jerome H. Powell told lawmakers.
There is simply too much money circulating for too few goods. We must resolve supply chain issues and stop the reckless spending in Washington. If we don't stop this now, inflation will become more difficult to reduce. Contribute to my campaign now and send me to Congress. Consider it an investment in our future. Together let's retake our country and more importantly, our economy. Thank you for your support.
---

clean_body: You feel the squeeze | | | | == | | Feeling the pain of bad policy You've seen the headlines, but unfortunately you are feeling the pain from the biggest surge in inflation in four decades. Overall, inflation rose 7% over last year, and this is the sixth straight month that it has been over 6%. But these are just statistics. You know the squeeze you are feeling every time you go to buy groceries. And heaven forbid if you need to replace your car right now or are trying to buy a home. Inflation is nothing more than a tax to pay for the spending spree in Washington, and while it hurts all of us, it is especially devastating to those who struggle to put food on the table. It is even a heavier burden on the poor. For months, Democrats have claimed that inflation is "transitory." That's just deflection. In fact, it appears that inflation is here to stay for a while, something the Federal Reserve chair Jerome H. Powell said could have a disastrous and lasting impact on our economy and livelihoods. He was quoted in the Washington Post: "If inflation does become too persistent, if these high levels of inflation become too entrenched in the economy or people's thinking, that will lead to much tighter monetary policy from us, and that could lead to a recession and that would be bad for workers," Fed Chair Jerome H. Powell told lawmakers. There is simply too much money circulating for too few goods. We must resolve supply chain issues and stop the reckless spending in Washington. If we don't stop this now, inflation will become more difficult to reduce. Contribute to my campaign now and send me to Congress. Consider it an investment in our future. Together let's retake our country and more importantly, our economy. Thank you for your support. | | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker about how inflation is impacting your life. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | COLORADO WILDFIRE - HOW YOU CAN HELP | Here are a number of places where you can contribute goods, funding, or even volunteer your time: | == | YMCA is accepting donations (blankets, pillows, dog and cat food) at their location: 2800 Dagny Way, Lafayette, CO 80026. You can follow their updates for what supplies are needed: | | == | | | Boulder Office of Emergency Management | * You can donate money, discounted services, or sign up to volunteer through the == form here: . | == | | | Airbnb Open Homes Program | Sign up to offer shelter. The Airbnb Open Homes Program will notify you if your offer is needed. | | == | | | Volunteer to help with clean-up and rebuilding | If you want to volunteer for ongoing clean-up and rebuilding efforts, check Samaritan's Purse below: | == | | Current Shelter Resources | KDVR has provided a list of current shelters that are available. | == | | | Animal Assistance | | == | == | | | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: My Trump-hating opponent thinks you're a terrorist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Never forget what this RINO said about you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066065?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=ba0089b45e&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

On January 6, peaceful Trump supporters gathered to hear the President speak. Some of these Trump supporters eventually made their way to the Capitol, where they protested the brazen **_THEFT_** of the 2020 “election,” the greatest fraud ever perpetrated against our nation.

At the Capitol, undercover FBI agents and informants incited a riot. Capitol Police officers let Trump supporters into the building and then acted as if they had broken in.

For the crime of being a Trump supporter and protesting the illegal Democrat _**COUP**_ , Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt— _an unarmed woman_ —was assassinated in cold blood. Her killer is celebrated as a hero by Democrats and RINOs alike.

Ashli wasn’t the only Trump supporter murdered that day—video has emerged of the Capitol Police killing another woman, Roseanne Boyland, apparently _beating her to death_. The other Trump supporters who died that day also suffered mysterious deaths.

Before January 6th, my worthless traitor opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, announced that he would certify the fraudulent “election” results, falsely claiming that President Trump’s election fraud lawsuits had been “soundly defeated.” Swamp Scum Steve declared that we have to “accept the results.”

After the Fed-incited riot at the Capitol, Deep State Steve fully blamed President Trump for the chaos, calling it a “deadly attack.” He accused the President of making a “locker room speech” to get his supporters “stoked up” to storm the Capitol.

Womack belittled Trump supporters—his own constituents—as “extremists,” and referred to claims of election fraud as “a whole lot of promises and expectations that just simply were not true,” ignoring the overwhelming evidence that the 2020 election was stolen.

**Deep State Steve called President Trump “somebody who basically doesn’t have regard for the Constitution, or the rule of law, where it comes to protecting [his] grip on power.”**

Womack went on the local news and bloviated that “this is not who we are,” _sounding more like Michelle Obama than a conservative Arkansan._

He wouldn’t stop smearing the Trump supporters protesting the 2020 Coup, calling them “just as un-American and unpatriotic as anything I've ever seen.”

**Who does Steve represent? It certainly isn’t us.**

He called my good friend Richard “Bigo” Barnett, one of his very own constituents, whom you know as the legend who kicked back at Pelosi’s ill-gotten desk, a “sickening embarrassment,” adding that he “must be held accountable and face the fullest extent of the law.”

Where was Womack as the blood drained from Ashli Babbitt and Roseanne Boyland’s bodies? He was rewarding the demonic Capitol Police with more funding, calling these cold-blooded killers “brave.”

Where was Womack as Trump supporters from grandmothers to disabled veterans were rounded up and tossed into the DC Gulag, where they are _still _being held in solitary confinement and _tortured_?

Take Ryan Samsel, for instance.

_Sadistic_ prison guards came into Ryan’s cell one night, zip-tied his hands behind his back so tightly that they _took the skin off_ of his wrists, _threw _him to the concrete floor and _beat his face_ _in_. His right eye was damaged so severely that it’s _permanently blinded_. His nose and jaw were broken, and he will suffer seizures for the rest of his life.

Remember: Antifa and BLM looted, burned, raped, and murdered across _dozens_ of cities last summer, and _not a single person was ever punished_.

Now, rather than fight for the January 6th Patriots’ civil rights, Deep State Steve voted with _Nancy Pelosi_ to create a 9/11-style commission to serve the Democrats’ _witch hunt_ and perpetuate their “insurrection” _hoax_ , _legitimizing _the treatment of Trump supporters as terrorists.

**RINOs like him will happily toss us in gulags and throw away the keys. It’s _us_ against _them_ , and he’s with _them_.**

Steve Womack called January 6th a “national embarrassment.”

**The only national embarrassment I see is the treason of a so-called Republican Congressman aiding and abetting a criminal coup, facilitating the Democrats’ theft of the United States Government.

The only national embarrassment I see is the pure evil of a so-called Republican Congressman willfully turning a blind eye to the torture and murder of innocent Trump supporters in our nation’s capital.**

_**Deep State Steve is the real national embarrassment. He is a disgrace to the Constitution, to America, and to Arkansas.**_

**[_Punish him by __electing_ _ me.

Send this vile traitor packing and elect a real Fighter who will NEVER turn his back on you_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=35c9e818fa&e=eda539b26b)****.**

[**_Help me send Deep __State_ _ Steve a message that his time is UP -- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=02f2c047dc&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**STOP** the politicized Regime DOJ from persecuting and ruining the lives of conservative Americans, not Wishy-Washy Wimps like Womack._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=06959dbdb1&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=6cbd56cce7&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

body:

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Twitter Bans Marjorie
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot:

We need your voice RIGHT NOW.
Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene has been
PERMANENTLY BANNED FROM TWITTER - for telling the truth about
Covid-19, Joe Biden, and Anthony Fauci.
You already know that Big Tech firms don't censor
Democrats. But understand - they also don't ban squishy,
corporate Republican politicians either. On any given day, there
are anti-Semites and anti-Christian bigots, criminals,
international tyrants, even terrorist groups that have Twitter
accounts.
But they are no threat to Silicon Valley or the D.C.
Establishment. Only outspoken, principled, patriotic American
conservatives are singled out for censorship.
The question now is: WHAT WILL WE DO ABOUT IT?
The House Freedom Fund will stand with Marjorie and
every conservative who stands up for the TRUTH.
If Big Tech socialists can censor the most
high-profile conservatives in the country - with national
platforms and millions of followers - other conservatives will
never have a chance to get their message out. The woke elite want
to turn America into a one-party state.
This isn't a double-standard. It's a "single"
standard: AGREE WITH BIG TECH OR FORFEIT YOUR FREE SPEECH RIGHTS!
It's the standard we will all be living under soon
if conservatives do not stand and fight. Can we count on you?
Help us send a message to the establishments of both
parties that we will not be silenced. We will not be bullied.
Like Marjorie, we will not lie for them. The record is clear:

Vaccine mandates are illegal.
Masking is ineffective.
School closures have been a disaster.
China and Fauci lied about the origins of the
virus.

We knew all this a year ago, but Democrats ignored
the science. They ignored parents, voters, and small business
owners. They ignored the rest of the world, happily moving on
from the pandemic. The Left is only changing their tune now
because it's an election year, and they know they are afraid of
getting crushed in the mid-terms.

We need to make sure they are! But not just them.

Before Republicans can defeat Democrats in November,
conservatives have to beat moderate, corporate Republicans in GOP
primaries across the country.
Those are the races where voices like Marjorie
Taylor Greene's are most important. That's why she's being
silenced NOW. So we now have to speak up for the principles and
the candidates she fights for.

We have to fight back, as long and as hard as it
takes, to rescue our country from the Democrats, the Tech
overlords, and the woke elites who want to erase our Constitution
and turn our republic into a socialist tyranny.
We are making the maximum contribution allowed by
law to Majorie's campaign, and we will do even more to support
her and other like-minded conservative fighters with your
generous support.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to support the principles of freedom that make America
great.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

PRIORITY HOUSE CANDIDATES

MARJORIE
TAYLOR GREENE

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The filibuster is still in danger… urgent action needed!
body:
_Breaking news: The Supreme Court overturned Biden’s OSHA vaccine mandate and upheld the CMS mandate._**[_See my statement about it & share!_](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** | |
---
Do you remember all of the crazy, convoluted, sleazy stuff that the Democrats did in order to pass Obamacare? Well, they’re at it again. This time with their bills intended to take over the nation’s elections.

This morning, Sen. Sinema spoke on the floor of the Senate and again defended the filibuster. However, the pressure on her must be immense. We cannot stop until this is 100% over, and it’s not there yet.

Please use our three AlignAct campaigns below to send, again, the strong and urgent message that the Senate must not change the filibuster.

**Even if you already used these campaigns – you can use them again! You can check to the box to send another email, post to social media again, and you can call again.**

_Note: There were a few of you who had some technical difficulties with the system, and we are working with AlignAct to solve them. It’s a new platform, and there are bound to be a few bugs at first._
** **
**If you should encounter problems today, please stop trying to use the system and just call.****The priority is to call Sens. Manchin and Sinema first, and then call your own Senators as well. The message is simply, “Save the Senate. Do not change the filibuster.”**
|
---
**CAMPAIGNS**
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
[**Save the Senate**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-y51KrK2WoJqYQ)****
This campaign targets Sens. Manchin and Sinema, encouraging them to stay strong in their support of the filibuster.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-nN_LJYuHd7fQJx6c_w)
[**Save the Filibuster, Save Our Elections!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
This campaign targets several Democrat Senators who signed a 2017 letter defending and supporting the filibuster.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
[**Dear Senators: Keep Your Promise to Protect the Filibuster!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
This campaign allows you to contact your own Senators, urging them both to defend the filibuster and to vote no on the election takeover bills.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._lKe9xCwNrV5atC-1iPDA)
|
---
This is an all hands on deck, five-alarm fire, we’re on the Titanic situation, and America needs you now. If you’ve already done something – do it again. If you haven’t yet taken action, do it today!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---

name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Thursday, January 13th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Thursday, January 13th, 2021**
Peter,
Yesterday was our first major deadline of the campaign, and we could not be more grateful for the support that we have received! Team Tom has raised $2.7M, officially entering the race just six months ago. We are proud to have grassroots support coming from all 23 Maryland counties and Baltimore City!
Our movement to build a better Maryland for all has support from a broad coalition of labor, business leaders and grassroots activists. We are incredibly grateful for everything that supporters like you have done to invest in our campaign and help us build this incredible momentum.
**Finally, we want to say thank you![ We hope you will join Team Tom for a special Thank You call this evening at 6:30 PM ET! To RSVP for the call, please click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654503/325328282/1277204250?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ5YTY0YS1hZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4yP0kHUuS9KOYfK1jjDCAJjTpUxkvqha3YZzNA3gfg=&emci=41cd5024-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ba49a64a-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
Thank you so much for your continued support of Tom Perez for Maryland, and we look forward to staying in touch.
Many thanks,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654504/325328283/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ5YTY0YS1hZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4yP0kHUuS9KOYfK1jjDCAJjTpUxkvqha3YZzNA3gfg=&emci=41cd5024-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ba49a64a-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
This week, Tom was joined by Congresswoman Grace Meng and Cecile Richards for a virtual fundraiser. Congresswoman Meng and Cecile Richards are key leaders and champions in the fight for women’s reproductive rights and we are so grateful to have them on **#TeamTom**.
* * *
**In the News**
**[African American leaders support Perez for Governor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654505/325328284/1053469183?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ5YTY0YS1hZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4yP0kHUuS9KOYfK1jjDCAJjTpUxkvqha3YZzNA3gfg=&emci=41cd5024-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ba49a64a-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
_“Tom’s life’s work has been to get stuff done and fight for justice and jobs. Which is why he has early endorsements from African American leaders from across Baltimore City and Maryland.”_
**[Tom Perez Raises $2.7 Million in Maryland Governor’s Race](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654506/325328285/422155223?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ5YTY0YS1hZTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4yP0kHUuS9KOYfK1jjDCAJjTpUxkvqha3YZzNA3gfg=&emci=41cd5024-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ba49a64a-ae74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
_“In his bid to become Maryland’s next Governor, Tom Perez has raised $2.7 million dollars, including contributions from all 23 counties and Baltimore City. The total includes dollars raised during the exploratory phase of his campaign. The report will show $1.5 million cash on hand. Tom officially launched his campaign just six months ago, in late June 2021.”_

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Join my effort to support restaurants in Silver Spring
body:

Hi friends, Yesterday marked the start of the 2022 Maryland Legislative Session. The Maryland General Assembly will be considering a lot of important legislation in the upcoming months. One of the most important things they can do right away is take up my proposal to waive the sales tax for restaurants for three months.
---
**[I am calling on Governor Hogan and the General Assembly to waive the sales tax in restaurants for three months.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkjfxhCXAfn_D1mityz8LI2tmVPRXW3zdbGZKrUX9Nn4pb_l7PvKf6VvA0CB-Nwm5sUELowEv-2J7WUeW-mImRHd1tBE6EW3iWjrmDCt7vcD50XqiDtZeuHLKm7Y6nOn3EWQYuYaqAhYCQ4qvlBMmbYDDp66yIQ4qj57KHMGtv7PgGIY9FI232SHn_iQMBIZK_tY8p5O6YwNz4hp3W1sW_c6f79B_FXo9qTOke-tHhwovNCaxF__gTRUQWMv5qs_Uh_2yOVGNrVn9INyRwjhLM3qQJFmIKu-BEd0D7sTUcPF1MZazMRULq2lMTOv8ey8VaVtmyJ-bQ3WvI61iPJzTmka3TljpFjt6_m2Pn-GzzVAA/3io/zLQWO3HPS9W1V0j7TWXrFA/h1/9MRszJXgfON4xf3NhHgACYIVD9zl6RB4fQFFu_R7j2w)****[Will you join me in this important effort?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkjfxhCXAfn_D1mityz8LI2tmVPRXW3zdbGZKrUX9Nn4pb_l7PvKf6VvA0CB-Nwm5sUELowEv-2J7WUeW-mImRHd1tBE6EW3iWjrmDCt7vcD50XqiDtZeuHLKm7Y6nOn3EWQYuYaqAhYCQ4qvlBMmbYrbD0zCWCf__OAeu_QzdVSOG-IOIz7hih5qAte1G-2fVv_NDS0P9V0nA1nWZzxhaDoA2EkvbdHfuI-9WJhw_3HljMgerV6TTrketU8TmNRKxncDAhqBCZ13yPtSUbByFi9CC4ythYI9V7GEBzQdetbUymxtvPtuQgXHA9DEyWDwPGIgFVa81HmFpLfV1ntcjt4tMNuYJ_lHsoXpLkPeBFoQ/3io/zLQWO3HPS9W1V0j7TWXrFA/h2/l0HTEeqrBc6aVLJs1mllkogy8vdujblYDTwbBjyV4rI)**

Even in 2022, Maryland is still dealing with the pandemic and its consequences. Far too many of our wonderful, locally-owned businesses have been destroyed, while others limp along. Waiving the sales tax for restaurants will put a few extra dollars back into the pockets of consumers and bring customers back into our downtown areas to shop in other stores. This tax relief will also come during the quietest, slowest time of the year -- when restaurants need help the most, and when outdoor dining is less feasible due to the cold. It's clear that we're still in a crisis, and these businesses and their patrons need our help. **That's why the Maryland General Assembly must provide three months of desperately-needed relief for small business owners.** **[If you agree that the restaurants in Silver Spring deserve our support, send a letter to your state representatives and show your support today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkjfxhCXAfn_D1mityz8LI2tmVPRXW3zdbGZKrUX9Nn4pb_l7PvKf6VvA0CB-Nwm5sUELowEv-2J7WUeW-mImRHd1tBE6EW3iWjrmDCt7vcD50XqiDtZeuHLKm7Y6nOn3EWQYuYaqAhYCQ4qvlBMmbYuJMc9cm_XSVvzD0Lvogm4oj4jEKMbDSK0Cl_tYiCWrO270cM3C8uHgRgGqwcquXFsGA9gKKz-_n6QBudjD1ooOjdGmCZhN6XW-dPY_jsT5VFADtGaCNDzQYvjUV-eNmH6fx7AW17bgcV_l5_BrHrkF-Y16AQT140ugvTBUOcalgl7zlS22GLhvG6Sb1RVpB0U1EycwLFACtCjP_bifZpAw/3io/zLQWO3HPS9W1V0j7TWXrFA/h4/Sq73PT4VUZMTITTWBHQkgHVrAukemrvD1JS2ojfrYGI)**

Even in 2022, Maryland is still dealing with the pandemic and its consequences. Far too many of our wonderful, locally-owned businesses have been destroyed, while others limp along. This tax relief will also come during the quietest, slowest time of the year -- when restaurants need help the most, and when outdoor dining is less feasible due to the cold. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88906/images/The_Atlanta_Journal-Constitution_logo.svg.png] 'Sneak attack': New map pairs Greene's district with outraged Cobb residentsDid you see the note Marcus sent earlier this week?
The newly-approved district maps make Marjorie Taylor Greene's seat MUCH more competitive.
Our team is working around-the-clock to reach new voters in the district to tell them about Democrat Marcus Flowers. This voter outreach will be CRUCIAL to us winning in November. So if you can, click here to fund our get-out-the-vote operation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD]

From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene's district just got more competitive
Sent on Tuesday, January 11, 2022 at 3:05 p.m.
Team,
Did you know that the Georgia State Legislature passed a map that is going to make Marjorie Taylor Greene’s district SIGNIFICANTLY more Democratic? This means my campaign for Congress now has an even better chance to flip this district.
These new district lines mean that thousands of new Democratic and undecided voters are now going to be in play -- and we’re launching a bold new initiative to reach these voters wherever they are. If we’re successful, we WILL flip this seat and defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.
We can’t let this opportunity go to waste. Will you chip in to my campaign today to ensure that we have the resources to reach these new voters, defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, and restore sanity to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD]
This is a huge momentum boost for our campaign, and I know that we can get this done.
Talk soon,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 725
Bremen, GA 30110
United States

body:
Our first fundraising goal of 2022
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654958/325330264/954943298?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.13_b1_ohq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWFhMDE4OC1iMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXJ43iaIuWgoOHtRr92X9z9UkaUtx0ekVIPcVojBurU=)** Hey folks, Now that it’s 2022, all eyes are on our district in Arizona because several far-right opponents have jumped into our race, and are working overtime to defeat us. We need to kick our campaign into high gear and prepare to push back against their attacks. **[We’re setting a goal of raising $6,000 by Sunday to help us stay on track to push back against the attacks we know are coming our way. The best way our people-powered campaign can compete with the extremists running in Tom’s district is by building a huge grassroots movement. Can you chip in right away and help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654959/325330265/954943298?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.13_b1_ohq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWFhMDE4OC1iMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXJ43iaIuWgoOHtRr92X9z9UkaUtx0ekVIPcVojBurU=)** | ********[Chip In!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40654960/325330266/954943298?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.13_b1_ohq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWFhMDE4OC1iMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXJ43iaIuWgoOHtRr92X9z9UkaUtx0ekVIPcVojBurU=)********

subject: Biden is the border’s Trafficker-in-Chief
body:
Our leaders are nowhere to be found, Trafficker-in-Chief Biden and Border Czar Harris still won’t take responsibility for their disastrous border crisis.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RptbKrqLLAJsclAvtkV0CLDZMIPx9lYdUk78N5xm9N8Qlm9LRllUwKhYXwVBu6lZTWhMXhYnhUbPROQmYTspaihJU0DyiJvzrygyUfOy_fxJH1bcDDWhKDFdd7-cGRd3qF6VUczxYvNFoH9JuOmLzxh5BzGFgGK1be8Avdw_HPDH-qh8nRga-cWb01GDnPoh&c=2_gM84kJB5UCw4Jga1h3-39boDgQG9LH5YOddCxGBcnLgRXZijaBsw==&ch=tOwXh9tVVFSGoewNAu_3NkYj_oPmus4FRC1iecZlXHhjRKVLOoDbGw==)

| Friend,
Our leaders are nowhere to be found, Trafficker-in-Chief Biden and Border Czar Harris still won't take responsibility for their disastrous border crisis.
Kat sees through the lies of the biased media and knows the truth about the incompetent Biden administration. The Left is turning every American town and community into a border town. The Biden administration has refused to visit the border, or even acknowledge the crisis they created.
Enough is enough. When the conservative movement takes back the House, we will secure our border. We need you in this fight to help us make it happen.
---

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LGqbMy4I3HOGGx3js0T_Pz2rWMvhFhZu5VjqqxZmgf8TEbga-VDdzgCjJovU7LSuTscFkV0Ne634orroBnXJPAijbeNP-MydK9kBdlZEV1nu7M-S3TU4LOXS8TMxhERvM8OG7I1sAsVNIgq6vxe7e5nQx0rvJcKrRh_e86fuYYoqS7UIlaf0Q==&c=frFJlEPx8gYkfDWyk61wcNHrfaRQX7UNR96lnWJmZF5ouODY0yBTug==&ch=0NnR8EOOGtwE-580PFSdSjGtqTGIvY_bhyTibrQtvKlqBXj5xw-hXA==)
---
| Peter,
---
| The land of Mar a Lago, Governor DeSantis, and ruby red FL-01 isn't like the lockdown dystopias of New York or California...
Here in the Sunshine State of Florida, we pride ourselves on FREEDOM!
---
| | | [KEEP FLORIDA FREE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LGqbMy4I3HOGGx3js0T_Pz2rWMvhFhZu5VjqqxZmgf8TEbga-VDdzgCjJovU7LSuTscFkV0Ne634orroBnXJPAijbeNP-MydK9kBdlZEV1nu7M-S3TU4LOXS8TMxhERvM8OG7I1sAsVNIgq6vxe7e5nQx0rvJcKrRh_e86fuYYoqS7UIlaf0Q==&c=frFJlEPx8gYkfDWyk61wcNHrfaRQX7UNR96lnWJmZF5ouODY0yBTug==&ch=0NnR8EOOGtwE-580PFSdSjGtqTGIvY_bhyTibrQtvKlqBXj5xw-hXA==)
---
| So while other states rush right back into the COVID lockdown and mandate mania, I'm going to keep up the fight to make sure the political theater and Fauci-fueled paranoia doesn't come to my proud home state.
I will continue to fight against their medical apartheid vaccine mandates, against school closures, against children being muzzled in masks, and against ANY protocol that strips freedom from Floridians. That's our approach here in the Sunshine State - [l](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LGqbMy4I3HOGGx3js0T_Pz2rWMvhFhZu5VjqqxZmgf8TEbga-VDdzgCjJovU7LSuTscFkV0Ne634orroBnXJPAijbeNP-MydK9kBdlZEV1nu7M-S3TU4LOXS8TMxhERvM8OG7I1sAsVNIgq6vxe7e5nQx0rvJcKrRh_e86fuYYoqS7UIlaf0Q==&c=frFJlEPx8gYkfDWyk61wcNHrfaRQX7UNR96lnWJmZF5ouODY0yBTug==&ch=0NnR8EOOGtwE-580PFSdSjGtqTGIvY_bhyTibrQtvKlqBXj5xw-hXA==)[et's keep this state free!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LGqbMy4I3HOGGx3js0T_Pz2rWMvhFhZu5VjqqxZmgf8TEbga-VDdzgCjJovU7LSuTscFkV0Ne634orroBnXJPAijbeNP-MydK9kBdlZEV1nu7M-S3TU4LOXS8TMxhERvM8OG7I1sAsVNIgq6vxe7e5nQx0rvJcKrRh_e86fuYYoqS7UIlaf0Q==&c=frFJlEPx8gYkfDWyk61wcNHrfaRQX7UNR96lnWJmZF5ouODY0yBTug==&ch=0NnR8EOOGtwE-580PFSdSjGtqTGIvY_bhyTibrQtvKlqBXj5xw-hXA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010LGqbMy4I3HOGGx3js0T_Pz2rWMvhFhZu5VjqqxZmgf8TEbga-VDdzgCjJovU7LSuTscFkV0Ne634orroBnXJPAijbeNP-MydK9kBdlZEV1nu7M-S3TU4LOXS8TMxhERvM8OG7I1sAsVNIgq6vxe7e5nQx0rvJcKrRh_e86fuYYoqS7UIlaf0Q==&c=frFJlEPx8gYkfDWyk61wcNHrfaRQX7UNR96lnWJmZF5ouODY0yBTug==&ch=0NnR8EOOGtwE-580PFSdSjGtqTGIvY_bhyTibrQtvKlqBXj5xw-hXA==)
---
| Others like "Florida's Fauci" Rebekah Jones want us to take a different approach...
They're desperate to bring tyranny and fear-mongering to our sunny shores, even if they have to lie about the data and smear a great Governor to get there!
So don't let them get their way \- if we want to keep Florida free, we're going to have to FIGHT for it!

Here in the Sunshine State of Florida, we pride ourselves on FREEDOM! | | | == | So while other states rush right back into the COVID lockdown and mandate mania, I'm going to keep up the fight to make sure the political theater and Fauci-fueled paranoia doesn't come to my proud home state. I will continue to fight against their medical apartheid vaccine mandates, against school closures, against children being muzzled in masks, and against ANY protocol that strips freedom from Floridians. That's our approach here in the Sunshine State - == | == | Others like "Florida's Fauci" Rebekah Jones want us to take a different approach... They're desperate to bring tyranny and fear-mongering to our sunny shores, even if they have to lie about the data and smear a great Governor to get there! name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: My plan to Drain the Lansing Swamp once and for all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Crooked politicians continue to abuse their power | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5a9090179b&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Peter,

The Lansing Swamp is corrupt. _**We all know it.**_

Time and time again, career politicians and insiders in both parties choose to take orders from special interests and advance their own personal ambitions rather than representing the Michigan citizens who elected them. Michigan [ranks dead last in the nation](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=67d8c15edd&e=fe4b890356) for government transparency and ethics \- **_we deserve better._**

Like you, I am FED UP with politicians breaking their promises, profiting from holding office, and making deals behind closed doors. I'm not running for Governor to appease the Lansing insiders - _I am running to fight for the people and shake up the status quo that has failed us all._

**It is our movement's mission to END the culture of corruption in Lansing and finally return Michigan's government to WE THE PEOPLE! **

[**_I have a plan to do just that. _**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=3d1a64b9a8&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d8839cd747&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Today, Michigan politicians can hide behind secret slush funds, can vote to enrich their own business interests, and some can even take unlimited campaign finance contributions. We must end these perks for politicians and restore transparency, accountability and integrity to our government.

My plan calls for:
* Expanding the Freedom of Information Act to the Legislative and Executive Branches
* Strengthening the current Freedom of Information Act
* Ending the "Whitmer Campaign Finance Fake Loophole"
* Passing transparent lobbying rules that disclose every lobbying expenditure
* Implementing a five year lobbying ban for former state legislators
* Enacting personal financial disclosure for all state candidates
* Strengthening and enforcing Conflict of Interest laws
* Prohibiting legislators from coordinating with 501(c)4's to use as slush funds
* Passing real Michigan Economic Development Corporation reform

Read my full plan at [GarrettforMichigan.com/transparency](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=532437c604&e=fe4b890356)

---
| [Read My 'Michigan Sunshine Plan 2.0'](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=0cd960e427&e=fe4b890356 "Read My 'Michigan Sunshine Plan 2.0'")
---
| Gretchen Whitmer promised reforms to open up our government, but failed to deliver. As soon as she got into office, she abandoned her ['Sunshine Plan'](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=81e79987bf&e=fe4b890356), and has spent the last three years abusing her power, using shady slush funds, and covering up scandals in her administration.

Folks, you know that I never in a million years had planned on entering this dirty game of politics. Lansing is more corrupt than I had even imagined. But sitting on the sidelines and falling asleep at the wheel is how we got into this mess - and it is _**up to all of us to stand together and take our government back.**_

Thank you for being a part of this grassroots movement Peter. What we're building is unprecedented in Michigan - _**and we're just starting to shake things up. **_💪🏼❤️🇺🇸
---
| | The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many,

Garrett Soldano
Republican Candidate for Governor

* * *
---
| | _P.S._ \- I hope you can join us at an upcoming event in Kalamazoo, Jackson, Lansing or Houghton Lake - [details here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7a72e92c8d&e=fe4b890356)

_P.S.S._ \- if you have circulated petitions to get our campaign on the ballot and still have them in your possession, _please reach out to [Jon@GarrettforMichigan.com](mailto:jon@garrettformichigan.com?subject=Re%3A%20Petition%20Sheets)_ so we can get them back to our team!

---
| [Contribute](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=65266fe9fd&e=fe4b890356 "Contribute")
---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081
---
| Garrett Soldano for Michigan
1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=de66f6296c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=de66f6296c).

---

subject: Did you see the news?

body:
Our millionaire opponents are sinking money in this race.

Hi Team, it's John – Nan's campaign manager. Did you see the news yesterday? One of Nan's millionaire opponents is dumping $4 million of his own money into this race – on top of the corporate money that the GOP is already pumping into their campaigns. We have a real shot to put an end to the era of corruption in Columbus, but we really can't do it alone.
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to help us reach voters across the state and combat our millionare opponents?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655285/325331677/1971071300?refcode=nw_em_220113_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGI3Njc5Ny1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36u9pDWZPojv3_agctoD-TZgwO5_JTHUDDLfQWLpRfc=)**

\---Original Message from Team Nan---
We have to act fast, team:
**One of our two likely GOP opponents Jim Renacci just announced he’s giving his Ohio gubernatorial campaign _$4 million_ from his own personal wealth.**
Nan is the only non-millionaire candidate in this race and we don’t have a $4 million check on the way. But if enough supporters like you chip in $5, $10 or whatever you can afford, we’ll be able to stay on track to counter our GOP opponents.
**[Can you contribute $5 or whatever you can afford right now to respond to this massive cash infusion and give our campaign the resources we need to flip Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655287/325331679/1971071300?refcode=nw_em_220113_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGI3Njc5Ny1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36u9pDWZPojv3_agctoD-TZgwO5_JTHUDDLfQWLpRfc=)**
Right now, Jim Renacci is challenging Mike DeWine in the GOP primary and the latest polling shows he’s in the lead. But no matter who emerges as the GOP nominee, both candidates are personally wealthy and have given millions of dollars to their campaigns.
Both will be well-funded in the general election – and both would continue the same culture of corruption and failed leadership that’s allowed Ohio to fall behind.
But Nan doesn’t have millions of dollars to give to this campaign. She grew up in a working class, union household – and she’s running to make sure that Ohioans like her have access to good-paying jobs and opportunity.
**[Together, we can beat the millionaire candidates and elect a true champion for working families to lead Ohio. Chip in $5 right now to elect Nan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655288/325331680/1971071300?refcode=nw_em_220113_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGI3Njc5Ny1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36u9pDWZPojv3_agctoD-TZgwO5_JTHUDDLfQWLpRfc=)**

Team Nan

body:
Voting is a RIGHT

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655466/325332525/936309917?refcode=EM_C_220113VRFilibuster_VR_TEAM_30DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E2NWZjMy1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cTVzYNM3WnjChh9LRsn0gWdeuch8IW8ThIYWjhVUpo=&emci=a71858af-676e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3ca65fc3-b374-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)
Friends,
**Every eligible voter should be able to cast their ballot safely and easily. Full stop.**
This week, the Senate will debate easing filibuster rules in order to _**finally pass**_ stalled voting legislation that would require federal approval for new voting laws and would **STOP** harmful voter suppression efforts.
[**Voting rights are not toys for politicians to play with until they get their way. Sign our petition to demand Congress finally pass the Voting Rights Act and ensure voting rights are protected in every state!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655470/325332528/936309917?refcode=EM_C_220113VRFilibuster_VR_TEAM_30DO_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E2NWZjMy1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cTVzYNM3WnjChh9LRsn0gWdeuch8IW8ThIYWjhVUpo=&emci=a71858af-676e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3ca65fc3-b374-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655473/325332534/936309917?refcode=EM_C_220113VRFilibuster_VR_TEAM_30DO_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E2NWZjMy1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cTVzYNM3WnjChh9LRsn0gWdeuch8IW8ThIYWjhVUpo=&emci=a71858af-676e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3ca65fc3-b374-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655476/325332545/936309917?refcode=EM_C_220113VRFilibuster_VR_TEAM_30DO_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E2NWZjMy1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cTVzYNM3WnjChh9LRsn0gWdeuch8IW8ThIYWjhVUpo=&emci=a71858af-676e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3ca65fc3-b374-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)
As someone who spends each and every day ensuring the people of New Mexico can trust our elections, it astounds me that politicians in Washington can’t even agree on common-sense voting legislation. No matter what happens nationally, **I want you to know that I will be here to protect your vote.**
Onward,
Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver
New Mexico Secretary of State_
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655478/325332555/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_220113VRFilibuster_VR_TEAM_30DO_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E2NWZjMy1iMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cTVzYNM3WnjChh9LRsn0gWdeuch8IW8ThIYWjhVUpo=&emci=a71858af-676e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3ca65fc3-b374-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)**_

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: BREAKING NEWS - US Supreme Court strikes down President Biden's private employer vaccine mandate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please join me in supporting rights and freedoms for all Massachusetts citizens.
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
GREAT NEWS!
Earlier this afternoon, the United States Supreme Court sided with individual rights and liberty and struck down President Biden's vaccine mandate for private employers.
This is a tremendous victory for the American people, not to mention a positive step for our state's economic recovery. The Democrats' progressive agenda is obviously in complete disarray!
Here in Massachusetts, I have been consistent in my opposition to egregious government mandates that wrongfully take away the freedoms of our citizens.
The government does not have the right to mandate that citizens submit to medical treatment they do not approve of as a condition of their employment in a free and open society. Too many people, including many first responders and health care providers, have already lost their jobs and their livelihoods due to such mandates, and it's wrong.
I will continue to fight for individual rights and to oppose draconian government mandates throughout my campaign for Governor.
Thanks, as always, for your support.
Sincerely,
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor
---
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ao1dn-TirG2MJw0Xv2_XJ-QkajzNn6c3WT2UsTHiaDSdviiHxCA3QmSePthqTZI0C-baIO2PSWcO7FeduLIofWU134uLoEHzo8MAPCsTCViQIx-oOWnwub9Er7lFEGAiZqLFYXxAXs4wsE_j3eBzIg==&c=7C3FgksK11Tt48arpe9aynRpHe75nNSQmtSIrfjJ82L9AnNbM9qHjg==&ch=L1sk5hwnal4H81WjqRPw-1zog0VRI13F6bFI2dk3-MHwODnrVZqC3Q==)
---
---
|
---
---

I'm working hard every day to be your next Governor. We need someone to stand up for individual rights and liberties, and I pledge to do that. But, in order to get there, I need your help.
Will you please help our campaign? Please consider making a donation today:
---
---
| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ao1dn-TirG2MJw0Xv2_XJ-QkajzNn6c3WT2UsTHiaDSdviiHxCA3QiDhwrvG-son96z8tFkVhL6qCD-KxJlmNMk0Zd9OpaiV-0zJbvidYnOfIgozzPBiz21fRNvGCBEmsHEpTr0gO3LM3jUP2JoXydsv0_hU6MmR9Doe6pbmIpGi-kbXDLPfTQ==&c=7C3FgksK11Tt48arpe9aynRpHe75nNSQmtSIrfjJ82L9AnNbM9qHjg==&ch=L1sk5hwnal4H81WjqRPw-1zog0VRI13F6bFI2dk3-MHwODnrVZqC3Q==)

Thanks, as always, for your support!

name: Mike Collier
subject: Sharing an important campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hi there, I hope you’re having a good week! I wanted to send you a quick note today to share some important campaign updates: I'm proud to announce **Erin Mincberg Spiegel** as Senior Strategist and **Ali S. Zaidi** as Campaign Manager for Team Collier. They are true Texans who know every inch of this state and know its people. With them at the helm, we _will_ defeat Dan Patrick. With the March 1st primary less than seven weeks away, I know we’re all feeling the pressure to do everything in our power to win so we can flip this seat in November. But this grassroots team — full of passionate folks from across Texas and the rest of the country — has shown true strength, generosity, and perseverance. I’m simply blown away. This campaign has the team, the resources, and the experience to defeat Dan Patrick and take back our beloved Texas. I’m so honored that y’all are fighting with us. [**As a member of our team, you are the heart and soul of this campaign. So, I want to know what’s on your mind. Will you take a few minutes to fill out this short priorities survey? I believe good leadership is grounded in good listening, so it’s important to me that I hear directly from you:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655865/325334181/-308632484?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220113_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY0NmMyYS1iNTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dhm_ISBfhpNQ2EBp0aLgfc8UCZq3bWBtTNAudXkFZBQ=&emci=b6615953-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=11646c2a-b574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7689298) | [TAKE OUR 2022 PRIORITIES SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655866/325334182/-308632484?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220113_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY0NmMyYS1iNTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dhm_ISBfhpNQ2EBp0aLgfc8UCZq3bWBtTNAudXkFZBQ=&emci=b6615953-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=11646c2a-b574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7689298)
---
I am so appreciative to have you on board as our March primary nears. This race is going to be a tight one — but working together, I know we’ll continue to build the momentum we need to win.
Thank you and take care,
– Mike
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States **[www.collierfortexas.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655867/325334183/-391745509?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220113_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY0NmMyYS1iNTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dhm_ISBfhpNQ2EBp0aLgfc8UCZq3bWBtTNAudXkFZBQ=&emci=b6615953-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=11646c2a-b574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7689298) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40655868/325334184/-37390472?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220113_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY0NmMyYS1iNTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dhm_ISBfhpNQ2EBp0aLgfc8UCZq3bWBtTNAudXkFZBQ=&emci=b6615953-b474-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=11646c2a-b574-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7689298)** | Paid for by the Collier Committee

Friend,

The radical left-wing media is already showing who they want to destroy in 2022. I'm here to warn you NOW about their plans to destroy these TOP 4 targets:
> **#4: Republicans**
This is a given, but be prepared for it to get even worse as they start to call Republicans, terrorists or racists.
> **#3: Comedians**
The regime in charge of the media cannot allow for any deviations from the socialist narrative. Joe Rogan, Tim Dillon, and Dave Chappelle all represent a threat to the Establishment Media. As champions of free speech, the left-wing media will seek to destroy them.
> **#2: Parents**
Lenin (a Soviet era communist) said in order to bring about total domination you must control education. The radicals in the media will continue their war on parents.
> **#1: Unvaccinated**
The unvaccinated will be the excuse and scapegoat for the failures of vaccines and mandates. The rhetoric here may get very dangerous.

I am warning you, but I am also asking for you to support the Media Research Center (MRC) to expose the radical bias in the media. It's no longer the news corporations. It's also collusion with the White House and Big Tech.

I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

**Thanks to our efforts exposing bias in the media, 90% of Americans do not TRUST the media as a reliable source of information. **

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.
_**Here 's how MRC exposes the fake news media:**_

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.
* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.
* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization recording the media 24/7, identifying lies, exposing false media coverage, and holding the media accountable.

Our efforts have led to reporters being terminated for fake news reporting, major news publications retracting false statements, apologies from news personalities, and more.

Aramis Ayala is an award-winning advocate for justice reform and human rights. As Florida’s first Black State Attorney, she has devoted more than two decades to public service and building safer, healthier communities. Aramis’s unflinching commitment to justice earned national headlines when she went head-to-head against former governor Rick Scott to oppose the death penalty. She has successfully established innovative pre-trial diversion programs, published a historic Brady list of questionable police, advanced public transparency, and accountability of law enforcement, halted pre-trial deportations, and expanded support for survivors of domestic violence and human trafficking. Her work has won accolades from the Florida ACLU’s Campaign for Criminal Justice Reform, and the Southern Poverty Law Center. An educator, cancer survivor, and mother of two, Aramis is running for Congress to deliver a bold, forward-focused vision that restores public trust and guarantees an equitable future for all of us.

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Vaccine Passports Have Arrived in Minnesota
body:
| Peter -- Minneapolis and Saint Paul are now requiring businesses like restaurants, bars, theaters, sports venues and more to require vaccine passports for their patrons. This is abhorrent, criminal, out of touch, anti-science, and unacceptable on every level. With continually mounting evidence that Omicron is less deadly, unfazed by vaccines, and soon to be on the decline, career politicians make this atrocious move that will deliver yet another blow to struggling businesses and families while having no impact on public health. **This criminal abuse of power has to end. The left is hell-bent on destroying freedom, our state and our country, and career politicians on the right have stood by and Let It Happen.** They will never be done treating your liberties as a bargaining chip. If you haven’t fought back yet, now is the perfect time to do so. Precinct caucuses will occur across the state on February 1st. We must all attend and sign up to be delegates. Delegates gather at a convention in May to decide which Republican will face off against Walz in November, and this choice carries more weight with each passing day. **Will we choose the same failed politicians that allowed us to get to this point? Or will we choose a fighter? Someone who doesn’t care to play nice with the left, and someone who puts principles like Your Liberties over their own political aspirations.** I am the Only Candidate that can beat Tim Walz and get this job done. As your next governor, I will cut YOUR taxpayer dollars from flowing to any city that wants to try to enforce vaccine passports or mandates.
[](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_vbprhHtwG1AS1ZwuWxOyA&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_passports&n=1) The time to fight is now. Go to caucus. Be a delegate. Make your voice heard. electneil.com/contact to reach out to our team. They will answer your questions and guide you through the process. Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor electneil.com
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_passports&n=2). -=-=-

A few years ago, when we were talking about the filibuster, it wasn’t on a whole lot of people’s radar, and reform didn’t have a ton of support in the Senate. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40657742/325340912/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ2W_FIL_E_20220113_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODEwMTM0My1iYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sdNwJK5aachnV9AmUpHQgEQ2tcyN60jCe-dBhxVGsRE=&emci=ff8be13c-bc74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=38101343-bc74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)
---
Sometimes, change happens so slowly — not even inch by inch, but millimeter by millimeter — that it barely feels like it’s happening at all. But when you look back, you realize that you’re not in the same place you used to be. You’ve moved forward. You’ve made progress. Take this week, when **President Biden and Vice President Harris endorsed changing the filibuster so it can’t block legislation to protect the right to vote and the right to have that vote counted.** A few years ago, when we were talking about the filibuster, it wasn’t on a whole lot of people’s radar, and reform didn’t have a ton of support in the Senate. But we kept making the case. More and more senators joined in. Today, almost all of my Democratic colleagues agree that we’ve got to do something about the filibuster. And the Biden-Harris administration is jumping into this fight. **Our toes are on the line to make this happen. But we must keep speaking out.** [_**Add your name if you agree: The Senate should change the filibuster rules so the Republican minority can’t stop us from passing voting rights legislation.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40657743/325340913/-449892543?refcode=EMZ2W_FIL_E_20220113_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODEwMTM0My1iYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sdNwJK5aachnV9AmUpHQgEQ2tcyN60jCe-dBhxVGsRE=&emci=ff8be13c-bc74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=38101343-bc74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) Now, you know me: I’m ready to flat-out get rid of the filibuster on every issue, all the way down the line. The American people elected Democrats to have a Senate majority so we could get things done, not so we could hand Mitch McConnell veto power over gun safety, immigration reform, and a $15 minimum wage. But right now, we’ve got a chance to make sure the filibuster doesn’t block the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. And for the sake of the survival of our democracy, we must seize it. Across the country, Republican state legislatures — with simple-majority votes, in chambers that don’t have filibusters — have been restricting the right to vote. It is a threat to free and fair elections, and a threat to our democracy. The Senate filibuster means that Congress can’t protect voting rights unless GOP politicians agree, all while their party is actively undermining our democracy in state after state. But if we get around the filibuster, we can roll back those voter suppression laws. We can ban partisan gerrymandering. We can fight dark money in politics. And we can make sure the American people get to make their voices heard at the ballot box. [_**Let's make this happen. Add your name to say that the Senate must protect the right to vote and the right to have that vote counted, even if it means getting around the filibuster.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40657744/325340914/-449892543?refcode=EMZ2W_FIL_E_20220113_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODEwMTM0My1iYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sdNwJK5aachnV9AmUpHQgEQ2tcyN60jCe-dBhxVGsRE=&emci=ff8be13c-bc74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=38101343-bc74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

Chip in $5 now to help us reach our goal and defend our Democratic majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40657885/325341447/1589500184?refcode=mw_em_220113_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGVjMTFhNS1iYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgI6y96guOvRPcZzA1rL3bILim4xPR8nI36WcekiTYQ=) I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished in the Senate this year. Earlier today, Kyrsten Sinema got on the floor of the U.S. Senate and said she would not vote to repeal the filibuster, even to reverse Republican efforts to rig our electoral system.
Her speech means Republicans can continue to make it harder for poor people and people of color to vote.
It means partisan gerrymandering will continue unabated and as a result, the possibility of a permanent Republican majority in the House.
It means no action on climate change, guns, immigration, lowering the cost of prescription drugs and more.
And it means - clearly - Ruben Gallego must primary her and beat her if we want anything to change.

body:
Join me on January 26th! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/758935567428/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6653290?e=c87c5d8d97)

| Friend,

Did you see our last email?

You’re invited to join me as I kick off my 2022 campaign for Congress!

It will be a fun evening filled with wine, friends, and politics. Most importantly, it’ll be an evening where you can find out how YOU can help turn our state and nation around. ****

**Date: January 26th
Time: 5-8pm
Location: Tumwater Vineyards, 375 SW Barrel House Way West Linn, Oregon 97068
RSVP: [alex@lorichavezderemer.com ](mailto:alex@lorichavezderemer.com)**
The new year has begun and so it is time to get down to business.

Make sure to clear your schedules for January 26th so we can discuss the bright, conservative future we can build for Oregon together.

See you there!

Thank you,
Lori Chavez-DeRemer

While it might seem like now is the time to celebrate, that is not the case. I preferred to serve a final term and go home, but the state of our country is APPALLING.

The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn’t about winning another term - it’s about saving AMERICA.

The future of our children and grandchildren are at stake. **[Will you join me in this battle to save America, Fellow Conservative?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3a3pz-1t3uf-4qqlpo3/ "Will you join me in this battle to save America, Fellow Conservative? ")**
