name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: Wealthy corporate CEOs are trying to flip Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40658376/325343816/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk0ODBjZi1iZjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LUvkgB-RNEs3DlzcuAUhea5StyBJS4hh0oKmcyWbAwY=)
Friend — Another one of Michael's GOP challengers released his fundraising numbers for last quarter. He raised nearly a million dollars with about half of it coming from his own wallet. **This is the second opponent to raise about a million dollars, and the second dumping hundreds of thousands of their own dollars into this race. Michael’s opponents will clearly stop at nothing to win this seat. And if this continues, we could be outspent.** We're proud to be running a grassroots-driven campaign, but we're up against wealthy CEO opponents that could inject tons of cash into this race when Republican grassroots enthusiasm is low. A million dollars goes pretty far in a race like this. With Michael’s opponents funneling money into their own races and Mitch McConnell and the National GOP sitting on over $75 million to flip seats like this, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you. **Donate $10 — or what works for your budget — today to help fight back against Michael’s wealthy CEO opponents. Our grassroots movement can overcome their advantage, but it will take folks like you pitching in.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40658377/325343824/-20397165?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220113_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk0ODBjZi1iZjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LUvkgB-RNEs3DlzcuAUhea5StyBJS4hh0oKmcyWbAwY=)****

clean_body: | = Friend — Another one of Michael's GOP challengers released his fundraising numbers for last quarter. He raised nearly a million dollars with about half of it coming from his own wallet. This is the second opponent to raise about a million dollars, and the second dumping hundreds of thousands of their own dollars into this race. Michael’s opponents will clearly stop at nothing to win this seat. And if this continues, we could be outspent. We're proud to be running a grassroots-driven campaign, but we're up against wealthy CEO opponents that could inject tons of cash into this race when Republican grassroots enthusiasm is low. A million dollars goes pretty far in a race like this. With Michael’s opponents funneling money into their own races and Mitch McConnell and the National GOP sitting on over $75 million to flip seats like this, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you. Donate $10 — or what works for your budget — today to help fight back against Michael’s wealthy CEO opponents. Our grassroots movement can overcome their advantage, but it will take folks like you pitching in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= When candidates like these, who don’t reflect our values, make their way to Congress, the result is inaction on the issues that matter most to folks like you. That’s not Michael. He’s fighting hard to build on the tax cuts he achieved for working families, to fight climate change, and create more good-paying jobs. Grassroots supporters like you power this campaign, not federal lobbyists or corporate PACs. = Thank you for your continued support. — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Team Holly
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, today I'm personally reaching out to talk to you about rural voters. To put it simply, the Democratic Party is not competing in rural areas. And our campaign wants to change that.
This campaign is about uplifting voices that have been forgotten by leaders in our community for decades. We will not continue the cycle of alienating our rural neighbors in favor of big cities. The Democratic Party needs rural voters.
The future of GA-14 depends on dedicated leadership on kitchen table issues – ones that affect all of us .
That’s why I’m so proud of our Rural Revival Plan. Our plan tackles the issues that really matter to folks on Main Street. Our residents aren't worried about issues that don't affect them, and DC politics have no place here. But my neighbors do care about having clean drinking water, access to the internet for their children, or if the next tornado will wipe out their town.
It’s time to show Democrats how to compete in rural areas. Chip in today if you’re with me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0105]
Thanks so much,
Holly.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0105] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

While this is very exciting news, we’re also facing new redistricting maps and GOP SuperPACs, like Kevin McCarthy’s “Trailblazers Fund”, who are pouring money into Kean Jr.’s race against us. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = Our team has won hard races since 2018, and this year is no different – and our secret weapon is you! Without your help and a strong grassroots team, we may not be able to cross the finish line. And while our opponent accepts money from GOP SuperPACS and special interest groups, our team is solely a grassroots run campaign. = Thanks for your continued support, All of us @ Malinowski HQ | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district. = = Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40658805/325345848/-2057546413?refcode=20220113_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTJlNTk2Ny1jMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKUUeFAJ2RVvJiGLEBJPPSAmL8AChxYJMECOLSztsJM=) Friend, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. **That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal.** [**Can you make a contribution today -- split between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us reach our fundraising goal? body:
#

Team,
We’re in the midst of what is shaping up to be a tough election year.
**[With so much on the line in November, we have to make every day count. But I can’t do this without you. Will you pitch in towards my re-election campaign ahead of our mid-month deadline on Saturday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40659029/325347479/-2132411086?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjE0N2Q4OS1jNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qE1tugnK2tVgz9NrU5WmqDqw-ZLq-RMmP-kg9E1BXQ=)**

body:

| | Peter, We want to let you in on Laura’s plan to help Maryland grow below, **[but first, will you become a Founding Donor of her campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40658987/325347405/-1938532744?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220113_FR_Launch5_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjE0N2Q4OS1jNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2wKCrb30gGHujRC2G3hRRe_R2Xg4Cq725L7whl12TA=)** | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40658989/325347407/-1938532744?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220113_FR_Launch5_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjE0N2Q4OS1jNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2wKCrb30gGHujRC2G3hRRe_R2Xg4Cq725L7whl12TA=)
---
**Put economic issues at the forefront**
* * *
Laura is the only candidate that has a proven track record of economic success in business and as a county executive. She knows that people are worried about job opportunities, a possible recession, inflation, and the economy bouncing back from the pandemic.
Laura built multiple successful technology companies as an entrepreneur, restored good governance as a county executive, ran an economic development agency, and serves on the Economic Development Commission – all right here in Maryland.
Laura is running on a platform of fiscal and social responsibility, and she’s going to use her experience to stimulate the job market in Maryland and create an environment in Baltimore in which small businesses can succeed.
**Mobilize voters whose voices are all too often ignored**
* * *
Laura knows what it’s like to struggle, to have to advocate for justice, and to feel invisible when asking for help. Laura believes every Marylander should have access to opportunity regardless of where their story starts.
And that idea is the bedrock of her campaign.
Laura will work to mobilize the voters who feel disenfranchised and ignored. She will engage with these voters often and early, launch a robust ad campaign telling her story, and hire staff and volunteers to help her organize within the community.
While her male opponents are competing for the support of the same group of constituents, Laura will have an advantage because she relates to a greater swath of voters.
**Build a powerful grassroots team**
* * *
This is where you come in. Laura needs to build a strong grassroots team to help her standout in this crowded Democratic primary, and help spread her message to every corner of Maryland – from Baltimore to Worcester and everywhere in between.
**[We’re already well on our way building a powerful grassroots campaign, but we still need more folks like you to become Founding Donors to start Laura’s campaign as strong as possible. Will you become a Founding Donor today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40658991/325347410/-1938532744?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220113_FR_Launch5_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjE0N2Q4OS1jNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2wKCrb30gGHujRC2G3hRRe_R2Xg4Cq725L7whl12TA=)**

| Friends, We’re in week two of signature gathering and **we’re inspired by everyone who is engaging** with the political process by gathering signatures to put Becky on the Republican primary ballot. Thank you so much to everyone who is volunteering!

It’s time to support democracy, and **civic engagement is essential to a healthy democracy.** We hope that this new year, you feel encouraged to participate more in the political process because Utah needs you! **One important way to engage is to donate** to candidates like Becky Edwards. Through donations from people like you, Becky can reach Utahns throughout the state. We are looking for 222 new donors to make contributions this month. **Will you donate today** and invite two friends to donate as well?

name: Team Harder
subject: Fwd: What do you bring to the party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,
We wanted to make sure you saw Kathleen’s message from yesterday because our team believes it’s incredibly important that you hear directly from her.
Kathleen is clear-eyed and ready to bring science, facts, and an incredible work ethic to Congress to fight for OR-06. We’re so excited to be on this ride with her. If you are, too, please consider chipping in $10 to her campaign today and be sure to read her message below! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&amount=10]
Best,
Team Harder
----- Begin Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email]I’ve been blessed beyond measure to have upheld a highly successful 30-year career as a medical professional. I accomplished it through perseverance, believing in myself, and working harder than I could even put into words. But just like most, my path to success wasn’t strictly linear.
My childhood, although imperfect, gave me the rare gift of determination and grit, and that gift turned into a desire to break every glass ceiling possible . I dropped out of college during my junior year to support my family, and it wasn’t until after I had my second daughter that I decided to go to medical school. During that first med school interview, the person in charge crossed his arms, stared right into my eyes, and said... "So, what do you bring to the party?"
Well, let me tell you what I’ll bring to the party in Congress.
If I’m elected to represent Oregon’s Sixth District in Washington, I will protect Oregon families and bring my medical knowledge with me to advocate fiercely for every single child and parent.
I’d be honored if you could make a $25 donation to my campaign for Congress today. This donation will help us communicate with voters to let them know why I’m the representative who will fight day in and day out to improve their daily lives. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email]
As a doctor and as someone who looks for the best plan of action, I can tell you with confidence that moving forward is our best option . I’m frustrated by the actions of science deniers and conspiracy theorists in Congress, and I can’t sit back any longer and watch them continue to block meaningful legislation and harm their own constituents with misinformation.
So, just like I told my interviewer when I was applying for medical school, I’m bringing education, determination, grit, and compassion to the table. And I’m ready for my next chapter.
If you’re with me, please consider a donation to my campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email]
Together, we will move forward.
Thank you,
Dr. Kathleen Harder
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220113-email]

clean_body: Hi Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw Kathleen’s message from yesterday because our team believes it’s incredibly important that you hear directly from her. Kathleen is clear-eyed and ready to bring science, facts, and an incredible work ethic to Congress to fight for OR-06. We’re so excited to be on this ride with her. If you are, too, please consider chipping in $10 to her campaign today and be sure to read her message below! [] Best, Team Harder ----- Begin Original Message ----- [’ve been blessed beyond measure to have upheld a highly successful 30-year career as a medical professional. I accomplished it through perseverance, believing in myself, and working harder than I could even put into words. But just like most, my path to success wasn’t strictly linear. My childhood, although imperfect, gave me the rare gift of determination and grit, and that gift turned into a desire to break every glass ceiling possible . I dropped out of college during my junior year to support my family, and it wasn’t until after I had my second daughter that I decided to go to medical school. During that first med school interview, the person in charge crossed his arms, stared right into my eyes, and said... "So, what do you bring to the party?" Well, let me tell you what I’ll bring to the party in Congress. If I’m elected to represent Oregon’s Sixth District in Washington, I will protect Oregon families and bring my medical knowledge with me to advocate fiercely for every single child and parent. I’d be honored if you could make a $25 donation to my campaign for Congress today. This donation will help us communicate with voters to let them know why I’m the representative who will fight day in and day out to improve their daily lives. So, just like I told my interviewer when I was applying for medical school, I’m bringing education, determination, grit, and compassion to the table. And I’m ready for my next chapter. If you’re with me, please consider a donation to my campaign today. [] Together, we will move forward. Thank you, Dr. Kathleen Harder [] Democrat Kathleen Harder is a doctor who's been on the frontlines to protect her community against COVID-19. body:
Link inside to respond >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/29de6eb7a35486c1/d529ef2526e1abecc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends,

Did you see Nate’s message the other day?

He’s FED UP with the tyrannical decrees we’ve seen from state officials. Now, they’ve declared that in-person learning is “under serious threat” again.

**Shutting down our schools was a DISASTER last time around, and another shutdown will set our kids back even further!**

Nate’s leading the charge to call out this insanity and demand our schools remain open.

Today, we want to get your opinion:
Do you believe our schools should stay open or shift to online learning?
---

Thank you in advance for taking a moment to weigh in on this important question.

\- Research @ Sandvig for Congress

Thank you in advance for taking a moment to weigh in on this important question. \- Research @ Sandvig for Congress P.S. Please help us get out the word on this survey. Forward it on to your family and friends, and to support our efforts to promote it online. | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Sandvig for Congress | |

name: MandelaBarnes.com
subject: Ron Johnson is running. Humbly asking for $5 to beat him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Today is an important day to show you're ready to send Mandela Barnes to the U.S. Senate.
| Friends -

If you have been waiting for the right time to make a contribution to elect Mandela Barnes to the Senate, then today is the perfect day.

Ron Johnson just announced he's running for re-election, which means the race to defeat him is now officially on.

This is going to be one of the most competitive campaigns in the country, and it's a must-win race if we're going to protect and expand the Democratic majority in the Senate.

If there was ever a day to show you're ready to send Mandela Barnes to the Senate, today's the day.

So we're asking: [**Can you make a $5 contribution to our campaign today? Every donation will help us make the investments required to win this race and take back this seat for Democrats.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4884?t=6&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP) If you look at the Senate map for 2022, Wisconsin is right at the top of the list of seats that Democrats can win back this election cycle.

With Ron Johnson now running for re-election, we need to double down on our efforts to send Mandela to the U.S. Senate to fight for every Wisconsinite.

Mandela launched this campaign because he knows that the current system isn't working for everyone. Hard work isn't paying off like it used to. People are working longer and longer for less and less, and it's time for that to change.

This campaign will be funded by lots of people making small donations – that's how we're going to win. So if you've been thinking about making a donation to stand with Mandela, there's never been a better time than today. [**Please contribute $5 to send Mandela Barnes to the U.S. Senate. Every donation matters – especially today.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4884?t=7&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP) It is up to all of us to continue building the broad coalition that will be required to win this race.

Thanks for chipping in today to show you are a part of that effort. All our best,

Team Mandela | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4885?t=8&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1116%2E878179%2EV-qDxP)

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: ALERT: A MOVE IN THE WRONG DIRECTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Our Governor has lost the confidence of the people, and she knows it. That’s why she’s working along with our Secretary of State to pass a so-called Peter, Our Governor has lost the confidence of the people, and she knows it. That’s why she’s working along with our Secretary of State to pass a so-called “voting rights bill” through the legislature this session. Make no mistake: this bill is a blatant power grab scheme to try and save her rapidly slipping grip on our state... It has nothing to do with expanding your rights as an American and a New Mexican. In fact, it’s the exact opposite. Her bill would make voter fraud even EASIER in New Mexico. [**I need YOU to stand with me and fight back! Will you chip in just $10, so we can win this race and protect our elections? One of the first things I will do is introduce a bill to require VOTER ID in New Mexico! **](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=4893d51c1a30408d86ec2ba1078b0840&_e=ocBQanl88SDVH7TgrT_aR-eB9B5uvoJDpL2K1RcHWKYT02g691bbxTPsd1ZQVuduVbOqc956dPiebKnT_uby1-ns9aqA-JV5AAZv81WHeuJTUWf5ELUxB2Jhwu-UWk1FOk_c18TfTsgPdlmk1TDkci1pJs9J5c-ooBgn8j7P6m3KlEVB73Oudm3J-q-ubXNP9Q-PmXOeNFCwpLMJVyT1MjeN_9A6OiWEierFxCN8lNXsvDie5Tl0YfZzi5YTcjLHTFz_l6a37nw0SYjBO1OvNOAGeIM_J9XiJVy9KE72XmhNznISqYEiVVqxJCrB2Z16hbO50FglYIVB30hSpKpMCjpRompspnFKl6VfkZOaXvFOpfRw0XsjhhD9KkBhtdQ10HLP4hKCSApm_hF20mlEiFsvYbfTC18NwCU0HyHp6WMzT73aOCxz2xCOCig2BPR82RlTA6N3i8_6To1nipyAmGurpNEZMLEOnuvzbE0VyeYp-h4B_4kXlp_-0NDL4RKBm_vF1Xtr7m1mTw3QwHSohg%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN NOW TO HELP FIGHT BACK**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=4893d51c1a30408d86ec2ba1078b0840&_e=ocBQanl88SDVH7TgrT_aR-eB9B5uvoJDpL2K1RcHWKYT02g691bbxTPsd1ZQVuduVbOqc956dPiebKnT_uby1-ns9aqA-JV5AAZv81WHeuJTUWf5ELUxB2Jhwu-UWk1FOk_c18TfTsgPdlmk1TDkci1pJs9J5c-ooBgn8j7P6m3KlEVB73Oudm3J-q-ubXNP9Q-PmXOeNFCwpLMJVyT1MjeN_9A6OiWEierFxCN8lNXsvDie5Tl0YfZzi5YTcjLHTFz_l6a37nw0SYjBO1OvNOAGeIM_J9XiJVy9KE72XmiOSHlL761NHtW83DM3nqIPTX8V05jYDn4760TLkLjQjMw5GVS96ofJ5J-7MP4pWNY3MhopesT4loBfHIb-zna339L0VCY1hGsWGzJMQoGhFXY5p8vl_byp5hqQw9RsbiwnIpftKwlb-YQwSiy31roOT6VEBuOToP4Uwx8ygMRevN3OlTk8Uv_my8-AmMMORKZb8B-cJ9XIc7oOC5DjV-B559V9keVjeVk7gIDEC4Rk5w%3D%3D) Here are just a few of the dangerous points in the Governor’s new bill:
* Felons would be able to vote the minute they leave prison.
* Thousands of live ballots mailed to the wrong addresses
* Ballots accepted after election day

Voters have already lost confidence in our election system and this bill is moving our election security in the completely WRONG direction! **We must make it easy to vote and hard to cheat!** Elections are the backbone of our democracy, and nothing is more important to the future of our state and country than ensuring that they are conducted freely and fairly. [**Instead of these dangerous new policies,****we need to pass simple voter ID laws in New Mexico to help ensure that our elections are safe and secure.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=4893d51c1a30408d86ec2ba1078b0840&_e=ocBQanl88SDVH7TgrT_aR-eB9B5uvoJDpL2K1RcHWKYT02g691bbxTPsd1ZQVuduVbOqc956dPiebKnT_uby1-ns9aqA-JV5AAZv81WHeuJTUWf5ELUxB2Jhwu-UWk1FOk_c18TfTsgPdlmk1TDkci1pJs9J5c-ooBgn8j7P6m3KlEVB73Oudm3J-q-ubXNP9Q-PmXOeNFCwpLMJVyT1MjeN_9A6OiWEierFxCN8lNXsvDie5Tl0YfZzi5YTcjLHTFz_l6a37nw0SYjBO1OvNOAGeIM_J9XiJVy9KE72XmiOSHlL761NHtW83DM3nqIPu7mCLzlldcXmjf7UepllLyGkFXLxVazUh_vZJIagLO2qcGI-ouOy0Xj4AylJ-LH5g69hyofi6AU-kcjk3lhbLAEXDCm3z13AGWLKKZMPV1FarPsyTcixwcI-qVjlL_V0pOP6ihplr_fsuJeM1-4wLWXfM6HYpkBb0htyk345KrWxNaXybvKEu8cHLnGAJeI2GiT9SA2Rb2qVUgBeCSBF1g%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=4893d51c1a30408d86ec2ba1078b0840&_e=ocBQanl88SDVH7TgrT_aR-eB9B5uvoJDpL2K1RcHWKYT02g691bbxTPsd1ZQVuduVbOqc956dPiebKnT_uby1-ns9aqA-JV5AAZv81WHeuJTUWf5ELUxB2Jhwu-UWk1FOk_c18TfTsgPdlmk1TDkci1pJs9J5c-ooBgn8j7P6m3KlEVB73Oudm3J-q-ubXNP9Q-PmXOeNFCwpLMJVyT1MjeN_9A6OiWEierFxCN8lNXsvDie5Tl0YfZzi5YTcjLHTFz_l6a37nw0SYjBO1OvNOAGeIM_J9XiJVy9KE72XmiOSHlL761NHtW83DM3nqIPHEFj_YQnSBcdX0TODHrfK4vszzmnJnSlZStMxHgH-Cc1Q_qwQL4xqretWPrS-P8yMwWg5_qbiUuVLOHkWcN-g-RSvz8G5VnSZjuS2aRt9aZgjeVdR16XPxc5d5Tz8nT0Q7pU2VORxsoOGnsnWRsSd9Y4STvF_vMddjr7xwhCCAmMxKA1vV6IhjOzwL901rFMBJCgmcskBS-hCDcRsXsMTQ%3D%3D) Hardworking New Mexicans deserve to know that their votes will be counted and that our state is doing everything it can to prevent fraud - that will never happen under MLG. That’s why it’s so important that we enact policies to eliminate rampant voter fraud and ensure that only legally registered voters cast ballots in our elections. [**If you agree,****chip in now to help stop this bill and secure our elections.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=4893d51c1a30408d86ec2ba1078b0840&_e=ocBQanl88SDVH7TgrT_aR-eB9B5uvoJDpL2K1RcHWKYT02g691bbxTPsd1ZQVuduVbOqc956dPiebKnT_uby1-ns9aqA-JV5AAZv81WHeuJTUWf5ELUxB2Jhwu-UWk1FOk_c18TfTsgPdlmk1TDkci1pJs9J5c-ooBgn8j7P6m3KlEVB73Oudm3J-q-ubXNP9Q-PmXOeNFCwpLMJVyT1MjeN_9A6OiWEierFxCN8lNXsvDie5Tl0YfZzi5YTcjLHTFz_l6a37nw0SYjBO1OvNOAGeIM_J9XiJVy9KE72XmiOSHlL761NHtW83DM3nqIPBjXj2b1y726cNQlyMUmxvafigT7xci2X1MKOPuwZnS9hqbYlHa9jDXTDKK6mCjnnHlV5tpXPz1VURVuJdgIY7Cjjld9ENJbCu8HS-KXmb_VAP8hITDToWUTBgpTBDN_Dp9WBBE2tmaWa5SMStl8iroHV6CpaoY7ijPSAf82gWt2GO_uQRHkfEpsf3q7d-ZJfEQINrOCZms2ftxPyQZBVSQ%3D%3D) We simply cannot allow the governor to force through this reckless bill that would put our election security in extreme jeopardy. It’s a stark reminder why winning this election is so critical. It will affect many elections in the future. I’m so grateful for any support you can give to fuel our fight to protect our state’s elections and ensure that your voice gets heard. Thanks, Mark Ronchetti | |

name: Susan Wild
subject: re: Senator Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I am sick of Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema who don’t act like Democrats and who put their personal agendas ahead of the priorities of real Americans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40659968/325350922/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220113-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIwZjQwYi1jNzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCvpyyIUrKlRECmpQm8Y-Y38psUvC6CWhiZ-OFKy25E=)
---
| Peter —

Two days ago in a powerful speech about the need for voting rights reform, President Joe Biden asked, _“Do you want to be on the side of Dr. King or George Wallace? Do you want to be on the side of John Lewis or Bull Connor? Do you want to be on the side of Abraham Lincoln or Jefferson Davis?”_

**I know where I stand.** I was proud to join my fellow Democrats to pass the Freedom to Vote Act in the House of Representatives earlier today.

I am genuinely blown away by the outpouring of support people like you have shown us this past week leading up to our campaign’s first and very important finance deadline.
To everyone who picked up their phone when Aruna or I called, pitched in to one of our emails, contributed to a social media post or our website, mailed in a check, or told your friends and family about our campaign: **thank you, from the bottom of my heart.**
I am so humbled by the grassroots army of supporters we have seen grow so quickly, drawn to our vision of increased work, wages, and wealth for every Maryland family. Now that we’ve hit this crucial milestone, we enter a new and exciting phase in our race for Maryland’s next governor.
Only five months from now, we face the Democratic primary election, and with the fundraising numbers we put up, **we just proved that we’re the frontrunner in this race, and we’re powered by the people.** Like I’ve said from the very beginning: _this is a movement, not a moment._
We have a lot of work to do, but I feel confident in our ability to share our message and not only win in June, but bring our people-powered movement to Annapolis.
[If you can, join us for our virtual rally next Tuesday to celebrate and keep the 'Moorementum' going!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40660230/325351829/2129396303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTNlNjI5MS1jODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpY8lotSDxMRp_I40rWHuyy6GORb8D4eFx4qX5siBSU=&emci=453e6291-c874-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4e3e6291-c874-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24635485)
Aruna and I can’t thank you enough for every effort you’ve made to help make us your next Governor and Lieutenant Governor. Let’s keep this up, and together, I know we'll continue to make history and progress for the people across Maryland this year.
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

William Timmons for Congress
body:
Why it’s time to put America back on top. |
No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=72d8137b9922411f90e84fb94e7a3838&_t=dJUAOD9tQerpoRWshVU8fIlYvEKBK4brxwoLHONPPqTbeQZF5Aq5Rxaqqiko3tOmfWTJWd_S50pjNNrol_HBIIP5nXiOJ4m19fwb9UNdaq929idQ61Q3jB-zF0_e7K54ZDLODm9_XM6u3hAV6RSjW0w60u1AyZS61NYcBEceGbw%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d8137b9922411f90e84fb94e7a3838&_e=K8hNQ24w1XoaaXHPzMscP69pqnmkcDXQkqNqjjj2Me_d4vFRizavO8okuP1_dDbLvgNgYamCYebDbRNAyrzSgJkPUFJxcIw6UHT7P1V2rYaHkgqpd9CNKkbSrMmDJPSL7v-mCio4OLto_Dsv2-zEZHhFDTY7Ji8R0bug5HIIaz1cpp57Z3NnbbtSElXR0r4Rk6I9-kkM9HvWgdLvtZWZ8pseK5l3nu8bl62nbxmZDjEjt6C_ivVwV9GI15x5k-Dr80uv9sa7h_AvyvRkMt01pnV6Bvb1nuMWEKL1OyT2jEB_CABsKxE_TCa1C_RtGGMLfR9cxvak2CTd61uDo-VlVoAcRphHmzCWvCXfdusNT6IY4ab_9yCPpvF0gG5mLsmt)

---
Fellow American,

My name is William Timmons. I am a Congressman serving South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, [**and I am proudly running again.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d8137b9922411f90e84fb94e7a3838&_e=K8hNQ24w1XoaaXHPzMscP69pqnmkcDXQkqNqjjj2Me_d4vFRizavO8okuP1_dDbLvgNgYamCYebDbRNAyrzSgJkPUFJxcIw6UHT7P1V2rYaHkgqpd9CNKkbSrMmDJPSL7v-mCio4OLto_Dsv2-zEZHhFDTY7Ji8R0bug5HIIaz1f7R1j0nIme10hmGio9hrMooYKd4GpL3g5Dob8P7dCP1Dl_NntEA4AMwgRRd5nqV-wwOQBRDOXA7R7OTMcXMSrsK04KYsGQcz8nW7HCIEstLeWNeenjboJHDyxuBldm5L_Nz31K4VdDW-mN944STo-w_dCnCfW2BT4lLI2DrsZgTQLHtt_aRZVP_V8V0VmPUZtSp_fvdJ2z6UOap4XcqlG)

You see, I did not want to be a politician, and frankly, I am disgusted with the dysfunction in Washington today. I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every role I had, I noticed the same problem: **government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST.**

That is what inspired me to run for office the first time. I am a man of action who sees the problems that real Americans are facing due to poor leadership. I believe our government needs transparency and accountability, which is why I was chosen as the top Republican on the House Modernization Committee.

But more than just words, Fellow American, elected officials need to be accountable for their actions in Washington, DC.

I am a Captain and JAG officer in the South Carolina Air National Guard, small business owner, attorney, and husband, who loves this country and wants to address the biggest problems facing our nation, not just fight with one another on Twitter.

| Peter,

Today is a very special day: it is Founders Day for my sorority, Delta Sigma Theta. Delta is a historically Black, service-focused sorority through which I have learned so much and gained so many opportunities to help folks in my community.

**In fact, it was at a Delta-organized event in 2017 that I first knew I had to get involved in politics.**

The annual event, called Delta Days at the Nation’s Capitol, provides an opportunity for members to take an active role in the advocacy and legislative process. I was looking forward to speaking with my elected representatives about the issues that affected me as a constituent.

**But guess what? Not a single representative held their appointment to meet with me. This told me that they did not value their constituents and forgot where they came from and who they worked for.**

It was then that I realized I would have to forge my own path in politics and be the change I want to see. Without this opportunity from Delta, I would never have gotten involved in politics, let alone considered running for office.

One of the main values and pillars of Delta is a commitment to public service, and being part of a community of Black women who value public service as much as I do is an incredible gift. Through Delta, I am honored to be connected to past member Shirley Chisholm, who made history as the first Black woman to ever serve in the United States House of Representatives. I hope to continue her legacy by becoming the first Black Congresswoman from Nebraska.

**In honor of Delta Founders Day, celebrating the founding of the organization in 1913,[_I’m hoping you can invest $19.13 in my campaign to become Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40660192/325351650/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220113-1-EM&amount=19.13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQyMmI0ZS1jODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJxOY5A4Sxw9DTM2kdUODjxac4P0_oILdd43azWHuQM=)**

clean_body: One of the main values and pillars of Delta is a commitment to public service. | = | Peter, Today is a very special day: it is Founders Day for my sorority, Delta Sigma Theta. Delta is a historically Black, service-focused sorority through which I have learned so much and gained so many opportunities to help folks in my community. In fact, it was at a Delta-organized event in 2017 that I first knew I had to get involved in politics. The annual event, called Delta Days at the Nation’s Capitol, provides an opportunity for members to take an active role in the advocacy and legislative process. I was looking forward to speaking with my elected representatives about the issues that affected me as a constituent. But guess what? Not a single representative held their appointment to meet with me. This told me that they did not value their constituents and forgot where they came from and who they worked for. It was then that I realized I would have to forge my own path in politics and be the change I want to see. Without this opportunity from Delta, I would never have gotten involved in politics, let alone considered running for office. One of the main values and pillars of Delta is a commitment to public service, and being part of a community of Black women who value public service as much as I do is an incredible gift. Through Delta, I am honored to be connected to past member Shirley Chisholm, who made history as the first Black woman to ever serve in the United States House of Representatives. I hope to continue her legacy by becoming the first Black Congresswoman from Nebraska. In honor of Delta Founders Day, celebrating the founding of the organization in 1913,= | = | = Anything you can spare means so much to my team and me. Thank you, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6765%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2k80wgDrk7S5VY%2bbKeqnkQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69618%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o14gMy1cC0uOel%2f0sSzJUw&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69619%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q1xOPEF1UsR44RHBVF5a%2bA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69618%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o14gMy1cC0uOel%2f0sSzJUw&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69610%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lhi08XG4J%2bO%2fark1MFGcAg&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69611%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bQbwVZOXw7IGEJdCixjYXg&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69612%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R1TaeWfEdeZ0MsiysMerpg&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

| | | Patriot - I just announced my campaign for re-election.

While it might seem like now is the time to celebrate, that is not the case. I preferred to serve a final term and go home, but the state of our country is APPALLING.

The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn't about winning another term - it's about saving AMERICA.

Hi friend,

The other day I was driving past Bessie the Cow in Janesville and not for the first time, it struck me just how _bad_ our roads are. Now that I-90 has been reconstructed, the comparison between a properly maintained road and the aging highways on the way to Kenosha shows just how far behind we are on local infrastructure.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40660655/325353642/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220113_mm1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJjZTRjYi1jYjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zGWqxE9d2xC67dFn1lZ3mH41UhEZJaQI0_l2JZ_7pY=)
---

I know I'm not the only one who thinks this every time they're in the car driving. What is even more shocking, a recent study by Consumer Affairs shows that Wisconsin has **the third-worst roads in the nation.**

Six percent of Wisconsin's rural roads are in "poor" condition, as well as 29% of our city roads. On average, residents of Wisconsin rated road conditions as a 5.67 out of 10.

The do-nothing Republicans of this state refuse to do anything about our roads. Instead, they have sold us out and chosen greed over our communities. They had no problem granting major tax breaks to corporations and defunding transportation and infrastructure in our state.

**We cannot and will not stand for this.**

We had folks from all across the district tell us that they want better roads and we hear them. We need a leader in Congress who will put our communities first, and has no problem fighting to improve our communities, starting with the roads.

**[Unlike my opponent, I will not be taking corporate money to achieve these goals, but that means I need your support. We need leaders in Congress representing us who believe that the people of Wisconsin and our communities are worth investing in.

Last year, when the House approved a $1 trillion infrastructure bill, Bryan Steil chose to vote against it despite knowing how much our communities would benefit from the bill. This crucial bill would not only be giving our economy the jumpstart it needs to put America back to work, but it would also invest in public transit and expand broadband access.

Steil has shown us time and time again that when it comes to where his interests lie, he will always put the people of Wisconsin behind his corporate interests.

name: Morgan Harper
subject: This is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is our campaign’s most important week yet.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220113-512-footer-ak&t=2&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)
Hey,
**We’re just 2 days away from our first deadline of 2022 at midnight on January 15.**[**_That’s why I’m humbly asking you to rush a donation to our campaign so we can stay on track. Right now we’re facing a $2,500 funding gap we_**** _must_****close to have the resources we need for Election Year.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20641?t=3&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)
**This isn’t just any deadline****, this is our first financial hurdle of 2022.**
**Unfortunately, so much of what makes a campaign successful is still tied to the money they have in hand. That’s why it’s critical that a scrappy, grassroots, people-powered campaign like ours maintains a steady volume of small-dollar donations.[_Can you help us reach our goal of $2,500 before midnight on January 15 by donating $5 — or anything you can — today?_ ](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20641?t=4&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20647?refcode=em20220113-512&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)**
I know how strong this grassroots movement is. I’ve been traveling across Ohio since our campaign launched. I’ve spoken to folks who are tired, overworked, underpaid, and disillusioned with politics in this country. They desperately want a different type of candidate — the status quo isn’t working.
**Our campaign resonates because I have the track record to prove why our movement is different.** I’ve been committed to Ohio since I was raised here. I’ve given back by co-founding my own non-profit organization here. I’ve spent my entire career fighting back against predatory lenders, and working to break-up huge corporate conglomerates.
Help me prove that you don’t need millions of dollars, corporate connections, and the political establishment behind you to win in politics. [**_Your donation of just $5 today can help us reach our mid-month goal and show everyone what we already know — we can win this thing and flip Ohio blue._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20641?t=24&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)
Thank you for everything,
Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20641?t=25&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220113-512-footer&t=26&refcode2=512_90090_6DnF_L&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=512%2E90090%2E6DnF_L)

clean_body: If my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House. | = Friends, I wouldn’t be writing to you if this wasn’t true: if my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House. I’m incredibly proud of the campaign he’s been running so far, but a well-funded right-wing Super PAC just endorsed his opponent, Derrick Van Orden, and it’s only a matter of time before outside money begins flooding this district. Here’s the truth: Right now, Brad doesn’t have the resources to fight back against that kind of attack. But if he can hit Sunday’s mid-month fundraising goal, he’ll be able to mount the kind of defense he needs to counter these lies. He only needs to raise a little more to hit his goal! = | = = = = = = Don’t forget -- Derrick Van Orden is a dangerous Capitol Insurrectionist. If he’s elected he will try to reverse all of the progress I’ve already made for the people of Wisconsin. But as the current Congressman of this district, I can tell you how difficult it is to win this election. I ran against Van Orden last year, and he came within a few votes of victory. So take it from me, the only way Brad is going to be able to win is with supporters like you chipping in $5 when he needs it most. = Thanks for your support, Ron Kind Congressman, WI-03 | | Paid for and authorized by Kind for Congress, Brent Smith Treasurer This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Kind for Congress PO Box 184 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States

body:

name: Conservative Direct
subject: Joe Biden Makes Bizarre Claim He Was Arrested During Civil Rights Demonstration, Despite That Never Happening
body:
Joe Biden traveled to Georgia on Tuesday to give a speech in which he called Americans racists for disagreeing with him. Not to be confused when Joe Biden gave a similar speech last July calling Americans racist for disagreeing with him. Same topic, new year. If you support common-sense voter integrity reform and/or don't support Biden's preferred federal take over elections, you're a raaaaaaaacist. You are most likely a sexist and transphobic homophobe too, but that wasn't made clear. Nothing has changed since his speech in July when he refused to meet with the runaway Texas Democrats. Our puddinghead president still believes the same invalid truths. Ackshually, two things have changed. Joe Biden is less popular now, to the point that Stacey Abrams refused to be seen with him. Also, Joe Biden has decided that, at some point in his life, he was arrested for taking part in a civil rights demonstration. i was unaware that joe biden was arrested in a civil rights demonstration? pic.twitter.com/qFbjdcPVXg — Justin Sink (@justinsink) January 11, 2022 Generally when one gets arrested, or so I've been told, there is some kind of report. White House should be pressed to explain when and where this happened. https://t.co/1a7SnmCuij — Philip Melanchthon Wegmann (@PhilipWegmann) January 11, 2022 I think we all know exactly how the White House will explain this away: "The president misspoke about getting arrested. Now, look over there at that obvious distraction." Joe Biden telling tall tales is nothing new. Strip away the alleged dementia and his policies, which are detrimental to our country, and it's part of his charm. Biden has been telling us for over thirty years he knows his stories aren't true. But they are extra special not true when it comes to the civil rights movement. Biden’s role in the civil rights movement “is pretty easy to summarize: HE DIDN’T HAVE ONE.” “Imagine, as a white guy, lying about your role in the civil rights struggle.” pic.twitter.com/5axHmgWtfR — RNC Research (@RNCResearch) January 12, 2022 “Imagine, as a white guy, lying about your role in the civil rights struggle.” If Joe Biden hasn't been distracted by a shiny object or an n95 mask, all eyes turn to Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, as well as the other Democrat senators who are believed to also oppose Joe Biden's federal takeover of elections but are hiding behind the other two. Get your content free from Big Tech's filter. Bookmark this website and sign up for our newsletter! clean_body: Joe Biden traveled to Georgia on Tuesday to give a speech in which he called Americans racists for disagreeing with him. Not to be confused when Joe Biden gave a similar speech last July calling Americans racist for disagreeing with him. Same topic, new year. If you support common-sense voter integrity reform and/or don't support Biden's preferred federal take over elections, you're a raaaaaaaacist. You are most likely a sexist and transphobic homophobe too, but that wasn't made clear. Nothing has changed since his speech in July when he refused to meet with the runaway Texas Democrats. Our puddinghead president still believes the same invalid truths. Ackshually, two things have changed. Joe Biden is less popular now, to the point that Stacey Abrams refused to be seen with him. Also, Joe Biden has decided that, at some point in his life, he was arrested for taking part in a civil rights demonstration. i was unaware that joe biden was arrested in a civil rights demonstration? pic.twitter.com/qFbjdcPVXg — Justin Sink (@justinsink) January 11, 2022 Generally when one gets arrested, or so I've been told, there is some kind of report. White House should be pressed to explain when and where this happened. — Philip Melanchthon Wegmann (@PhilipWegmann) January 11, 2022 I think we all know exactly how the White House will explain this away: "The president misspoke about getting arrested. Now, look over there at that obvious distraction." Joe Biden telling tall tales is nothing new. Strip away the alleged dementia and his policies, which are detrimental to our country, and it's part of his charm. Biden has been telling us for over thirty years he knows his stories aren't true. But they are extra special not true when it comes to the civil rights movement. Biden’s role in the civil rights movement “is pretty easy to summarize: HE DIDN’T HAVE ONE.” “Imagine, as a white guy, lying about your role in the civil rights struggle.” pic.twitter.com/5axHmgWtfR — RNC Research (@RNCResearch) January 12, 2022 “Imagine, as a white guy, lying about your role in the civil rights struggle.” If Joe Biden hasn't been distracted by a shiny object or an n95 mask, all eyes turn to Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, as well as the other Democrat senators who are believed to also oppose Joe Biden's federal takeover of elections but are hiding behind the other two. Get your content free from Big Tech's filter. Bookmark this website and sign up for our newsletter! name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znsf7blcsvhrs1rf71qic35323677l4huqf5ec08_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uapjep1hm2qm7d9k6ior2obnc2r74tdjelhn4t1kssqnecb6e2rreo5jmsqb8c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2pm1o3mc1j7ap5jcjjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c9i68o71chie49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfd3g02bae9hdv45cr1usv76oj736e9j3phbu4a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chi61ob4cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf10v7lmr0bbf1h7bu6iv2efleb398494s6js1c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chi61ob4cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2paqn44q9sugrqo5j9al5sk3l8lnscc6c8nou6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chi61ob4cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6so56ld0p3ltsu84q8djaml5a4c08d2nvk34cmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chi61ob4cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0s9ca7b5qkncifauq44mi9vfoh1itadq1fn764g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chi61ob4cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znl3t8uh04pp0h4ke17u1qu33rn5rkgc38njupc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2chi61ob4cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
the late 1970s “malaise” of Democrat Jimmy Carter’s disastrous presidency, with the same consequences for America that we’re facing now. | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=f98b0a1ad7ea49c1ad8d3aa7694dc186&_e=G304vlMHV6m1VIyFXt7fUqhMcEF8mvo_Orlpth-RhQFGQSrZeh0tDh8K0sIQPU3PxMydqvgtWW0CbwF8rBA0H81L2W5U_GaTKl9V5JhewIXNMCcWdpnAfIF8Ztnz3tprD23ZvvKdQDSnvy42OmmoSgkoMqM_QNt1KWXV9S520Yz1v5fR7qqn8JcuS4-Sp7cb-iYDMjsTmlI2Klb4pKAibdRUlhikV5hIqSUmo2_2OSKgBdZeqc8WnIluQ2QYRXI0-A3Xa_EK_b3IhaNx5F8H-6sVpOpy2-3vJ52CUtPQcUy8VB9v-erPT-uLv_gRnc_ZV9suoQXsIT-YrdCkoDzly11uLYYLs-q-6kQpebs-OL55jLR91-HX8tKc8h_M4TC_SiBoGvDN0Xbqt0gzq7ornND4BTakk7UKdUXFAnSFHuvhaizjhJbeQE9ra4LZN2lFPp7PEG26J7rhAMrZeo1N-9SLAQg7IZvO7PGn4AX38Z0%3D) | Peter,

I remember it well, and if you were around, you probably do, too -- the late 1970s “malaise” of Democrat **Jimmy Carter’s** disastrous presidency, with the same consequences for America that we’re facing now.

Like then, the liberal Democrat agenda was being imposed on working Americans and families who also faced skyrocketing prices from rampant inflation, a surge in violent crime levels in our communities, scarcity of basic goods like food and gasoline, and chaos overseas.

But even during that dark time for our country, when the promise of the American Dream seemed almost a thing of the past, the will to demand better **\-- and achieve it --** grew in our people, and out of that movement we elected Ronald Reagan President -- _and the rest is history._

I was there, Peter, -- serving as Assistant to the President for Political Affairs in the Reagan White House, as we began the great reversal and revived our country from the Democrats’ “malaise” of crime, inflation, and chaos. By **unshackling the American people from tax-and-spend liberalism, restoring law and order, and reasserting confidence and strength overseas, we can still save the United States.**

Peter, that’s exactly what we’re working so hard to once again achieve here at Great America PAC -- empowering the people with the truth about the catastrophic Biden Democrat control of Washington, D.C., motivating grassroots organization against it, and preparing to support Trump Republican candidates who will sweep to victory in Congress in November.

But Peter, we’ve already entered the pivotal 2022 Midterm Election year, and as the leading outside group still supporting **President Donald Trump** and candidates nationwide who are running to defeat the globalist, socialist, **Pelosi-Schumer Democrats** tearing down President Trump’s commonsense policies and our country with it -- [**we’re counting on the immediate and ongoing support of patriots like you to get it done.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=f98b0a1ad7ea49c1ad8d3aa7694dc186&_e=G304vlMHV6m1VIyFXt7fUqhMcEF8mvo_Orlpth-RhQFGQSrZeh0tDh8K0sIQPU3PxMydqvgtWW0CbwF8rBA0H81L2W5U_GaTKl9V5JhewIXNMCcWdpnAfIF8Ztnz3tprD23ZvvKdQDSnvy42OmmoSgkoMqM_QNt1KWXV9S520Yz1v5fR7qqn8JcuS4-Sp7cb-iYDMjsTmlI2Klb4pKAibdRUlhikV5hIqSUmo2_2OSKgBdZeqc8WnIluQ2QYRXI0TB4-pE3AFaDjxsBA7QSVo-a13_UDx6tG851WojuJ_7jSoEeEeTBnflEp3Tl6z5_j6DWmOFJnn7gdH-fRfUl9vvg-nju4xKGziuutTQiiOrvJCwTbC0_DyJlLkzM5MOhoaHmFamFk0jYNPTB-VR0lbtz0tFiDVTLYIjkIm6YYnrLCyxkwVR5cXxAu5GGmcke17BuiWrpWWjHq7mppS-9ZWSPyLHBf061y6AsbAuhBjNE%3D)

And we are once again taking the leading role for the legacy of President Trump and his America First agenda _by helping to elect as many Trump Republicans to Congress as we can,_ securing new GOP majorities in the U.S. House and Senate, and forcing Joe Biden to work for the American people, not against them **\-- and pave the way for another Trump run, or America First candidate in 2024.**

While the Biden Democrats can rely on the massive funding of globalist billionaire elites, Hollywood liberals, and left-wing special interest groups, we rely on [**the patriotic generosity of grassroots leaders like you.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=f98b0a1ad7ea49c1ad8d3aa7694dc186&_e=G304vlMHV6m1VIyFXt7fUqhMcEF8mvo_Orlpth-RhQFGQSrZeh0tDh8K0sIQPU3PxMydqvgtWW0CbwF8rBA0H81L2W5U_GaTKl9V5JhewIXNMCcWdpnAfIF8Ztnz3tprD23ZvvKdQDSnvy42OmmoSgkoMqM_QNt1KWXV9S520Yz1v5fR7qqn8JcuS4-Sp7cb-iYDMjsTmlI2Klb4pKAibdRUlhikV5hIqSUmo2_2OSKgBdZeqc8WnIluQ2QYRXI0LVVWhKhJO0EfJnTGxC9bF-M0nn179_k-Bdxe4IXqdcpyCZqU__H8x_RHIxoc-Fba_PUv8U1A9iPFLsTpemjEZnS2Ivp4u5y6PD49kI3b0Bd77t97IdIygH572yDIVgdfEwMLiVnETrsj3nvLjGTlI35dO13qFYaCzxlGD7S6kJ69vgXUkaPMiuoTEvxPkiTHHUid1TP0VozaddLyzUl9Yc8aZhGYebTWLFrc-Rp9wTk%3D)

You are among our key supporters, Peter -- I'm extremely grateful for everything you do -- [**and I'm asking you to continue that support today.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=f98b0a1ad7ea49c1ad8d3aa7694dc186&_e=G304vlMHV6m1VIyFXt7fUqhMcEF8mvo_Orlpth-RhQFGQSrZeh0tDh8K0sIQPU3PxMydqvgtWW0CbwF8rBA0H81L2W5U_GaTKl9V5JhewIXNMCcWdpnAfIF8Ztnz3tprD23ZvvKdQDSnvy42OmmoSgkoMqM_QNt1KWXV9S520Yz1v5fR7qqn8JcuS4-Sp7cb-iYDMjsTmlI2Klb4pKAibdRUlhikV5hIqSUmo2_2OSKgBdZeqc8WnIluQ2QYRXI0197LclVmyqNN7vcHLf2f-HG8-9eTm0Q8KDmRQQOzxiBnie1_84iO7-wiCjCGzVHPP5vYznD5SiNt4rJaDomxQ7i9yYU0GxeKSpjHIuxTCC8sXMABYEDv-Qu77zn0bYDN--BpeU5ZRzeEROr_o3DsNvqiyanNlQRXbpy8P4m0wPQvWiaYuBOEji-38ww-da9edHnCNF8MiHHB_6ITh0cSKutk-dI2GWmoNjXQ_MfxTX8%3D)

The kind of resources that have made possible over 25,000 TV spots, award-winning Trump ads, 300,000 radio ads, 2.5 million pieces of mail, 30 million phone calls, 2 national bus tours and staffed field offices in the fiercest battleground states

We have been -- and still are -- what _The Wall Street Journal_ called **“the largest, most reputable, and most active Super PAC backing Donald Trump”** \-- and our fight continues!

The stakes have never been higher, and Great America PAC’s ability to mobilize for victory in 2022 has never been needed more. So please, [**, help us continue to stand and fight for President Trump, his vision for America, and the men and women who are ready to fight for it in Washington, D.C.!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=f98b0a1ad7ea49c1ad8d3aa7694dc186&_e=G304vlMHV6m1VIyFXt7fUqhMcEF8mvo_Orlpth-RhQFGQSrZeh0tDh8K0sIQPU3PxMydqvgtWW0CbwF8rBA0H81L2W5U_GaTKl9V5JhewIXNMCcWdpnAfIF8Ztnz3tprD23ZvvKdQDSnvy42OmmoSgkoMqM_QNt1KWXV9S520Yz1v5fR7qqn8JcuS4-Sp7cb-iYDMjsTmlI2Klb4pKAibdRUlhikV5hIqSUmo2_2OSKgBdZeqc8WnIluQ2QYRXI0Y2zbaLFGQ7Y70coPbsMbDEV_dXBi766c5wmgSD4TCd-VJU4wZTyr1F_NX9DxPkCsDNo_FpWV0RTVpezFtY1hulFs7UYdhYsLBgf_3IEG-65M_aSAROhabIvDcwVtaiFCQsE7y2tUQyGIbtLcCi-RV9lXWfCuNaWn2TvXxN_tgaMMIIMUQVjp8fW0x-0oNTWnkKMPJSFjAU25lfxUtkqz4JHViUtOsX0rEiPR17mBfLE%3D)

clean_body: the late 1970s “malaise” of Democrat Jimmy Carter’s disastrous presidency, with the same consequences for America that we’re facing now. | | | Peter, I remember it well, and if you were around, you probably do, too -- the late 1970s “malaise” of Democrat Jimmy Carter’s disastrous presidency, with the same consequences for America that we’re facing now. Like then, the liberal Democrat agenda was being imposed on working Americans and families who also faced skyrocketing prices from rampant inflation, a surge in violent crime levels in our communities, scarcity of basic goods like food and gasoline, and chaos overseas. But even during that dark time for our country, when the promise of the American Dream seemed almost a thing of the past, the will to demand better \-- and achieve it -- grew in our people, and out of that movement we elected Ronald Reagan President -- and the rest is history. I was there, Peter, -- serving as Assistant to the President for Political Affairs in the Reagan White House, as we began the great reversal and revived our country from the Democrats’ “malaise” of crime, inflation, and chaos. By unshackling the American people from tax-and-spend liberalism, restoring law and order, and reasserting confidence and strength overseas, we can still save the United States. Peter, that’s exactly what we’re working so hard to once again achieve here at Great America PAC -- empowering the people with the truth about the catastrophic Biden Democrat control of Washington, D.C., motivating grassroots organization against it, and preparing to support Trump Republican candidates who will sweep to victory in Congress in November. But Peter, we’ve already entered the pivotal 2022 Midterm Election year, and as the leading outside group still supporting President Donald Trump and candidates nationwide who are running to defeat the globalist, socialist, Pelosi-Schumer Democrats tearing down President Trump’s commonsense policies and our country with it -- And we are once again taking the leading role for the legacy of President Trump and his America First agenda by helping to elect as many Trump Republicans to Congress as we can, securing new GOP majorities in the U.S. House and Senate, and forcing Joe Biden to work for the American people, not against them \-- and pave the way for another Trump run, or America First candidate in 2024. While the Biden Democrats can rely on the massive funding of globalist billionaire elites, Hollywood liberals, and left-wing special interest groups, we rely on You are among our key supporters, Peter -- I'm extremely grateful for everything you do -- The kind of resources that have made possible over 25,000 TV spots, award-winning Trump ads, 300,000 radio ads, 2.5 million pieces of mail, 30 million phone calls, 2 national bus tours and staffed field offices in the fiercest battleground states We have been -- and still are -- what The Wall Street Journal called “the largest, most reputable, and most active Super PAC backing Donald Trump” \-- and our fight continues! The stakes have never been higher, and Great America PAC’s ability to mobilize for victory in 2022 has never been needed more. So please, Thank you, Peter -- Sincerely, Ed Rollins Chairman, Great America PAC | | | Paid for by Great America PAC 107 S. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Corporate Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Year after year, corporate Democrats lose elections and blame
progressives. The Democratic establishment did it in 2020 when the House
majority shrunk and they did it in November when a corporate Democrat lost
the Virginia governor’s race. Now, they’re getting ready to blame
progressives in 2022.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88838?refcode=em20220113-21466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme ]Tweet from The Hill reads Centrists are warning progressives to back
off with their favorite rhetoric as the Democratic Party enters a
challenging midterm year where it is in deep danger of losing the House
and Senate majorities

Peter, we know
that if corporate Democrats spent their time passing Build Back Better or
supporting hugely popular policies like Medicare for All and a Green New
Deal, the party could win over voters in November. Instead, corporate
Democrats continue catering to their Wall Street donors. They won’t even
pass the most basic reforms pending in Congress — like lowering
prescription drug costs or renewing the Child Tax Credit.

Justice Democrats is fighting to transform the Democratic Party to one
that truly represents the people. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88838?refcode=em20220113-21466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme ]We continue that fight this year by
working to elect 6 new progressive fighters to Congress. Can you rush a
$3 donation right now so we can elect representatives who
know what we need to do to deliver for the people?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88838?refcode=em20220113-21466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme ]Contribute $3

This isn’t about progressive “rhetoric” hurting Democrats in elections.
It’s about the political establishment and corporate donors trying to
block progressive policies, no matter what. Because we know progressive
policies are a win for the people and at the ballot box.

Justice Democrat Cori Bush says it best:

“If Democrats brought home expansive climate action, a federal minimum
wage of at least $15, paid leave, police reform, and Medicare for All, we
would win in a landslide. The problem is that these are not getting done,
year after year, even while basic necessities like housing and health care
keep getting more and more expensive.”

The best way we can counter the lies of the political establishment and
their all-out effort to block transformative change is by electing more
Justice Democrats, who we know will be our loudest advocates for Medicare
for All, a Green New Deal, and so much more. It’s time the Democratic
Party puts people over profit.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88838?refcode=em20220113-21466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme ]Peter,
we’re in a fight against the
corporate-funded Democrat establishment — we need all the grassroots help
we can get to elect more fighters for the people. Can you chip in
$3 today so we can keep up our fight?

We can only do this together.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220113-21466-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21466_1203867_rsrhme&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21466%2E1203867%2Ersrhme

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Important Message from Nick Freitas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Patriots, I’m proud to endorse my friend Jeanine Lawson for Congress in Virginia’s 10th District. Just like us, she’s been a relentless fighter for our conservative values for the last twenty years. She’s a Reagan Republican committed to carrying the “banner of bold colors, no pale pastels.” Jeanine won’t just vote the right way in Congress; she will carry the banner for our conservative constitutional principles and push our agenda forward. From a grassroots leader to a Prince William County Supervisor, Jeanine has stood up to the radical liberal agenda. Jeanine is a committed constitutionalist who will promote individual liberty and a limited government like the Founders envisioned. Jeanine is proudly pro-life and will oppose taxpayer-funded abortion that violates the Hyde Amendment. Jeanine will work to cut taxes and support a government that lives within its means. Jeanine will stand tough against regulations and fees that interfere with Americans' everyday lives and are beyond the scope of the Constitution. We can trust her to stand with us NOT the DC Swamp. But she needs your help.
---
| [Donate NOW](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9d55c63721&e=fc83fb200d "Donate NOW")
---
| As a steadfast conservative she’ll defend our founding principles, promote the free market, oppose government expansion, fight tax hikes, and work to ensure that our government lives within its means. Jeanine is a lover of liberty who we can count on to stand strong for us.

body:
The biggest misinformation spreader in the Senate is running for reelection.

| **_— BREAKING BREAKING BREAKING —_**

**SEN. RON JOHNSON, SUPER-SPREADER OF ELECTION AND VACCINE MISINFORMATION, WILL SEEK REELECTION** \- _Vanity Fair_ ** Here is the BAD news: ** The biggest misinformation spreader in the Senate is going back on his promise and running for reelection in Wisconsin.

** But here is the GREAT news: ** Presiden Biden won Wisconsin in 2020, and our Democrat can win again this year! _The latest poll shows this race in a DEAD HEAT:_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40661423/325366204/-1164897574?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0N2FhODFhLWQxNzQtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tWBPSvcDzou_XgQpJsMbchI_2WAb0I91-lBLny6riiI=) **So we’re pulling out all the stops to DEFEAT the biggest misinformation spreader in the Senate. As a member of Team Hahn, you know the issues that are affecting you and your community best, and every year I'm sure you witness things that could be different, things that could get better – but simply don't. **Priorities that matter the most to you matter to our campaign.**

For Kara to flip New York's 1st District blue, we need to know about issues that folks like you care about. Kara's resolute in tackling the challenges facing working people and families across New York, but she can't get started if you don't share.
