\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Kara Hahn**
Date: Wed, Jan 12, 2022
Subject: Representation starts with listening

Hi there,

With the start of a New Year comes a new list of resolutions, whether to spend more time with family and friends, meet a big goal or make a difference in the world around us.

My New Year's resolution is to flip NY's 1st District, so I can help pass legislation that supports our community and helps our families afford to live on Long Island. **But I know that representation starts with listening, which is why I'm hoping to hear from you today.**

**[Will you take my campaign's quick 2022 resolutions survey now, friend? Let me know what issues are top of mind for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40661426/325366207/-1198005091?ms=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&refcode=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdhYTgxYS1kMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lsFOK4WMyWbKbdUAV17JNrv1NLV9o48p5ZivLJFXU_I=&emci=e8d35cce-b074-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=457aa81a-d174-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369896)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40661427/325366209/-1198005091?ms=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&refcode=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdhYTgxYS1kMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lsFOK4WMyWbKbdUAV17JNrv1NLV9o48p5ZivLJFXU_I=&emci=e8d35cce-b074-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=457aa81a-d174-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369896) As a legislator, I don't pretend to have the perfect answer to every problem. Instead, I've always listened to the concerns of members of my community and collaborated with advocates and experts to find solutions that work.

For example, until it was brought to my attention, I didn't know that renters in my community were not able to get their water quality tested without their landlord's approval. I was happy to work with the local water provider to correct that policy, which was creating inequity in parts of Suffolk County.

Similarly, when I first was elected as a county legislator, I wasn't sure what role I could play in combating the opioid epidemic. Yet, I knew it was a problem that needed attention. So I partnered with organizations on the frontlines of this fight, and have been able to write and pass legislation that's saved thousands of lives.

**So today, I'm asking for YOUR input, and I want you to know that your feedback will be central to my campaign and my priorities as we move forward in 2022.**

**[Tell me: What are your top priorities for Congress in the New Year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40661430/325366210/-1198005091?ms=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&refcode=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdhYTgxYS1kMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lsFOK4WMyWbKbdUAV17JNrv1NLV9o48p5ZivLJFXU_I=&emci=e8d35cce-b074-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=457aa81a-d174-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369896)** [Protecting women's rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40661432/325366213/-1198005091?ms=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&refcode=em22_220113_newyearsurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdhYTgxYS1kMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lsFOK4WMyWbKbdUAV17JNrv1NLV9o48p5ZivLJFXU_I=&emci=e8d35cce-b074-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=457aa81a-d174-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369896) [COVID-19 response and clean_body: | = Hi there, we just wanted to make sure you saw this email from Kara. As a member of Team Hahn, you know the issues that are affecting you and your community best, and every year I'm sure you witness things that could be different, things that could get better – but simply don't. Priorities that matter the most to you matter to our campaign. For Kara to flip New York's 1st District blue, we need to know about issues that folks like you care about. Kara's resolute in tackling the challenges facing working people and families across New York, but she can't get started if you don't share. Thanks, Kelley Campaign Manager Kara Hahn for Congress \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Kara Hahn Date: Wed, Jan 12, 2022 Subject: Representation starts with listening Hi there, With the start of a New Year comes a new list of resolutions, whether to spend more time with family and friends, meet a big goal or make a difference in the world around us. My New Year's resolution is to flip NY's 1st District, so I can help pass legislation that supports our community and helps our families afford to live on Long Island. But I know that representation starts with listening, which is why I'm hoping to hear from you today. As a legislator, I don't pretend to have the perfect answer to every problem. Instead, I've always listened to the concerns of members of my community and collaborated with advocates and experts to find solutions that work. For example, until it was brought to my attention, I didn't know that renters in my community were not able to get their water quality tested without their landlord's approval. I was happy to work with the local water provider to correct that policy, which was creating inequity in parts of Suffolk County. Similarly, when I first was elected as a county legislator, I wasn't sure what role I could play in combating the opioid epidemic. Yet, I knew it was a problem that needed attention. So I partnered with organizations on the frontlines of this fight, and have been able to write and pass legislation that's saved thousands of lives. So today, I'm asking for YOUR input, and I want you to know that your feedback will be central to my campaign and my priorities as we move forward in 2022. Thank you, Kara Hahn | Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

Keep Wisconsin safe by putting criminals behind bars [](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=b4da95aeb235429686b68100c48fdde9&_e=U2GWtIXtJyofW_ZiwolTlUgHVrAa0Oep-xTh4s_q52aGLw3GznPfb95q6EeLYhSxDPy4j6JWt3_-yzjvFPuqoj-GxxXLkqHP0eRU9j5F2cKgY8GVFQUQLpTNHDXDarLgyHf_ii5K7qmlkceI09cA8bZ0v17d5orMKh259sC9PatSzJH7PBibvHNAabEr859FEGJEaKUlfVlBaiGy7_YVv-ufDyywOptkbgHD_qjom4QdMrvgRRtAp7ShhNG-5aulzFVrMVlwetBc78PKu_32eUFwQ8WSJZgNxHuiyWqy2CfVUR28M_3gqXvqjFIqUjPB) Friend, Wisconsin and the nation were horrified by the brutal attack on the Waukesha Christmas parade. **But Wisconsin liberals are hoping you've moved on. ** They don't want you to remember the outrage you felt by this heinous act – _and how you felt when you realized that the perpetrator was out on $1,000 bail! _ **John Chisholm needs to be held accountable for keeping this dangerous criminal on the streets, and Tony Evers needs to be held accountable for choosing to not removing Chisholm from his post – immediately.** [**Sign my petition to DEMAND Governor Tony Evers fire John Chisholm NOW!**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=b4da95aeb235429686b68100c48fdde9&_e=U2GWtIXtJyofW_ZiwolTlUgHVrAa0Oep-xTh4s_q52aGLw3GznPfb95q6EeLYhSxDPy4j6JWt3_-yzjvFPuqoj-GxxXLkqHP0eRU9j5F2cLYf_nYKBLFt0uw2dIw3R_z761zIgaPi19V0gPUZP4rZol22DV9ThhWubeopHmEcAokKIt69HHS8rTIMHhVyBHn-NM1yayTaT9o_dWvYOx9MbgZZxHeQ0vseCI8-nwlp31JUb5HiC7rsS1DUa3o70jQ0amwvoDBOpLD-SsY2SMy7lbF-m4p9zVwEOqns3VOD8voHuG2Ghc0GopyecW9jEGv) [](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=b4da95aeb235429686b68100c48fdde9&_e=U2GWtIXtJyofW_ZiwolTlUgHVrAa0Oep-xTh4s_q52aGLw3GznPfb95q6EeLYhSxDPy4j6JWt3_-yzjvFPuqoj-GxxXLkqHP0eRU9j5F2cJsUB3EOPeg7LVlWdUAcdkppOz5YH06n23SqBNks2Hv-arwWdhA4u8zkvOozRNfExaNw7_0RtIWJ-KKqWghUpvvQU8WshJSDZxppduh0doMZF2jJweeM9Iux8BjIdFWibxt9wa2XwIH7lrhaKNwO2S9zVun1GZHmTaEQYTLWte-EHdRt0J_PMMkDUhZZBmbYiTaop7wbxktUk4O2CrGWKQ-) Even John Chisholm himself realized that his approach will result in death, saying, **"is there going to be an individual I divert, or I put into treatment program, who’s going to go out and kill somebody? You bet. Guaranteed. It’s guaranteed to happen. It does not invalidate the overall approach.”** This was an avoidable tragedy. It's up to US to avoid the next one. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Can I Count on You in 2022?
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I urge you to give your support to Judicial Watch in 2022!
And I hope I can count on you to stand on the front lines with us by [supporting our work with a generous tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57633&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
Judicial Watch supporters have helped us break critically important ground fighting for the principle that "no one is above the law."
[Giving us your support now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57633&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=), at the very beginning of the year, will have a direct impact on our ability to:
* **_Keep fighting_** to keep our elections honest
* **_Keep fighting_** to expose how our tax dollars are being used to promote Marxist "Critical Race Theory" in public schools and our military
* **_Keep fighting_** to shut down sanctuary cities and secure our borders
* **_Keep fighting_** for accountability in Congress
* **_Keep fighting_** to expose the Fauci Covid scandal and collusion between Big Government and Big Tech to silence conservatives
* **_Keep fighting_** _against_ illegal government secrecy and _for_ the people's "right to know"

[By joining us today with a tax-deductible gift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57633&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=), we can continue to hold corrupt officials and politicians accountable!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57633&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Thank you for helping us.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I have seen great courage
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
People have told me that I am courageous, but I too have seen great courage.
#

Friends —
People have told me that I am courageous, but I too have seen great courage.
I have seen it in the health care professionals who go into work every day during the middle of a deadly pandemic. I have seen it in law enforcement and firefighters who run toward the danger while everyone else runs away. And I have seen it in parents working hard and struggling to make ends meet for their children.
I also see it in my husband Mark.
Every day, he goes into the Senate and casts votes putting Arizonans ahead of corporate special interests, and the corporations don’t like that.
Taking those votes mean he’s running for re-election with the former president attacking him relentlessly while facing tens of millions of dollars in attack ads. But he does it anyway.
And the truth is, Mark knows he can withstand those attacks because of you — because you’re there for him every time he needs it.
And today is one of those days he needs your help:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark’s re-election campaign before Donald Trump visits Arizona and our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close this week? It would mean a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220113-2-subs&t=1&refcode2=1927_6688874_V_UD7x&akid=1927%2E6688874%2EV_UD7x)

Friend,
Valentine's Day is just around the corner, and it looks like Liz Cheney found her match! Liz knows her time in Congress is coming to an end, so she has her eyes on 2024.

Liz knows she can’t win a Republican primary, so she has her eyes on Joe Biden! Joe is truly a match made in Heaven for Liz Cheney. They both suffer from Trump Derangement Syndrome, believe in putting America Last, and voting for the War in Iraq!

This dream team would melt the hearts of the military industrial complex, the Lincoln Project, and all others that suffer from TDS.

We’re glad Liz has found her clique in Washington, DC with the other coastal elites who are dedicated to undermining everything President Trump accomplished and going after his supporters.

But, if Liz Cheney wants to dedicate her life to pursuing a personal vendetta against Donald Trump, she should be doing it on her own time. That’s why we are calling on Liz Cheney to RESIGN from Wyoming’s only congressional seat so we can have a representative that puts our priorities first, not Biden’s.

[_Do you think Liz Cheney Should Resign? clean_body: | | | | Coastal Elites who despise President Trump. | Friend, Valentine's Day is just around the corner, and it looks like Liz Cheney found her match! Liz knows her time in Congress is coming to an end, so she has her eyes on 2024. Liz knows she can’t win a Republican primary, so she has her eyes on Joe Biden! Joe is truly a match made in Heaven for Liz Cheney. They both suffer from Trump Derangement Syndrome, believe in putting America Last, and voting for the War in Iraq! This dream team would melt the hearts of the military industrial complex, the Lincoln Project, and all others that suffer from TDS. We’re glad Liz has found her clique in Washington, DC with the other coastal elites who are dedicated to undermining everything President Trump accomplished and going after his supporters. But, if Liz Cheney wants to dedicate her life to pursuing a personal vendetta against Donald Trump, she should be doing it on her own time. That’s why we are calling on Liz Cheney to RESIGN from Wyoming’s only congressional seat so we can have a representative that puts our priorities first, not Biden’s. -Team Hageman | | | |

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ][IMG]

Hello,

This is urgent. Senator Kyrsten Sinema just announced she will not support
eliminating the filibuster, effectively killing Democrats’ voting rights
legislation.

It's clear a 50-50 tie in the Senate isn't cutting it. We have to expand
our majority if we want to abolish the filibuster and make real progress.
If we win Ohio, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to do just that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6472?t=1007&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ]I’m angry and I’m sure you are too. Please, rush a donation to help us
flip Ohio blue. We can’t afford to lose this race with so much on the
line.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6473?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ]DONATE

Earlier today, I proudly cast my vote in the House to restore and
strengthen voting rights. We must do whatever it takes to pass these
reforms in the Senate—we can’t let a single Senator stand in our way of
progress.

Look, everyone knows I’m the first person to stand up to my own party when
I don’t agree with something. But we owe it to our constituents to protect
our sacred voting rights, and make progress on the issues they voted for.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6472?t=1008&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ]I’m sick and tired of good bills dying on the Senate floor. If you are
too, pitch in a donation to help us flip Ohio blue so we can expand the
Democratic majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6473?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ]DONATE

We should be fighting to make people’s lives easier—not harder. That’s why
Americans elected us and it’s time we deliver on our promises.

When we win this Senate race, I can assure you I’ll do just that.

—Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2041%2E3611125%2EaRS_5G ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

subject: Joe Biden’s Legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Barr for Congress Christopher E
body:
Our country can’t afford another mismanaged year of Democrat leadership, just look at what Biden and the Democrat-run Congress has done this past year |
_No longer want to receive emails from Andy Barr for Congress? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b32f7c7f4e2f4d428bf93677c36092f2&_t=DlMlTavc5JGJv42PRm-0r8cFPglFNFX7ztl_4Els6OpAX2YizDl8_Lig5nBApwfzbvdXfMGqK8TKrJhJz3VhV6G7hUaCLkcx-nKDOfrgvgBfGdYqd9NIDKjKH2WDOFENROokua_XW0j8YVQ3YluF4Z9VGt1wtXSDPAOF8qvghik%3D)._

---
Fellow American - Joe Biden has been in office for a year... _and America is worse off because of it._

He can’t continue to ride the coattails of Trump’s successes anymore.

Joe Biden’s legacy thus far:
* Surging border crisis (Nearly 2 million illegal migrants in our country on his watch)
* Spiraling pandemic with no end in sight... and no solution
* Record-high inflation
* A chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan, costing American lives
* Countless campaign promises broken

And yet, the Leftist sheep still applaud him. As we approach a year under complete control of the do-nothing Democrats _(well, do nothing good for our country)_ , it’s time to ensure we put America FIRST once again.

How can we start? We’re ten months out from the 2022 mid-term elections. Ten months away from firing Nancy Pelosi, taking back the House, and beginning to rebuild our country from the absolute mess that Democrats have made.

Hi there,

I'm Ale, Angela's new campaign manager! I wanted to introduce myself and share why I'm so excited to be in Maryland with Angela.

When Angela and I first chatted about her campaign, immediately I could hear the care and passion she has for her community and the folks of MD-04. It confirmed everything I already knew about her. I was just in Virginia, managing Delegate Candi King's successful reelection campaign, and I saw firsthand the drive and dedication to their communities candidates needed to have in order to win -- and I knew that's what Angela has. Not only does she have the _grit, tenacity, and courage_ to fight for bold policies that will make lives better for hardworking folks, **she will fight and win.**

Representation of our communities matters, yet we still have an all-male Maryland congressional delegation. **I believe that Angela's fearless work as an attorney and children's advocate, her unwavering commitment to enacting progressive policies as a Maryland Delegate, and her inspirational personal journey is exactly the voice we need to help folks get back up after this terrible pandemic and push more progress through Congress.**

Angela is ready to fight and to serve – I know she's ready to get to work for you.

**[Real quick, as a campaign manager, I wouldn't be doing my job if I didn't ask, so can you chip in a little to celebrate the first month of Angela's launch? name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Kyrsten Sinema is a sellout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter: Sen. Kyrsten Sinema just announced that she will not support the filibuster reform that Democrats are counting on to pass critical voting rights legislation – and, to put it mildly, I have some thoughts on that.
I am shocked by the absolute absurdity of Sen. Sinema today. She took to the Senate floor to talk about the filibuster as if it's some tool of civility or compromise when the GOP is actively exploiting it to block legislation that would protect our most fundamental, cherished right – the right to vote.
**Let's be honest with ourselves here: The Senate is broken.** When I served in the House, I watched as countless bipartisan bills that would move our country forward died in McConnell's Senate time and time again. Now, Democrats technically have control, but Sen. Sinema has the power to obstruct policies that the vast majority of Americans support.
I won't mince words, I don't know what compelled Sen. Sinema to serve in Congress, but I do know that she _refuses_ to do anything – anything at all – for working families like the one that I grew up in. **I don't know if she forgot where she came from or who she's there to fight for.**
**But I do know that I'm done with having our entire Democratic agenda rest in the hands of a single senator. It's time that we expand our Senate majority. **Now, with Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real chance to do it right here in Iowa.
**Peter, you have my word: Send me to the Senate, and I will be the 50th vote we need to reform the filibuster.** I'll fight tooth and nail to protect voting rights, raise the federal minimum wage, and pass the PRO Act to strengthen workers' rights and our unions.
**I'm doing everything within my power to defeat Sen. Grassley and move our country forward, I just need you with me. [So please, can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority, and pass critical legislation to move our country forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40661881/325377675/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk604-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyMmRmZi1kNTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ci8RtsTKTGhDt1gTOBGw_Q6UVINb-VygXTm_GpulMAU=)**
I know days like this can be frustrating and hard. So thank you so much for standing with me and fighting today.

– Abby

Peter, you have my word: Send me to the Senate, and I will be the 50th vote we need to reform the filibuster. I'll fight tooth and nail to protect voting rights, raise the federal minimum wage, and pass the PRO Act to strengthen workers' rights and our unions. I'm doing everything within my power to defeat Sen. Grassley and move our country forward, I just need you with me. = I know days like this can be frustrating and hard. So thank you so much for standing with me and fighting today. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

clean_body: It’s what Soros and Kamala don’t understand... | Peter, I was truly humbled by how many America First patriots stepped up and gave $20.22 to help us begin 2022 on the best possible footing. But it’s not about the amount our supporters give, it’s about the size of our grassroots army... In fact, this is exactly what Kamala and her megadonors like George Soros underestimate each and every time, and it’s what will cost her the 50-50 Senate majority come November. Which is why I’m now asking every patriot in our grassroots army to as a pledge of support to kick off the election year. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Eric Greitens Date: Fri, January 7, 2021 Subject: \----- $20.22 ----- To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, The election year is officially upon us and as much as I hate to say it, the fate of the 50-50 Senate majority will no doubt come down to money. Kamala and her DSCC are sitting on a war chest of over $81 MILLION – meaning we’re going to have to fight tooth and nail to fend off their lying attacks and smears. But the sheer size of our grassroots army gives us an edge Kamala and the Left never saw coming... If every supporter in our grassroots army contributes just $20.22 as a pledge of support to kick off 2022, we’ll have the resources we need to fight back against Kamala’s multimillion-dollar attacks. clean_body: | | | | The OSHA vaccine mandate has been struck down by the U.S. Supreme Court. Dear Peter, Moments ago, we just heard the OSHA vaccine mandate , which would have mandated testing and vaccination for employers with over 100 employees, has been BLOCKED by the U.S. Supreme Court. I'm reaching out to you because I wanted you to be the first to know. Biden knows the Attorneys General are standing strong against his BLATANTand ILLEGAL federal overreach. We will not allow him to further divide our country and destroy our economy. But now, Bloomberg, Soros, and the far-left are going to come after me. They always do after we have big wins. | | | | | So many great Patriots have stepped up to support our fight against unlawful mandates. We are reaching out to you, Peter, to see if you would consider taking a stand with them TODAY. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. body:
I need to make sure you saw my message below.

---
Hi, friend – apologies for dropping into your inbox again, but I need to make sure you saw my message below.
**I won't reach my grassroots fundraising goal before midnight tonight without the immediate help of 500 more Democratic supporters.**
Flipping Florida blue is critical to giving Democrats the extra Senate seat we need to abolish the filibuster, restore voting rights and save our democracy. But right now, we’re hard-pressed to defend our Senate and combat GOP-led voter suppression.
And with polls showing a tight race, I desperately need to hit tonight's fundraising goal to overcome Marco Rubio's millionaire donors and surge ahead:
**Please friend, our democracy is at risk.[Will you contribute $5 or more today to help me flip Florida blue and defend our sacred voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662091/325381520/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2148-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTAxOTUxMi1kODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPwXjW2iu-7Xj_KGoizxAC8o5p_WSP7Uf__X0wjI-2w=)**
I can't thank you enough for your help.

Val Demings \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Val Demings**
Subject: I'll be the 50th vote Democrats need to end the filibuster and pass voting rights protections
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662092/325381521/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2148-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTAxOTUxMi1kODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPwXjW2iu-7Xj_KGoizxAC8o5p_WSP7Uf__X0wjI-2w=)

This is _huge_ , friend: President Biden just announced his support for reforming the filibuster to finally pass crucial voting rights legislation through the Senate.
But here's the problem: It will take 50 votes to get rid of this archaic rule, which means any one senator can stand in the way of progress. That's why **Democrats _must_ expand our Senate majority – and my race in Florida can virtually _guarantee_ we do. **
As GOP lawmakers across the country enact hundreds of voter suppression bills, legislation to uphold and expand the right to vote could not be more important. **I voted to protect voting rights in the House. And when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight like hell again to make sure voting rights legislation passes, because in the words of my dear friend, the late Rep. John Lewis, "Democracy is not a state. It is an act, and each generation must do its part." **

Last week, on Jan. 6, we remembered an attack on our democracy – and it's clear our nation is at an inflection point. We need to do our part now and protect the right to vote.
That's why I'm here today personally asking you – **will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to abolish the filibuster and protect the right to vote?**
**[Please, give now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority. With polls showing this race neck and neck, every single dollar would help guarantee a Democratic Senate and enough votes to end the filibuster and pass voting rights protections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662093/325381522/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2148-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTAxOTUxMi1kODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPwXjW2iu-7Xj_KGoizxAC8o5p_WSP7Uf__X0wjI-2w=)**

Protecting voting rights is the kind of legislation that more than 81 million Americans voted for in 2020. **But too many elected officials continue to stand in the way – allowing outdated Senate rules like the filibuster to stop us from making progress and ensuring everyone has the right to vote.**
I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator.
**But I can't get there without your help.** **[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now to send another Democrat to the U.S. Senate who will fight for everyday Americans and secure progress like voting rights protections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662098/325381527/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2148-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTAxOTUxMi1kODc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPwXjW2iu-7Xj_KGoizxAC8o5p_WSP7Uf__X0wjI-2w=)**

Val Demings

clean_body: I need to make sure you saw my message below. Hi, friend – apologies for dropping into your inbox again, but I need to make sure you saw my message below. I won't reach my grassroots fundraising goal before midnight tonight without the immediate help of 500 more Democratic supporters. Flipping Florida blue is critical to giving Democrats the extra Senate seat we need to abolish the filibuster, restore voting rights and save our democracy. But right now, we’re hard-pressed to defend our Senate and combat GOP-led voter suppression. And with polls showing a tight race, I desperately need to hit tonight's fundraising goal to overcome Marco Rubio's millionaire donors and surge ahead: Please friend, our democracy is at risk.= I can't thank you enough for your help. Val Demings \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Val Demings Subject: I'll be the 50th vote Democrats need to end the filibuster and pass voting rights protections | | | = This is huge , friend: President Biden just announced his support for reforming the filibuster to finally pass crucial voting rights legislation through the Senate. But here's the problem: It will take 50 votes to get rid of this archaic rule, which means any one senator can stand in the way of progress. That's why Democrats must expand our Senate majority – and my race in Florida can virtually guarantee we do. As GOP lawmakers across the country enact hundreds of voter suppression bills, legislation to uphold and expand the right to vote could not be more important. I voted to protect voting rights in the House. And when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight like hell again to make sure voting rights legislation passes, because in the words of my dear friend, the late Rep. John Lewis, "Democracy is not a state. It is an act, and each generation must do its part." Last week, on Jan. 6, we remembered an attack on our democracy – and it's clear our nation is at an inflection point. We need to do our part now and protect the right to vote. That's why I'm here today personally asking you – will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to abolish the filibuster and protect the right to vote? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Protecting voting rights is the kind of legislation that more than 81 million Americans voted for in 2020. But too many elected officials continue to stand in the way – allowing outdated Senate rules like the filibuster to stop us from making progress and ensuring everyone has the right to vote. I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator. But I can't get there without your help. = Thank you so much for your support, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

clean_body: | Peter, My campaign team just gave me a memo with big news. The number of registered Democrats in Arizona’s 2nd District has dropped by thousands of voters over the past year. In a district as competitive as ours, this kind of news can make all the difference. To take advantage of this, we have launched our official Voter Registration Fund, to ensure that we have the conservative voters to flip this must win district. Registering voters takes time, labor, and resources. Our Voter Registration Fund will go toward ensuring that conservative voters in our district have their voices heard. We’re up against liberal third party groups that register voters throughout the country, but with your help we will succeed. We can’t give the Left any ground. Help us fight back against professional campaigners funded by Democrats’ campaign cash. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Team Sarah
subject: 13 people from Cresco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Here’s the deal, folks: A 50/50 Democratic Senate majority isn’t cutting it.

We need to flip Republican seats, and election experts are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Senator. Now that he’s officially running for re-election, it’s our job to continue building a campaign strong enough to defeat him and expand our majority.

One more vote in the U.S. Senate would allow us to make progress on the issues that matter most, like restoring voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, passing paid leave for all, tackling the climate crisis, and ending the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get the job done.

**When we defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin's Senate seat blue, Sarah Godlewski will be the vote we need to move our state and our country forward.**

The most recent head-to-head poll shows Sarah is the only Democrat who can beat Ron Johnson in a general election. But here's the thing: No matter how much momentum we have, this race won’t be easy. That’s why we’re counting on supporters like you to help us make sure we have the resources to take on the Republican establishment and win this election.

[**Please consider being one of the 13 donors we need from Cresco today. Your contribution will allow us to grow and sustain our momentum at a critical moment for this campaign, expand our lead against Ron Johnson, and make sure Democrats have one more vote in the U.S. Senate to get things done. name: Emily  Burns
subject: An Evening with Jodi Shaw ("Smith College Whistleblower")--Last minute (tomorrow, 1/15)
body:
Hello!

Thank you for your continued support and engagement with my campaign. One of the wonderful things about campaigning has been the incredible people I have met, in and out of the district. Jodi Shaw is one of the more interesting people, and is coming to my home tomorrow to speak about her experiences. She is colloquially known as the "[Smith College Whistleblower.](https://bariweiss.substack.com/p/whistleblower-at-smith-college-resigns)" Basically, she was at the intersection of what happens when social justice goes awry, and she spoke up about it--at great personal cost. I am very honored to have her at my home in Newton, and she will be speaking about the similarities with the shutdown of debate that has occurred with social justice excesses, as well as with COVID policy. She is not a Republican (I doubt she now has a party). This is an event about the conversations that we're not having (which, as I have been saying all along, is one of my chief reasons for running).

**Register here:**
[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/an-evening-with-jodi-shaw-tickets-244572582177](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/an-evening-with-jodi-shaw-tickets-244572582177)

If you are able to come, it would be lovely to see you. Just pizza, beer and wine for refreshments. If you don’t have childcare, but have kids old enough to hang out with other kids by themselves, feel free to bring them. We’ll have a big kids movie upstairs, and a little kids movie downstairs, so adults can converse on the main floor.

[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/an-evening-with-jodi-shaw-tickets-244572582177](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/an-evening-with-jodi-shaw-tickets-244572582177)

Hope all's well, stay warm this weekend, if I don't see you!

Sincerely,

Emily

P.S. feel free to invite others (including spouses, of course), but please don't post the message on social media, as it has our address. This is all via personal invite. Should be about 50 people--don't come if you're sick. My sense is everyone already got sick :)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Federalize Elections? Over my dead body…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I have a deadline! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6173eb4b73&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Some things are meant for the States and the States alone. The Federal Government was never meant to rule, it was meant to administer.

**But the Democrats and the Biden Administration want to be King. And if you want to see any failed Democratic state, look to those where elections were federalized, and the Ruler granted almighty power.**

I have been warning about the Democrats next steps after they stole the election in 2020 for well over a year now, and – well – here we are. They are pushing for the next step of Federalizing the elections.

_Fox News_ reports:

_"What is true today was not true then, and therefore the kind of changes that we need to make, the kind of modifications that we need to make must fit the times," Clyburn said._

_"Just because you’ve got one little nugget that was true back in 1876 doesn’t meant that that is true in 1976 ... This country has matured," he added. "This is not the same country it was over 200 years ago. We as a people must mature right along with it."_

What Representative Jim Clyburn is suggesting is absolutely preposterous. This is the same weak-spined argument that Liberals have been making for decades:

_The false and dangerous idea that the founding principles of the Constitution are meant to “evolve with the times.”_

His suggestion is to federalize elections, take it out of the State’s control.

**Over my dead body. This is supremely problematic to Democracy and to our Republic.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=06210783f3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There are several key problems with the Federalizing of Elections:
1. **Practically, it’s a disaster.**

The population of the United States is approximately 329 million. There are countless languages, ethnicities, cultures, infrastructures, administrative entities, and smaller governing bodies.
Any attempt to federally control elections by default is incapable of dealing with local and state issues. This is how election centers are overwhelmed by last-minute crazy requests from federal officials. This is, practically, how fraud is made possible.
1. **It undermines States’ rights.**

---
|
---
| The following excerpt comes from the Constitution’s Article I, section IV:

_The Times, Places and Manner of holding Elections for Senators and Representatives, shall be prescribed in each State by the Legislature thereof; but the Congress may at any time by Law make or alter such Regulations, except as to the Places of chusing Senators._

It is absolutely crystal clear that this is something that the Constitution has already dealt with, something which is protected fundamentally by God. The Elections are in the hands of the People and in the hands of the State, not the Federal Government!

** 3\. This is the pathway to more sham elections!**

If the first two reasons seem insufficient, this one should do it.The path to enabling further election fraud runs through the federalization of our elections.

**The amount of fraud is directly proportional to the amount of federal involvement – especially in a corrupt system.We saw this in 2020.And if we’re not careful, we will see this again in 2022 and in 2024.**

**Folks, I am waging a Crusade against anyone and everyone who would undermine the sanctity of American Elections.**

**_And this includes the Federalization of the Administration of elections! [We must fight to prevent fraud!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a4e3082c3d&e=44b8c466b0)_**

This is exactly why I, Mark Finchem, am running for Secretary of State of Arizona, where I will do absolutely everything in my power to protect our elections to make sure that Arizona becomes the gold standard of Election Integrity.

And we will accomplish this through using __technology_ _and __policy__ to protect our __freedoms.__
This is what I am doing through incredibly secure, currency grade watermarking that we developed and are pushing to be adopted nationwide.

This includes policy that I am putting forward in the State Legislature to increase transparency on the Ballot.

**Folks, this is a battle that I am fighting as we speak, and[I desperately need your help to win](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3892dff0a7&e=44b8c466b0). We need cash to push forward these initiatives and to win the Secretary of State!

Then there's this:**

_President Trump is coming to Arizona and I am a keynote speaker_. President Trump has endorsed me.

I am going to tell President Trump how much money I have on hand when he gets here. In order to keep up with my socialist-communist Democrat opponents, [I need to raise $25k by January 15th.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c12f735a54&e=44b8c466b0)

I am still $20k short.

[_Can you help me with a generous donation today of $25, $50, $100, $250 or more?_

_Help us wage our Crusade for Election Integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5bdcd5ee82&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=04fcc37a51&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=93ec3f40fe&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State

clean_body: I have a deadline! | | | | | Dear , Some things are meant for the States and the States alone. The Federal Government was never meant to rule, it was meant to administer. But the Democrats and the Biden Administration want to be King. And if you want to see any failed Democratic state, look to those where elections were federalized, and the Ruler granted almighty power. I have been warning about the Democrats next steps after they stole the election in 2020 for well over a year now, and – well – here we are. They are pushing for the next step of Federalizing the elections. Fox News reports: "What is true today was not true then, and therefore the kind of changes that we need to make, the kind of modifications that we need to make must fit the times," Clyburn said. "Just because you’ve got one little nugget that was true back in 1876 doesn’t meant that that is true in 1976 ... This country has matured," he added. "This is not the same country it was over 200 years ago. We as a people must mature right along with it." What Representative Jim Clyburn is suggesting is absolutely preposterous. This is the same weak-spined argument that Liberals have been making for decades: The false and dangerous idea that the founding principles of the Constitution are meant to “evolve with the times.” His suggestion is to federalize elections, take it out of the State’s control. Over my dead body. This is supremely problematic to Democracy and to our Republic. | | There are several key problems with the Federalizing of Elections: 1. Practically, it’s a disaster. The population of the United States is approximately 329 million. There are countless languages, ethnicities, cultures, infrastructures, administrative entities, and smaller governing bodies. Any attempt to federally control elections by default is incapable of dealing with local and state issues. This is how election centers are overwhelmed by last-minute crazy requests from federal officials. This is, practically, how fraud is made possible. 1. It undermines States’ rights. | | The following excerpt comes from the Constitution’s Article I, section IV: The Times, Places and Manner of holding Elections for Senators and Representatives, shall be prescribed in each State by the Legislature thereof; but the Congress may at any time by Law make or alter such Regulations, except as to the Places of chusing Senators. It is absolutely crystal clear that this is something that the Constitution has already dealt with, something which is protected fundamentally by God. The Elections are in the hands of the People and in the hands of the State, not the Federal Government! 3\. This is the pathway to more sham elections! If the first two reasons seem insufficient, this one should do it.The path to enabling further election fraud runs through the federalization of our elections. The amount of fraud is directly proportional to the amount of federal involvement – especially in a corrupt system.We saw this in 2020.And if we’re not careful, we will see this again in 2022 and in 2024. Folks, I am waging a Crusade against anyone and everyone who would undermine the sanctity of American Elections. And this includes the Federalization of the Administration of elections! This is exactly why I, Mark Finchem, am running for Secretary of State of Arizona, where I will do absolutely everything in my power to protect our elections to make sure that Arizona becomes the gold standard of Election Integrity. And we will accomplish this through using technology and policy to protect our freedoms. This is what I am doing through incredibly secure, currency grade watermarking that we developed and are pushing to be adopted nationwide. This includes policy that I am putting forward in the State Legislature to increase transparency on the Ballot. Folks, this is a battle that I am fighting as we speak, and. We need cash to push forward these initiatives and to win the Secretary of State! Then there's this: President Trump is coming to Arizona and I am a keynote speaker. President Trump has endorsed me. I am going to tell President Trump how much money I have on hand when he gets here. | Mississippi Freedom Caucus Statement on Personal Income Tax and Teacher Pay Bills
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **Contact** : Chairman Steve Hopkins Mississippi Freedom Caucus [662-469-6242](tel:662-469-6242) [info@freedomcaucus.ms](mailto:info@freedomcaucus.ms) **Jackson, MS (January 13, 2022) —** The Mississippi House of Representatives took two crucial votes yesterday during the 2022 regular session. Both votes were taken within 24 hours of the bills being introduced and quickly rushed through committee Tuesday evening. The Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2022 (294 pages long) was the first bill up for a vote and passed with 97 yes votes (primarily Republicans) and 25 representatives voting no, present, or absent. This bill is a marketed improvement from the bill introduced last year and does utilize an economic growth formula to reduce the state’s personal income tax in the long term, but still has issues that should be worked out before the final passage, including a sales tax increase from the now 7 percent general sales tax to 8.5 percent sales tax. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus (MFC) members supported this bill with a unanimous decision among its members, in order to keep the bill alive so that amendments and changes can be made along the way to continue to strengthen the bill and provide a pay raise for all Mississippians through a reduction in the overall tax burden of the state. The Strategically Accelerating the Recruitment and Retention of Teachers (START) Act of 2022 (18 pages long) was the second bill up for a vote and passed with 114 yes votes which included yes votes from all Democrat representatives and no votes only coming from all five MFC members and one other Republican representative. This bill requires an increase in the state’s tax burden in the amount of approximately $258 million for meritless teacher pay raises (including additional retirement benefits), accounting for roughly $4,000 – $6,000 in additional salary benefits for all certified K-12 teachers in the Mississippi public school system. This pay increase makes Mississippi have the highest teacher pay in the southeast when Mississippi was already 4th out of the nine southern states as compared to median household income. Prior to this bill, teachers in Mississippi were already making 8.6% higher than the average Mississippi worker. This pay increase comes at a time when our law enforcement officers across the state are leaving their jobs due to low pay, often making less than $30,000 per year, and corrections officers oven making as little as $18/hour. With the income tax elimination bill being passed just moments before the teacher pay raise bill, the Mississippi House of Representatives passed a 1.5 percent increase in general sales tax, that will negatively affect all Mississippians. If the corresponding $258 million annually recurring teacher pay raise was utilized in a more financially responsible way, the sales tax increase required to eliminate the state individual income tax could have been 0.5 percent lower, thereby only requiring a one (1) percent general sales tax increase. Utilizing the funds in this manner, would be a more fiscally sound policy that would provide all Mississippians with a raise. There are approximately 33,000 public school teachers in the state of Mississippi, accounting for 1 percent of all Mississippians. Therefore, the tax burden of $258 million from this bill falls on the shoulders of all Mississippians in the form of 0.5 percent general sales tax increase to benefit only one (1) percent of Mississippians, whereas a corresponding reduction in personal income tax would benefit 100 percent of working Mississippians. During a brief debate, MFC member Rep. Brady Williamson asked, “Are these pay increases tied to performance in the classroom?” for which the Education Committee Chairman Richard Bennet indicated that all teachers would receive the raise, remarking “Even the worst of them.” Rep. Williamson also asked regarding the local school district supplement, “May, possibly, [a local school district] change what they pay in their supplement?” for which Chairman Bennet replied, “They can increase it, but they can’t decrease it.” Based on the Chairman’s response the state, through this bill, now seeks to control a school district’s supplement pay amount for teachers preventing them from lowering the supplement during any times of economic downturn. Local school districts should be very concerned about the bill increasing state control over local school districts. MFC Chairman Steve Hopkins released a statement on Facebook prior to the votes saying, “I have a passion for teachers, my wife is a teacher, both of my daughters and my daughter in-law. My sister Tracy was a teacher and my sister Cindy was a teacher’s assistant... I could be selfish and do what’s best for my household and vote for a $4,000 raise or I could vote no and stand strong for all Mississippians... I want an income tax elimination, grocery tax cut and car tag cut that gives all Mississippians thousands of dollars of extra income.” The Mississippi Center for Public Policy, the state’s preeminent conservative think tank, ranked the teacher’s pay bill as a bill that erodes liberty with the statement, “After all costs are calculated, this is an extra $258 million dollars in new spending. After careful consideration, we have marked this as a bad bill.” The Mississippi Legislature has been presented with a unique opportunity at a time with the state coffers larger than they have ever been in history, to use sound fiscal policies to lower the tax burden of all Mississippi workers through individual income tax elimination, without simply raising taxes in another manner. The Legislature will not be able to make historic tax cuts that will benefit all Mississippians if the politicians in Jackson continue to increase the size and scope of our state’s tax burden, with all Mississippians being on the hook. Putting more money in the pockets of all Mississippians through tax cuts will grow the economy and present sound fiscal opportunities to give teachers adequate merit-based salary increases.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Mississippi Freedom Caucus Statement on Personal Income Tax and Teacher Pay Bills FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact : Chairman Steve Hopkins Mississippi Freedom Caucus tel:662-469-6242 mailto:info@freedomcaucus.ms Jackson, MS (January 13, 2022) — The Mississippi House of Representatives took two crucial votes yesterday during the 2022 regular session. Both votes were taken within 24 hours of the bills being introduced and quickly rushed through committee Tuesday evening. The Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2022 (294 pages long) was the first bill up for a vote and passed with 97 yes votes (primarily Republicans) and 25 representatives voting no, present, or absent. This bill is a marketed improvement from the bill introduced last year and does utilize an economic growth formula to reduce the state’s personal income tax in the long term, but still has issues that should be worked out before the final passage, including a sales tax increase from the now 7 percent general sales tax to 8.5 percent sales tax. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus (MFC) members supported this bill with a unanimous decision among its members, in order to keep the bill alive so that amendments and changes can be made along the way to continue to strengthen the bill and provide a pay raise for all Mississippians through a reduction in the overall tax burden of the state. The Strategically Accelerating the Recruitment and Retention of Teachers (START) Act of 2022 (18 pages long) was the second bill up for a vote and passed with 114 yes votes which included yes votes from all Democrat representatives and no votes only coming from all five MFC members and one other Republican representative. This bill requires an increase in the state’s tax burden in the amount of approximately $258 million for meritless teacher pay raises (including additional retirement benefits), accounting for roughly $4,000 – $6,000 in additional salary benefits for all certified K-12 teachers in the Mississippi public school system. This pay increase makes Mississippi have the highest teacher pay in the southeast when Mississippi was already 4th out of the nine southern states as compared to median household income. Prior to this bill, teachers in Mississippi were already making 8.6% higher than the average Mississippi worker. This pay increase comes at a time when our law enforcement officers across the state are leaving their jobs due to low pay, often making less than $30,000 per year, and corrections officers oven making as little as $18/hour. With the income tax elimination bill being passed just moments before the teacher pay raise bill, the Mississippi House of Representatives passed a 1.5 percent increase in general sales tax, that will negatively affect all Mississippians. If the corresponding $258 million annually recurring teacher pay raise was utilized in a more financially responsible way, the sales tax increase required to eliminate the state individual income tax could have been 0.5 percent lower, thereby only requiring a one (1) percent general sales tax increase. Utilizing the funds in this manner, would be a more fiscally sound policy that would provide all Mississippians with a raise. There are approximately 33,000 public school teachers in the state of Mississippi, accounting for 1 percent of all Mississippians. Therefore, the tax burden of $258 million from this bill falls on the shoulders of all Mississippians in the form of 0.5 percent general sales tax increase to benefit only one (1) percent of Mississippians, whereas a corresponding reduction in personal income tax would benefit 100 percent of working Mississippians. During a brief debate, MFC member Rep. Brady Williamson asked, “Are these pay increases tied to performance in the classroom?” for which the Education Committee Chairman Richard Bennet indicated that all teachers would receive the raise, remarking “Even the worst of them.” Rep. Williamson also asked regarding the local school district supplement, “May, possibly, [a local school district] change what they pay in their supplement?” for which Chairman Bennet replied, “They can increase it, but they can’t decrease it.” Based on the Chairman’s response the state, through this bill, now seeks to control a school district’s supplement pay amount for teachers preventing them from lowering the supplement during any times of economic downturn. Local school districts should be very concerned about the bill increasing state control over local school districts. MFC Chairman Steve Hopkins released a statement on Facebook prior to the votes saying, “I have a passion for teachers, my wife is a teacher, both of my daughters and my daughter in-law. My sister Tracy was a teacher and my sister Cindy was a teacher’s assistant... I could be selfish and do what’s best for my household and vote for a $4,000 raise or I could vote no and stand strong for all Mississippians... I want an income tax elimination, grocery tax cut and car tag cut that gives all Mississippians thousands of dollars of extra income.” The Mississippi Center for Public Policy, the state’s preeminent conservative think tank, ranked the teacher’s pay bill as a bill that erodes liberty with the statement, “After all costs are calculated, this is an extra $258 million dollars in new spending. After careful consideration, we have marked this as a bad bill.” The Mississippi Legislature has been presented with a unique opportunity at a time with the state coffers larger than they have ever been in history, to use sound fiscal policies to lower the tax burden of all Mississippi workers through individual income tax elimination, without simply raising taxes in another manner. The Legislature will not be able to make historic tax cuts that will benefit all Mississippians if the politicians in Jackson continue to increase the size and scope of our state’s tax burden, with all Mississippians being on the hook. Putting more money in the pockets of all Mississippians through tax cuts will grow the economy and present sound fiscal opportunities to give teachers adequate merit-based salary increases. | | | | | | | | | Mississippi Freedom Caucus | | P.O. Box 184 Walls, Mississippi 38680 United States | | | mailto:info@freedomcaucus.ms ---|---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

Chip in now to fight back against his lies and hold him accountable by kicking him out of office. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: Trying something new...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The old playbook in North Carolina hasn’t worked.
#

Friends –
The old playbook in North Carolina hasn’t worked. It’s why when we launched this campaign we said that we had to try something different.
We want this campaign to be personal, people-focused and people-powered. That’s the only way we can win.
A lot of pundits will tell you the midterms are going to be tough for Democrats, but they’ve never seen a campaign like the one we’re building down here in North Carolina.
**[This has to be a people-powered effort, so will you please consider making a $3 donation to our campaign today? This will be an extremely competitive and difficult campaign, but with your help we can take on the special interests and win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220113-1-ma&refcode2=257.357359.FjhClT&t=1&akid=257%2E357359%2EFjhClT)**
Cheri became a judge and later Chief Justice because she was driven by a commitment to public service. Along the way, she won statewide twice and made history while fighting for all of us.
Now she’s ready to fight tooth and nail against any bullies or special interests that try to stand in the way of what is good for our families by working to create good jobs with fair wages, taking aggressive climate action and protecting voting rights.
**[Please make a $3 donation to send Cheri Beasley to the United States Senate to expand the majority and win real change for our families.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220113-1-ma&refcode2=257.357359.FjhClT&t=2&akid=257%2E357359%2EFjhClT)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: that speech was BS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
Just moments ago on the Senate floor, Senator Kyrsten Sinema gave a speech doubling down on her support for the filibuster. 🙄
**Let me be very clear, Derek.** Sinema’s stunt effectively kills Democrats' chances at passing urgent voting rights legislation.
**Now more than ever, Democrats need to vote like Democrats.** Protecting the right to vote > the filibuster.
**This is my promise to you. Send me to the U.S. Senate, and you will *never* have to wonder whether I’ll put the filibuster before critical legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act or the Women's Health Protection Act.**
**[Will you rush a donation of any amount you can to flip Pennsylvania blue? We must expand our Democratic majority if we want to abolish the filibuster, and if I win this Senate seat, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to do just that.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20220113-4189&t=1&akid=4189%2E434096%2EII9S_S)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40791?refcode=em20220113-4189&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4189%2E434096%2EII9S_S)**
Thank you for fighting alongside me, Gisele, and our whole campaign team,
John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20220113-4189&t=21&akid=4189%2E434096%2EII9S_S)
Speaking of the filibuster, here’s how Gisele feels about it (and I agree). **[Not only would I vote YES on Build Back Better in the U.S. Senate — I’d vote YES to abolish the filibuster, too. Donate $5 or more to help our campaign get there.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20220113-4189&t=22&akid=4189%2E434096%2EII9S_S)**

clean_body: Derek, Just moments ago on the Senate floor, Senator Kyrsten Sinema gave a speech doubling down on her support for the filibuster. 🙄 Let me be very clear, Derek. Sinema’s stunt effectively kills Democrats' chances at passing urgent voting rights legislation. Now more than ever, Democrats need to vote like Democrats. Protecting the right to vote > the filibuster. This is my promise to you. Send me to the U.S. Senate, and you will never have to wonder whether I’ll put the filibuster before critical legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act or the Women's Health Protection Act. Thank you for fighting alongside me, Gisele, and our whole campaign team, John John Fetterman Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. Speaking of the filibuster, here’s how Gisele feels about it (and I agree). | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Beto on Abbott’s campaign →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Here’s what we’re facing.
#
Our campaign is growing stronger by the day. Just look at these numbers:
→ Over 100,000 grassroots donors have pitched in
→ Tens of thousands of people have signed up to volunteer
→ Beto has visited over three dozen cities and towns across Texas
**But we recently learned that Greg Abbott’s campaign is buying statewide TV ads, which means we need our numbers to keep growing.** People power is our biggest advantage, and it’s the only way we can ensure Beto will bring enough voters together to unseat Abbott in November.
**The stakes are so high that Beto took a minute to explain what we’re facing.**[**Please take a moment to watch this video, then contribute $3 or more if you're able to power our campaign to elect Beto.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51664?refcode=ema20220113-171344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=171344%2E444211%2E5UBTjK)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51664?refcode=ema20220113-171344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=171344%2E444211%2E5UBTjK)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51664?refcode=ema20220113-171344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=171344%2E444211%2E5UBTjK)**
We're funding this campaign with grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $10 because Beto's in this race to serve ALL Texans — not just those in power.
Instead of ultra-wealthy donors or special interests, we’re prioritizing the voices of people who have been overlooked for far too long by our government —**because that's the kind of governor that Beto will be.**
But if we’re going to compete with Abbott’s $55 million in campaign cash, not to mention unlimited spending from pro-Abbott super PACs, Beto is counting on you to do your part today.
**[Please, will you chip in now to help us defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51664?refcode=ema20220113-171344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=171344%2E444211%2E5UBTjK)**
Thank you for being a part of this,

Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220113-171344-footer&t=23&refcode2=171344_444211_5UBTjK&akid=171344%2E444211%2E5UBTjK)**

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Bills, bills, bills
body:
Behind the scenes Hi there, [**_Running for Congress is expensive: mailers to voters, TV and radio ads, digital ads, phone banking — it all adds up. Can you put $3 in my Media Fund today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662599/325384795/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVlMDNlOS1lMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-q0Xl32MR3H9U3TCn6VuFuuJN5fJZvToDeGnNShKPE4=) I want to take you behind the scenes today to show you some of the costs I’m preparing for in this election. name: Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: Madison Cawthorn may not be eligible for re-election — Sandy Smith shouldn’t be able to run either
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

A group of 11 North Carolina voters filed a legal challenge to disqualify
Rep. Madison Cawthorn from running for a second term, arguing his
coordination with the January 6 insurrection organizers constitutionally
bars him from waging another campaign.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/33898?t=1001&akid=767%2E3698%2EvVBFT8 ][IMG]

First of all, can we give that group of 11 North Carolinians a round of
applause for boldly fighting to hold Madison Cawthorn accountable. 👏

But here’s the thing, it’s
not just Madison Cawthorn who was involved in the January 6th
insurrection. Our Republican opponent, Sandy Smith, was proudly at the
January 6th insurrection supporting the violence, terror, and chaos that
was an attempted government takeover.

Sandy Smith is an insurrectionist and she shouldn’t be allowed to run
either. She threatened our
democracy and she is extremely dangerous for everything that we stand for
as a country.

name: Phil, Team Lopez
subject: I needed to make sure you saw Marco's note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
---
Friend – did you see Marco's note from yesterday? Marco is running for governor to transform our broken education system, protect voting rights and build a state that works for all people.
**But before he can win this race, we need to get on the ballot – and we're still falling 821 signatures short of where we need to be. So please, friend, I need to ask:**
**[If you're ready to elect Marco and flip Arizona blue, will you sign our nominating petition right now and encourage any other Arizona voters you know to sign as well?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662640/325384898/224193491?refcode=jtk400-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=&emci=288b7f44-8974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f38f8a91-e274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109)**
Thanks, friend. Your support is critical to our success.
– Phil, Team Lopez
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Marco Lopez**
Date: Wed, Jan 12, 2022
Subject: need to ask you for a small favor

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662641/325384899/224193491?refcode=jtk400-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=&emci=288b7f44-8974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f38f8a91-e274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109)
---
**I need to ask for your help with something absolutely critical, friend, but let me quickly explain why.**
I'm running for governor because democracy isn't a toy, and we can't afford to let the Arizona GOP keep playing with it. We can't afford another failed Republican governor like Doug Ducey repeating the same old mistakes – and I'm committed to undoing them, committed to actually listening to voters like you and making the change you need.
**But I can't win if I'm not on the ballot – and Arizona law requires anyone running for governor to submit a nominating petition with signatures from voters like you. That's why I need your help:**
**[If you're ready for change in our state, will you sign my nominating petition right now, and encourage any other Arizona voters you know to sign as well?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662642/325384900/224193491?refcode=jtk400-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=&emci=288b7f44-8974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f38f8a91-e274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109) **
| | [GET MARCO ON THE BALLOT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662643/325384901/224193491?refcode=jtk400-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=&emci=288b7f44-8974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f38f8a91-e274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109)
---
Thank you for having this direct impact on all of our futures. It means the world.

– Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662644/325384902/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk400-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662645/325384903/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk400-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/288b7f44-8974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/f38f8a91-e274-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmOGE5MS1lMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjCeWLOvUl2ZUYifurZbqoeDI5wEhwS3hecvqkD88AY=&id=107358601) Marco Lopez for Governor

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: FWD - What matters to you most right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
**[Peter, can you join 1,374 other supporters by filling out our January Priorities Survey?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/january-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220113-955&t=1&akid=955%2E420207%2E05Z5FL)** We’re going to share the results with Pramila very soon and we want to know where as many of our supporters stand as we start 2022.
**[Start the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/january-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220113-955&t=2&akid=955%2E420207%2E05Z5FL)**
\- Team Jayapal
\-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: January 10, 2022
From: Team Jayapal
Subject: What matters to you most right now?
Peter, we're already ten days into 2022! 😲
Things are moving fast in D.C. as the Senate eyes a vote to change the filibuster and pass a critical voting rights bill. And Pramila hasn't stopped fighting for the passage of the Build Back Better Act, a wealth tax, canceling student debt, and so much more.
We want to be clear about our supporters' top priorities as we kick off this new year. **That's why we're sending this survey to members of Team Pramila like you****, Peter — because you're a key part of our movement for progressive change.**
[**Will you start our January 2022 Priorities Survey now? We're counting on your input to help guide our strategy for the big year ahead.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/january-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220113-955&t=3&akid=955%2E420207%2E05Z5FL)
**[Start the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/january-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220113-955&t=4&akid=955%2E420207%2E05Z5FL)**
Thanks for making your voice heard on this,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220113-955-footer&t=5&refcode2=955_420207_05Z5FL&akid=955%2E420207%2E05Z5FL)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, we're already ten days into 2022! 😲 Things are moving fast in D.C. as the Senate eyes a vote to change the filibuster and pass a critical voting rights bill. And Pramila hasn't stopped fighting for the passage of the Build Back Better Act, a wealth tax, canceling student debt, and so much more. We want to be clear about our supporters' top priorities as we kick off this new year. That's why we're sending this survey to members of Team Pramila like you, Peter — because you're a key part of our movement for progressive change. Thanks for making your voice heard on this, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
