Dear Friend,
I want to take a moment to personally thank you for your incredible support as we faced our most critical fundraising deadline yet.

It's because of you and thousands of Marylanders all across the state that we not only met our fundraising goal - _**but we exceeded it!**_

_The momentum is building, and it’s clearly behind our campaign for governor._

Marylanders all across the state are sending a loud and clear message that they want to keep moving our state in the right direction. Together they want us to keep working to make Maryland more affordable for working families and small businesses.

**That's exactly what we'll do.**

I'm running for governor to expand opportunities for every Marylander, to fight for lower taxes, and to make our state more affordable. Our plans will ensure every child has access to a world-class education, regardless of what neighborhood they happen to grow up in. And together, we’ll make sure our neighborhoods and communities are safer by supporting our dedicated men and women in law enforcement.

Your support means the world to me. I am truly honored to have you on our team.

Together, we can and will win, and make history.

---
---

clean_body: Her arguments just don't hold up. Here's why. | | | Peter, Earlier today, Kyrsten Sinema took to the Senate floor to double down on her opposition to the filibuster, defying President Biden and her fellow Democrats and likely dooming urgently-needed voting rights legislation. We're going to go through her speech and tell you exactly why her justifications just don't stand up to scrutiny. But this much is clear — Sinema is betraying her constituents and her party right now and needs to be held accountable immediately. What Sinema said: She stated that “I strongly support and will continue to vote for” the voting rights legislation on the Senate floor right now — while noting in the same breath that “there's no need for me to restate my support for the 60-vote threshold.” Fact Check: Sinema knows that passing the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Bill is impossible without reforming the filibuster. Without filibuster reform, she is effectively ceding power to Republicans at the state level who are passing voter suppression laws, hyper-partisan gerrymanders, and even seizing control of nonpartisan election administration functions. What Sinema said: “Eliminating the 60-vote threshold will simply guarantee that we lose a critical tool that we need to safeguard our democracy.” Fact Check: The filibuster was never intended to protect democracy. The Founding Fathers never wanted a supermajority to be required for regular Senate business, and predicted that it would cause gridlock. And prior to the 1960s, not only was the filibuster used rarely, the only bills defeated by a supermajority threshold were civil rights bills. During the height of the voting rights movement in the 1960s, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. noted that the filibuster was a “tragedy” used by “misguided senators” to block “people from even voting.” Those words are as true today as they were then — and Sinema should know better. What Sinema said: “I have listened to Arizonans expressing diverse views” on various policy areas and “I find myself grateful time and time again to learn from Arizonans who share the same core values, but differ in position on issues and policy.” Fact Check: If Sinema was listening to her constituents, she would support filibuster reform. According to a new poll, a majority of Arizona voters — 66% — support election reform and are in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster to pass such a bill. Arizonans are clear on this issue — and Sinema is defying them. Whether you can chip in $5 or $50 or $500, we are profoundly grateful for your support. It's up to us to seize this opportunity to hold Kyrsten Sinema accountable. —The Primary Sinema Project team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You see, I did not want to be a politician, and frankly, I am disgusted with the dysfunction in Washington today. I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every role I had, I noticed the same problem: **government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST.**

That is what inspired me to run for office the first time. I am a man of action who sees the problems that real Americans are facing due to poor leadership. I believe our government needs transparency and accountability, which is why I was chosen as the top Republican on the House Modernization Committee.

But more than just words, Peter, elected officials need to be accountable for their actions in Washington, DC.

I am a Captain and JAG officer in the South Carolina Air National Guard, small business owner, attorney, and husband, who loves this country and wants to address the biggest problems facing our nation, not just fight with one another on Twitter.

clean_body: Why it’s time to put America back on top. | No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may . Peter, My name is William Timmons. I am a Congressman serving South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, You see, I did not want to be a politician, and frankly, I am disgusted with the dysfunction in Washington today. I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every role I had, I noticed the same problem: government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST. That is what inspired me to run for office the first time. I am a man of action who sees the problems that real Americans are facing due to poor leadership. I believe our government needs transparency and accountability, which is why I was chosen as the top Republican on the House Modernization Committee. But more than just words, Peter, elected officials need to be accountable for their actions in Washington, DC. I am a Captain and JAG officer in the South Carolina Air National Guard, small business owner, attorney, and husband, who loves this country and wants to address the biggest problems facing our nation, not just fight with one another on Twitter. My ask of you today: Peter, let me tell you a bit about my mission. Here is what I see: our leaders do not care about America, and they do not want our country to thrive. ‘Wokeism’ is ruining our country. | Hoosier Republican,

On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb delivered his 2022 State of the State Address, his sixth since taking office. In it, he presented a bold plan to further Indiana’s historic momentum and lead us out of the pandemic.

It's getting a lot of buzz...**here's what they're saying**.
_**U.S. Senator Todd Young**_ "Under the strong Republican leadership of Governor Eric Holcomb and the Indiana General Assembly, Indiana has experienced record job and economic gains, benefitting all Hoosiers. With balanced budgets, a rainy day fund, and responsible stewardship of Hoosier tax dollars, Indiana is well positioned to continue being one of the fastest growing states in the nation."
---
|
---
| _**First Lady Janet Holcomb**_ "Our 6th State of the State is in the books. It's always a wonderful evening as we are able to highlight some incredible Hoosiers and our amazing success as a State! Congratulations, Eric, on a job well done."
_**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**_ "Our state's fiscally responsible investments continue to make Indiana a leader in the Midwest and nation for families and businesses. Our incredible growth has taken us to a low unemployment rate that we haven't experienced in more than 20 years, and Indiana is reaping the benefits that our neighboring states envy. I applaud Governor Eric Holcomb for his vision to navigate these unprecedented times. I look forward to another year of investing in our infrastructure, recruiting talent for our businesses and keeping Indiana a low tax state." _**Indiana Senate President Pro Tempore Rodric Bray**_ "Thanks to more than a decade of conservative fiscal leadership, Indiana is in a strong position as we look toward the future. With the governor's help, we will continue our push to make Indiana the most competitive and prosperous state it can be. I sincerely appreciate Gov. Holcomb's practical approach to leading our state, and I look forward to working with him and the lieutenant governor as we tackle the challenges in front of us."

_**Indiana House Speaker Todd Huston**_ "Governor Holcomb did an outstanding job telling Indiana's incredible success story while laying out his vision for the future. Our state is on a roll – whether it's attracting new investments at a record pace, growing our top-ranked economy, creating upward mobility for working Hoosiers or preparing to play a lead role in industries of the future. We'll continue working with Governor Holcomb to take our shared priorities across the finish line, including making sure Hoosiers keep more of their hard earned money through responsible tax cuts." _**Natalie Robinson, State Director of NFIB - Indiana**_
”Small business owners across the state are encouraged by the governor’s agenda for the 2022 legislative session. Gov. Holcomb is calling for business tax cuts and affordable and transparent healthcare, which are two of the biggest issues facing our entrepreneurs and job creators across the state. NFIB members have spoken and are ready for the governor and legislature to act on tax cuts this year. While Indiana has largely been protected from the burdensome mandates that other states have suffered since COVID-19 hit, we need to do more here in Indiana to help small business help off-set rising inflation. Our hard-working entrepreneurs are confident that the governor will work to make sure that small business owners can continue to recover from the devastating pandemic.”
_**Rick Snyder, President of the Indianapolis Fraternal Order of Police**_ "INDIANA BACKING THE THIN BLUE LINE... #ThankU #Support" _**Secretary of Education Dr. Katie Jenner**_ "As we continue to blur the lines between early learning, K-12, higher education, and the workforce, Governor Holcomb is demonstrating Indiana’s commitment to learner-centered, future-focused education. This means ensuring that every student has access to pathways and opportunities for lifelong success. Through this commitment, Indiana is currently making a record investment in education, with $1.9 billion in new state funding over the biennium. With these funds, schools are raising teacher pay across the state, and are working to strategically accelerate student learning alongside families and community partners. Indiana is committed to bringing Hoosiers together to develop strategies to expand access to quality early learning by launching the Office of Kindergarten Readiness within the Department of Education. The state is also working to better connect Indiana’s educators with high-need roles in areas such as STEM and special education through a statewide supply-and-demand marketplace."
_**Secretary of Commerce Brad Chambers**_ "Great things are happening in Indiana, and READI will position the Hoosier state to compete across the national economic landscape."
---
|
---
| _**AFP - Indiana**_ "Main takeaway from tonight's [State of the State Address] ... we are in a strong economic position to give all Hoosiers a tax break."
_**Indiana Conservation Alliance for Energy**_ "ICAE is glad to see energy at the top of Governor Holcomb's economic development strategy."
---
| [Watch the 2022 State of the State Address](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6355f76f12&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Watch the 2022 State of the State Address")
---

|
---
* * *
_**A Note to My Loyal Subscribers**_ __ _The next 24 hours are perhaps the most important in our time fighting together. We will be releasing our Week 1 fundraising total in the race for Congress._ _So far, we’ve received support from well over 1,000 citizen donors. I am so grateful.[But I need your help to reach our target](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=1). ___ _National Democrats see how we’ve shaken up Sacramento. That’s why they’ve put a target on my back. If they sense any opening, they’ll pummel us with attacks until Election Day. But with a strong showing tomorrow, we can take a commanding lead._ _If we’re successful, I’ll take our fight to Washington, report to you on the inner workings of Congress, and use the national platform to build our movement for change in California. But if Pelosi and the Democrats prevail, I'll no longer be able to fight for you._ _[Please help me keep fighting with a donation for tomorrow’s deadline](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=2). _ _Thank you so much for your support._ _-Kevin_
* * *
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Jig Is Up](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorV_p8NGJa7gkwPlarHVi_c&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=3) The Sheriff of LA County is blasting Newsom for feeding billions more into the “homeless industrial complex.” I’ve proposed a full audit of all homelessness spending. Let’s see exactly where the money is going. The last time I proposed such an audit, I was one vote away from getting it approved when Newsom pressured three legislators to “abstain.” The Committee Chairman even tried to cancel the vote as the Governor’s aides eyed him (video [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopAzpTfNoGRMGkD0_BpU41__ZpSIJx_Ty4XUuFQqQmb3EdSjTg0FERst99Y7NsSRaE&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=4)). A poll shows 89 percent of voters support my audit. Yet Newsom will try to kill it again. He’s also trying to undercut two of my other proposals that have broad public support: AB 1638 – my bill to fully suspend the 51-cent gas tax. Newsom just countered with his own “gas tax holiday.” Except this “holiday” is hardly worth celebrating. It merely delays another 3-cent increase. AB 1599 – my bill to repeal Prop. 47. A Newsom ally is countering with a Prop. 47 “reform” bill that hardly does anything. It still lets you steal $450 without consequence. These feeble half-measures are a clear sign. Our corrupt politicans see the jig is about up, that public discontent is at a breaking point. Perhaps that’s why they’re in a rush to ram through the most radical legislation yet. Yes, on Tuesday night, by an 11-3 vote, the Assembly Health Committee advanced the bill to double taxes and create single payer healthcare. I wish I were making this up. [Support our campaign before tomorrow’s deadline](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=5) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzHBuU68zE6MEwaSUcNEHe5aS4SIP7vvsP-EvWROZIhJw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
[ElectKevinKiley.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltV7bfMPCE9ZT2udr1wr_AxY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=7)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_13_final&n=8).

body:
((we need [10] Cresco responses in the next 30 minutes)) | | |

body:
| Hey Amiguis – Have you taken our survey yet? We have a little less than five months left until Election Day, and I want to know what issues are important to you before then. [**One easy way you can share your thoughts is by clicking here and taking this quick survey.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662713/325385332/-1266616480?refcode=fl_email_su_20220113surveybump_MO_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUwMmFmNS1lOTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpgURIJwmJg-3RZ4MuFqVQI3HAV7Gk4tkW8AFbQUhyg=&emci=9082e0c6-9c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cb502af5-e974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12523946) This campaign is about you and the communities of District 46, so it’s important that I hear from you. Friends,
[**This campaign is about the people of CA’s 46th district including Anaheim, Santa Ana, and The City of Orange, so I want to hear from you. Take our quick survey to share your thoughts and concerns >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662715/325385334/1520916954?refcode=fl_email_su_20220113surveybump_MO_full_SLA_l2_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUwMmFmNS1lOTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpgURIJwmJg-3RZ4MuFqVQI3HAV7Gk4tkW8AFbQUhyg=&emci=9082e0c6-9c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cb502af5-e974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12523946)
I know firsthand what it’s like to come from a working class community and to face struggles that shouldn’t even exist in a country as rich as ours, and I know how important it is that we have representatives in office that aren’t afraid to fight for bold legislation like Medicare For All and a Green New Deal.
That’s why I’m running to represent District 46, because it’s time our communities come first. It’s not enough to have just any Democrat in office. We don’t need more corporate-backed politicians, especially one like Lou Correa, who puts the interests of big corporations before the people. It’s time we have real leadership.
This is and will always be a people-powered campaign, so I want to hear directly from you. [**Take our quick survey and let us know what you would like to see our campaign prioritize in 2022 >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40662716/325385335/1520916954?refcode=fl_email_su_20220113surveybump_MO_full_SLA_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUwMmFmNS1lOTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpgURIJwmJg-3RZ4MuFqVQI3HAV7Gk4tkW8AFbQUhyg=&emci=9082e0c6-9c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cb502af5-e974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12523946)
In Solidarity,
Mike

Fellow American,

My name is William Timmons. I am a Congressman serving South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, [**and I am proudly running again.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4ff397ac15cb408bb90cea282eb6bc77&_e=EhVh5u_npC1B3vC1P99rGNbOflWJ2o1wR2UeUzmtDcaq10Vj6HHKoIPlde3rgXloWaUpjAXEO3YJuH1Z6iR1iZHvcSDWdaN1KmQ0mFGIRQg54qBrk5T2EdryvCRF649U0JFJeeDAaQb-kVMTyuI5EK3E7QnmMfdcNLd-Po-ChwPZ_OxzjoDbw1moE2_3e4gVCqreXUPwmXxQ2n779lbxZx-VlajaHIPvJFbIcWfM3B3M2Kt8lFsNRCIDovqaDxBcKdwJ1o361kuSo0_s4gQVrIRu5glSKjrHJLDTpvAvkixu0I9TUbAIcNDYp7Ga8zj-qJfX_xNRFb6UPgUeUAjtbp0TLXTr-j2urnrp7RyyHew5coAMXrb_s6vOV86bRoBL)

You see, I did not want to be a politician, and frankly, I am disgusted with the dysfunction in Washington today. I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every role I had, I noticed the same problem: **government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST.**

That is what inspired me to run for office the first time. I am a man of action who sees the problems that real Americans are facing due to poor leadership. I believe our government needs transparency and accountability, which is why I was chosen as the top Republican on the House Modernization Committee.

But more than just words, Fellow American, elected officials need to be accountable for their actions in Washington, DC.

I am a Captain and JAG officer in the South Carolina Air National Guard, small business owner, attorney, and husband, who loves this country and wants to address the biggest problems facing our nation, not just fight with one another on Twitter.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4ff397ac15cb408bb90cea282eb6bc77&_e=EhVh5u_npC1B3vC1P99rGNbOflWJ2o1wR2UeUzmtDcaq10Vj6HHKoIPlde3rgXloWaUpjAXEO3YJuH1Z6iR1iZHvcSDWdaN1KmQ0mFGIRQg54qBrk5T2EdryvCRF649U0JFJeeDAaQb-kVMTyuI5EK3E7QnmMfdcNLd-Po-ChwNOHjiC-uz1GaKHlIJsH9Ly2zaoE1wpQ4UshgXIb613FFu_IKHhbg-8jsmbevyiSb8Vhlq3S5fGHs1fizRQ7dVkzuRCcK6X9UMCo8CoM3fIxz_rP7troKGCJLMjlEW3AR_OxkHb4hle1oj8jLsLPqJkZSJm5jpWLpdaxuT0bfMqxZHrjmhSgEVmbAwis1soPbJ11foHJ90LH3RcfMTTfvSd)

My ask of you today: [**will you support my campaign financially so we can shake up Congress and deliver real change in 2022? Your investment of $10, $25, $50, or more will help ensure a RED majority and send Nancy Pelosi packing.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4ff397ac15cb408bb90cea282eb6bc77&_e=EhVh5u_npC1B3vC1P99rGNbOflWJ2o1wR2UeUzmtDcaq10Vj6HHKoIPlde3rgXloWaUpjAXEO3YJuH1Z6iR1iZHvcSDWdaN1KmQ0mFGIRQg54qBrk5T2EdryvCRF649U0JFJeeDAaQb-kVMTyuI5EK3E7QnmMfdcNLd-Po-ChwMyg7ZDtyuHmvOQtmAfRtjj3ly7oSnsxCIHjXdS_UYkhwkNPCfIqcaBuAGt9JRKS87jYfpX7zV1FBhUtXO37-bVPMgvXZXGncgyyKhl--FHAcFJ8RbJKNldAsQS19i5hkGTAmb6lliYneATLWds9LdsH9UAuDB0Is4RFPURc6hCIKUVRuuQLAHRwrKhGNV_2DoaBjJkouhqemaRIdQzUnzy)

[** SEND WILLIAM TIMMONS TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4ff397ac15cb408bb90cea282eb6bc77&_e=EhVh5u_npC1B3vC1P99rGNbOflWJ2o1wR2UeUzmtDcaq10Vj6HHKoIPlde3rgXloWaUpjAXEO3YJuH1Z6iR1iZHvcSDWdaN1KmQ0mFGIRQg54qBrk5T2EdryvCRF649U0JFJeeDAaQb-kVMTyuI5EK3E7QnmMfdcNLd-Po-ChwPd9uk_hCtPZ4ataDYm4wSFEDBKmln7hZ7gMGgjIxqFk8r6yfNGbGJ1bpLrxBU70Id3PCyn0WKkI7WutTXeytDLvLA3hntaQujBvXhFVstW33ZIxJIA8LmQ4Ojd4Jf99YhsYzhx9nwcH3UqcntjKVW23c1C8Mx-uPj_U1RuI_KKO22ucMsj8_637D1xe4BzdJHzBM-FGCSYK0bEintHi__B)
Fellow American, let me tell you a bit about my mission. Here is what I see: **our leaders do not care about America, and they do not want our country to thrive.** _‘Wokeism’_ is ruining our country.

Our kids are being taught to hate themselves and their country, we have an undeniable crisis at our southern border (a major national security threat), our jobs are being shipped overseas, and our Second Amendment rights are being threatened, not to mention Democrats’ massive spending problem. **Our freedom and our shared conservative values are under attack.**

It is time to put America back on top. clean_body: Why it’s time to put America back on top. | No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may . Fellow American, My name is William Timmons. I am a Congressman serving South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, You see, I did not want to be a politician, and frankly, I am disgusted with the dysfunction in Washington today. I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every role I had, I noticed the same problem: government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST. That is what inspired me to run for office the first time. I am a man of action who sees the problems that real Americans are facing due to poor leadership. I believe our government needs transparency and accountability, which is why I was chosen as the top Republican on the House Modernization Committee. But more than just words, Fellow American, elected officials need to be accountable for their actions in Washington, DC. I am a Captain and JAG officer in the South Carolina Air National Guard, small business owner, attorney, and husband, who loves this country and wants to address the biggest problems facing our nation, not just fight with one another on Twitter. My ask of you today: Fellow American, let me tell you a bit about my mission. Here is what I see: our leaders do not care about America, and they do not want our country to thrive. ‘Wokeism’ is ruining our country. Our kids are being taught to hate themselves and their country, we have an undeniable crisis at our southern border (a major national security threat), our jobs are being shipped overseas, and our Second Amendment rights are being threatened, not to mention Democrats’ massive spending problem. Our freedom and our shared conservative values are under attack. It is time to put America back on top. Respectfully, William Timmons Republican for U.S. Congress P.S. - Democrats are doubling down on their efforts to keep control of the House, Senate, and White House. If you are ready to take back the House in 2022, | ABOUT WILLIAM TIMMONS * William Timmons is a conservative reformer with a small business background committed to finding solutions to everyday problems. He is honored to represent South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, where he has been fighting for our Upstate conservative values since 2019. | Paid for by William Timmons for Congress

clean_body: Our sheriffs know I’m the candidate for safety and security. | Friend, When we saw Kenosha burn while radical liberal Tony Evers failed to lead, it was evident that a return to law and order MUST come in 2022. That’s why I’m truly honored by the overwhelming majority of Wisconsin sheriffs who have endorsed our campaign for governor to fire Evers. Like you, Wisconsin’s law enforcement community knows that the Democrats’ failed liberal policies have led to soaring crime rates – but enough is enough. Together, we will take back Wisconsin from the radical Left and restore law and order to our great state. 2021 marked the highest number on record of fatalities among police officers in America... It truly breaks my heart to see law enforcement suffer as a result of leftist politicians abandoning them when they need support the most. Here in Wisconsin, our police officers know I will ALWAYS have their backs – and it’s why I’ve earned the endorsements of so many of our sheriffs. 2022 will be the year we take back Wisconsin and hold Tony Evers accountable for his FAILURE to keep our citizens safe, but we can’t get the job done without your help. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Team AOC
subject: We can do it permanently this time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
No person should have to go into lifelong debt in order to get an education.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220113-2734-header&t=1&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)
As a result of pressure from grassroots organizations, individuals sharing their stories, and our movement, **President Biden announced another extension delaying all federal student loan payments until May.**
This win is another signal of what we already know: President Biden has the power to end the student loan debt crisis _permanently_ by canceling all federal student debt with the stroke of his pen.
And we will not let up on the pressure until Biden uses his executive authority to finally remove this economic burden off the shoulders of millions of working people and their families for good. 2022 can be the year this crisis ends.
Alexandria has made student debt a key priority – she shared her own student debt story on the House floor, has repeatedly called on Biden to use his executive authority to cancel student debt, and co-sponsored the resolution with Sen. Warren and other colleagues to cancel up to $50,000 in federal student loan debt for borrowers.1
[Momentum is on our side, but we need your help to continue fighting for student debt cancellation. If you’re able, can you make a $3 contribution today to fuel our efforts to cancel student debt once and for all?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220113-1?refcode=em20220113-2734-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2734_2526796_Vfi_wO&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220113-1?refcode=em20220113-2734-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2734_2526796_Vfi_wO&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)**
Last year, we asked you to share your stories of how student loan debt impacts you and your families. The stories we received were heartbreaking reminders of the cruel and painful burden of student loans.
We have seen the benefits that student loan cancellation can have since the emergency COVID-19 forbearance went into effect almost two years ago. The forbearance has given people the breathing room to take care of their families and to start investing in their futures.
No person should have to go into lifelong debt in order to get an education. It’s wrong. It’s backwards. And, it doesn’t help us as a country.
[If you’re able to, please chip in $3 so we can mobilize more people and keep the pressure on President Biden to finally end the student loan crisis and cancel student loan debt for all.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220113-1?refcode=em20220113-2734-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2734_2526796_Vfi_wO&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)
Thank you,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [Elizabeth Warren](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10369?t=23&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220113-1?refcode=em20220113-2734-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=24&refcode2=2734_2526796_Vfi_wO&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220113-2734-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=25&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2734%2E2526796%2EVfi_wO)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: The State of the State - Words and actions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
As we listened to the Governor give his annual state of the state address this week, I couldn't help but notice some familiar terms and phrases. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/01-13-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=98d15f15fa&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| As we listened to the Governor give his annual state of the state address this week, I couldn't help but notice some familiar terms and phrases. For once he was referencing issues that are important to conservatives. He was talking about election integrity, parents being in charge of their children's education, and reducing taxes and regulations.
---
|
---
---
| Perhaps it's not surprising Brad Little's election year talking points sound a lot more conservative than his actions over the last two years. Brad said nothing about his decision in 2020 to shut down the state and declare thousands of Idahoans to be "non-essential". He said nothing about the ongoing state of emergency in which he's kept the state for nearly two years. He said nothing about the Idahoans who have been fired for their personal medical choices. Excuse me if I find his comments about border security a bit disingenuous. America's southern border has been overrun for the past year, and Brad has only sent a handful of ISP down there to assist. Is that really the best Idaho can do to help protect our borders? On the issue of election integrity, it was Brad who changed the date of the 2020 Idaho Primary Election in violation of the law. It was Brad who forced an all-absentee election, even though absentee voting is less secure. And then, at the end of 2020, when rampant election fraud was happening before our eyes across the country, Brad failed to join the Texas lawsuit to protect our republican form of government. Instead, it was your Lieutenant Governor, along with a number of Idaho lawmakers concerned about state sovereignty, who filed an Amicus Brief in support of every state's obligation to maintain a republican form of government as called for in the U.S. Constitution. Brad wants you to believe that he cares about what parents want for their children's education, but when it came time to listen to Idaho parents who are concerned about Critical Race Theory and other leftist teachings in our curriculum, Brad was nowhere to be found. Instead he was talking to the liberal media, claiming that these problems don't exist. Idaho needs an education system that is responsive to parents and that prepares young people to live productive lives, not one that provides leftist indoctrination in critical race theory. Our children should not be taught to hate America nor to hate each other. My education task force was assembled expressly to address these issues. Brad likes to brag that Idaho is the state with the lowest regulatory burden, but how does that square with his decisions to shut down the state; declare thousands of Idahoans "non-essential"; and allow vaccine, masking, and testing mandates to violate our individual rights? It was his decisions that forced our kids to miss school, distance from each other, and wear masks. He could have used his position as Governor to prevent these things from happening. When I served as acting Governor, I took action to end these harmful mandates, but Brad reversed my actions and reimposed them. Election security and getting our freedom back need to be at the top of the list for this legislative session. Without election integrity, we will lose our republican form of government. Without restoring our freedoms, we will see increasing discrimination for personal health decisions, more lockdowns, and more leftist indoctrination in our schools. Idaho is a wonderful state filled with hard-working conservatives who are not being heard or represented by their current Governor. You deserve a Governor who is committed to protecting your elections, upholding your traditional conservative values, and defending your individual liberties. That's why I'm running for Governor. That's why President Trump endorsed my run for Governor! If these goals resonate with you, please consider donating [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b4164cd5e0&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=bd4a80ec88&e=823fa8e224), [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d919109eca&e=823fa8e224), or even [**$500**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ab555f2b20&e=823fa8e224) today, so that we can get our conservative message out to every Idahoan. The Primary Election is just over four months away and every dollar you donate helps to get us closer to the finish line.
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ecef247e10&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Let's Make Idaho Free Again!
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a3bc9dc4ec&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1ecb701546&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6a4c0d709d&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2bdb975794&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2c1c0652ab&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---

name: Josh Mandel
subject: It’s getting cold outside…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:

Fellow Conservative -

President Donald Trump will be holding a rally right here in Arizona this weekend! **I'm excited to kick off this election year by attending his Save America Rally.**

I have been a supporter of President Trump from the beginning. I saw what America Last policies coming out of the Obama Administration were doing to the fabric of our nation, and I knew that then-candidate Trump had a new, better vision for America.

[ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0f5933f156c746c49acba8f871095017&_e=BJmOM4Fgzw4QOwzsV0qT9Vb2Hf_tQ8H8Fvvoz8-gOoclw7CY9CyMTBcMxqfg-1FKr-GgMsNFyVTlNNZtd9HzUorzVYjb047QjOE7DHHoxgTsmG0Dzvri5Jzk3EDCzW0xXLo-E4Q6fnJbaMHRPK9DRydl3_ulM8Sr0WmiG_we4AXzrlORqEgKuP5FT1EtKkXq704GFxEU_A1wuBdF0LnOqMIIvHrGkJU1cDhaqtERfxval3RUt4MFiAb_4m3cQ_mCF-f9SC2z-AOYL55ME1fh6cfb63w9jaPVEPltrpbppJFJ7WBX1reIb2awQLGd6jR2lJWVPFCvEVrLwTj2fk-lkHYsnddnOEpYnGUWOp79n4QRTs0DvYcHcqVFHVJTH8TctdFNCniEbodHe9UMAzzM8Y6geh8u97EHdHHrWVPZGMo%3D)
**I was proud to serve on his White House Transition Team and honored that he hosted an event for my campaign at Mar a Lago!**

President Trump knows just how important defeating the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi progressive agenda is to protecting the future of our nation **and that the key to regaining control of the Senate is flipping Arizona.**

But Fellow Conservative, **I need the rock-solid support of grassroots conservatives like you.**

When I see President Trump in a couple days, I want to tell him about all the support you have given my campaign. [**So please, make a generous "President Trump Rally" contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to take back Arizona.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0f5933f156c746c49acba8f871095017&_e=BJmOM4Fgzw4QOwzsV0qT9Vb2Hf_tQ8H8Fvvoz8-gOoclw7CY9CyMTBcMxqfg-1FKr-GgMsNFyVTlNNZtd9HzUorzVYjb047QjOE7DHHoxgTsmG0Dzvri5Jzk3EDCzW0xXLo-E4Q6fnJbaMHRPK9DRydl3_ulM8Sr0WmiG_we4AXzrlORqEgKuP5FT1EtKkXq704GFxEU_A1wuBdF0LnOqBJkpek9_qeUMcU8TJKQMPIrdv92zJfktkiJEBU7TeDUx9XLdtSX-hp9cTo495wSpjR5ErQQJeUIyaHFDkdpbGhTt08Sf8vbby4GYMZWO46C2B17CJzmsfqiXUwU5umfwgl9DDbIkOVRlQEhol_CrebRHMRlX6ZaEIA-v8mID9DPYMZSbXBgy1jNOLY2M__bnIjAA1uuYz_pvOLehD_ze8o%3D)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0f5933f156c746c49acba8f871095017&_e=BJmOM4Fgzw4QOwzsV0qT9Vb2Hf_tQ8H8Fvvoz8-gOoclw7CY9CyMTBcMxqfg-1FKr-GgMsNFyVTlNNZtd9HzUorzVYjb047QjOE7DHHoxgTsmG0Dzvri5Jzk3EDCzW0xXLo-E4Q6fnJbaMHRPK9DRydl3_ulM8Sr0WmiG_we4AXzrlORqEgKuP5FT1EtKkXq704GFxEU_A1wuBdF0LnOqOYUgXz-JQ6QgdHa2NG6U6Df6UxHO51sJP2_S3d8cQoUf0sTC8vPK87wefOK_siNPVxQTSuGDP8kg2hcV2KnMaGhbb0551cAqeDqsMMw_AHXcYSkGOcJbtoAAJ1AYz_LVEcEpMPH3K_8rg-77smblREeAaJSC3t1ptkDuXk7KRnnW465K7N3fkNeJ0r0yHSdGvsdSIOUSdD06yXvTIa4RyY%3D)
**With your help,** we'll put an end to liberal Mark Kelly's hold on this Senate seat, the Dems' hopes of keeping the Senate, and their obstruction of the America First agenda.

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

Peter,
If you go to Congress, you should be there to serve the people, not to get rich. Nancy Pelosi hasn't done that — her family has gotten filthy rich trading stocks during her 30+ years in Congress.

I'm introducing legislation that would ban members of Congress from trading individual stocks. Public service should not be an inside track to getting wealthy, and my legislation would put a stop to a practice that has gone on for far too long.

Watch my interview with Laura Ingraham to learn more about my common-sense legislation.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=47a837ff4f9c44a68d93c18ee21a3ef8&_e=4h8Pp5D5HPybR3oYPXftIg6Bhno1tfI8X5_2p_aq5i3hiiEmL8TCi7wTGox_IV2xPy_FIdvJyYaWrEOmt3vG7QmP0IzSMXAH2C3vwT-bKrIXPZy_dYCQlODmWj4f0GRw2H3Dwbx6F8ac7cXlIIB1fADolvtcFEhMGhYiqs9h37tjmCyUPHo3jT_EAppWeYCu59X77iHqcGe9r9gRRnMjHWdvuCrKKsT0PJRisAasRA0OJfGpiWFCTcz0tRvDW8a8zlsbfINNyyTUFqgTMCTPAVzjdWEcxH8_mmZvOY0qoK-2uX_EvdvX8mcWfkIXYQYeqBe4tH01krUh8_hUElbXudPRjrg4_bGsLt-Zy24vTT_FuTJnwwsMkEMbOhaGSMu7i2hFdMwpws2h0jaLFirjMIrJUAwaA_ueKy0E73ZKySc%3D)

clean_body: | | Peter, If you go to Congress, you should be there to serve the people, not to get rich. Nancy Pelosi hasn't done that — her family has gotten filthy rich trading stocks during her 30+ years in Congress. I'm introducing legislation that would ban members of Congress from trading individual stocks. Public service should not be an inside track to getting wealthy, and my legislation would put a stop to a practice that has gone on for far too long. Watch my interview with Laura Ingraham to learn more about my common-sense legislation. In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Team Booker
subject: Dark money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter, it’s Team
Booker,

We have a mid-month fundraising deadline this Saturday and right now we’re
$25,000 behind from our goal.

We’re not going to sugarcoat this: It’s absolutely critical we reach this
goal. It was recently reported that an infamous conservative billionaire
is funding a Super PAC that was created for the sole purpose of attacking
our campaign and protecting Rand Paul’s seat.

We need to prepare for this incoming wave of dark money and make sure we
have the funds to fight back against every attack ad the GOP throws at us.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14576?refcode=em20220113-1446&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1446%2E346206%2Ei-erok ]If just half of the people reading this email chips in just $5 we can
reach our goal in time. Will you chip in $5 or anything you
can right now to help us reach our goal? We can’t afford to fall short on
our fundraising goals especially now that Rand Paul’s billionaire buddies
are trying to sway this race with dark money.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14576?refcode=em20220113-1446&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1446%2E346206%2Ei-erok ]Contribute $5

We’re going to be honest with you,
Peter.

This is just a sneak peek of the dark money and big corporate donors that
Rand Paul plans on leveraging to protect his seat.

In the past, 75% of Rand Paul’s campaign money came from corporate money,
rich people, and big business. And when you look at his voting record in
the 10+ years he’s been in office, it makes perfect sense. Rand Paul has
catered his agenda time and again to the rich and powerful, leaving the
rest of us in Kentucky behind.

Meanwhile, our campaign raised nearly half of our donations from
Kentuckians — an unprecedented demonstration of the energy on the ground
for this race. 98% of our donations were from grassroots supporters like

subject: I don't think its ok for Congress to play by a different set of rules, do you?
body:
MIKE BLASI PLEDGES TO SPONSOR CONGRESSIONAL TERM LIMITS ONCE IN OFFICE | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f16addc36b31/mike-blasi-press-release-15648884?e=5c7b109522)
---
| |
---
| |
# THE AMERICA FIRST CANDIDATE
I don't think it's ok for Congress to play by a different set of rules, do you?

Here is the Press Release that we sent out yesterday.

###

**PRESS RELEASE:** Mike Blasi For Congress [info@mikeblasiforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikeblasiforcongress.com)

1-(470) 645-3724 **Mike Blasi Pledges Support for Bill Banning Stock Trades by Members of Congress**
**Freehold, NJ** (January 12, 2022) - Today Mike Blasi, Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's 4th District, pledged to support legislation that bans stock trades by members of Congress. “I would support legislation that follows the common-sense notion that members of Congress should not be allowed to invest in stocks which are impacted by their votes. It’s outrageous that this takes place and the loopholes need to be plugged up,” said Blasi. “There seems to be a self-enrichment machine that members of Congress have access to and their constituents do not. It’s creating an unaccountable ruling class and it’s influencing decisions in the direction of politicians instead of what’s best for the country. I’m for changing that. Elected officials are to be serving their constituents”, said Blasi. The Senate is reported to be coming out with legislation that bars trading stocks by members of Congress. Blasi says that we should be suspicious of any members no matter the party who oppose this concept and the public should be asking them why. ###
####
# WE'RE CLEANING HOUSE
Any further inquiries can be directed to the **Campaign Management Team** by responding to this email or by calling our campaign offices and asking for our Press Secretary at 1-(470) 645-3724

If you agree that we should all have to play by the same set of rules...chip in towards our campaign and help me ge the messsage out.
---

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Walz sits in his ivory tower while murder rates rise
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
It's easy not to worry when you have private security [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt16ozPYT1l15FjbhgLNasXNfCVI6g7rp0sOK7Z9fELq11ZwhdbeA0clYpaOUefd5mObWKEnsU4Zz6eD2dgQcGGs4SDABTc9WPi_d078ewxqBciSnstqe_KTXigal_0f5oPxibW1BBcSKT-2fAr2Bo7q71dNhWOJ2Dzaw78bx9vp81aMZ4NeG8Km8ZXKW5MkMCMwv_ZC94DxggI7mSt_fZdQP0qeJEqyZmHouinrIFrZentb8IHvDUsfaGkoCA7FA-FZknd3eR02vn1As7Z-qD0n6n5ObGPGbvwbSVZgscnYItVC8IIBvj2hwb7V26nLAi_g%3D%3D) My friend,
**It's no secret that crime in Minnesota is out of hand.** Last year we watched as violent protests burned our cities down, smash-and-grabs became the norm, carjackings skyrocketed, homicides hit record highs and violent offenders were returned to the streets. As Minnesotans live in fear of violent crime, Governor Walz hides in the safety of the Governor's Mansion, where he sleeps soundly under the protection of his security team.
**The 36 murder victims in St. Paul and the 96 murder victims in Minneapolis this past year didn't have that luxury. ** When Minnesota wanted to defund the police, Walz claimed to oppose it, but only because of ‘confusing language,' not because of the grotesqueness of the proposal to begin with. _[I know we can do better, but I need your help to do it.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt16ozPYT1l15FjbhgLNasXNfCVI6g7rp0sOK7Z9fELq11ZwhdbeA0clYpaOUefd5mObWKEnsU4Zz6eD2dgQcGGs4SDABTc9WPi_d078ewxqBcJhEXoQDf34wZGCa5TWUk5ctOSzRktQObbJSMTANFZVy_e0SJl7fJengyBWib_PhTMza4vnrLoiuns4zONb8UIqQmKzqE6PAxqmTVmgi8DUC80PTA1D7oRH5VEJ4lF1A7_NUO8FdnL9ZLhiHmbD5Sl6eklrkhc32Y0WLdPgXHqn4bVYkTzvHxI1RDZXHhlOTNPpdUKSaGlSZNJSozkuHjhw%3D%3D)_ [**You Deserve a SAFE Minnesota, Help Me Deliver it for You.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt16ozPYT1l15FjbhgLNasXNfCVI6g7rp0sOK7Z9fELq11ZwhdbeA0clYpaOUefd5mObWKEnsU4Zz6eD2dgQcGGs4SDABTc9WPi_d078ewxqBcR_WF9WMdn401Sz9biUv9c6OIhClBX4SDKB23fEIFqkCyG_lJrTXxfkdE8uOhW9DagJmobV5xLv3if3NE2qDnKRDCwsOtO8dnJkhiYmyjvjkt9FL0UnMTXG-dGWesSijiPiQvhKV5YPFx8JcbUfDIsZkeoPmjNogdELnQzBC_bxENHl54MQ5bin67LWOTNonAhMCe9ef267p9avDQJjrCkA%3D%3D) When I was Majority Leader of the Minnesota Senate, I led the charge to push for a safer Minnesota, passing the following:
* Matson Strong Bill to strengthen state criminal penalties for individuals who are convicted of assault that causes great bodily harm to a police officer, judge, prosecutor, or correctional officer
* Pay raises for law enforcement officers
* Hometown Heroes Act to provide support for firefighters’ mental and physical health
* Tougher penalties for heinous crimes, including sex trafficking and child pornography
* Closing of the voluntary intoxication loophole that denied victims of sexual assault justice if they were under the influence
* Matthew’s Law to provide increased safety for confidential informants for police investigations
* Veterans Restorative Justice Act to help veterans struggling with service-related trauma in the criminal justice system

We made a lot of progress in the Senate, but it still isn't enough. As your governor, I will immediately get to work to stop the rise in violent crime and hold criminals accountable. I will work with the legislative bodies to develop innovative strategies that fit the needs of communities across the state and leave families feeling safe and secure in their own neighborhoods. We have a long way to go, but one thing you can count on is that as your governor, **I will be with you every step along the way.** Thank you, [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt16ozPYT1l15FjbhgLNasXNfCVI6g7rp0sOK7Z9fELq11ZwhdbeA0clYpaOUefd5mObWKEnsU4Zz6eD2dgQcGGs4SDABTc9WPi_d078ewxqBczhoySlsyZwSvBkwxpv_XahEpiobgBUyji8JZiuR5zRs5o5DA6Iq275yvF2BjbGWc1wAlwdA_nA6rPIusrZy7f-PMJCi7WpMWcP09kXeDBgofpdfG1swbH8CRu83f-Ftu59ch0oR-I3uoyQlELY95sPFjibC5GrQEduqfTW0U-UDazsXAiXhtT_IorEAcSpPytBjazQQVvyjnhwO4TVcQUg%3D%3D) Paul Gazelka [**Help Minnesota >> Chip In!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt16ozPYT1l15FjbhgLNasXNfCVI6g7rp0sOK7Z9fELq11ZwhdbeA0clYpaOUefd5mObWKEnsU4Zz6eD2dgQcGGs4SDABTc9WPi_d078ewxqBcO5jUq1_F_W4vJHZIiiBwGQw1TF-7z862E6s_D8QuDg5Ib28QkpXAZP7FkF6sAHqhrvVhZD62SaAVfmK6O5qCL9oBOohhReY-jpqke0OeXQrrzbQCywsHIIZYHaynZZkLzmbAFZpB10k090i1DbAq7iA4nqvkBf67q5xL-FjGhOg1TgEyvlmuDyOnG_9Cx1hj4otNpvXOOhCULkXPFhsU7Q%3D%3D) | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt11Es3dosxV4V9sYUWAgJTh1aSH_DaM0Ax8-avaXWUT-_fdywM8lXz9RdB_Sy2yxfO9YNKBrlRQ8wKmMMD1AxpdDVAE6v2h0Hhepye22U6kaW2gM9o4sWpBjz_wQVnjFNNEl_neEtsY6TbgpaRUiLyEIf0dhSTGg0-2nAteJlcXwM6-lsJPNRpg-7qOuKLfTh0ngmeZxA-75KwRhx7-ETY7-wibfXAWq7Iiul2_RTEXIclsHTjtbj4XyxPt34OnvCUg%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt1zv_Aod9uvl6bF0nG3j59OvW1ohougAcHAEvuPifqk__h3ha-J4MrLcDrMOfFldWV6oj-57Lbn9ZwObPPEHpU9RCvH06sS_PVIxLDVCv3PUPvv6d9MRoNUZ9j6-VcSC1wckzR5Ht-ASXf2J8t5B3MTCHlSldAKm0THunpkozVQOxiDdtqXr3YEiekz1MBoeSv4YVE54vPe48EakU95Dv09HbFULiIpc5YqFtEWbPTIp4_6X02um9j4OPWMgLgeccog%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0a9d95a97eaa4cf9a6fb807b28694b51&_e=YAzp8f5zdIq9CXf6ckgt140hb4vKknZYsgcBlFd-CpsirLe7nT0tssJRjPEUnVhdAuGyZ3q32LuWN-14QVTtOrPuNi8CvjudEBsoGkcGwdsfR9xU_4TbSiaV7sbPcQhsdbAMK6clX_8e2scXW2QL8U6CGHlNylsLHQknLgIExC5e2-rPAjn6nbwR61_zurK4ArWtvATDS6Qxhekn3krFedNM1Ohfr_O5ByhfG7wBGo4nhz50dLCW_sCQGf6ielht5LHrdCvNLn_bGGuDrG5r8w%3D%3D)
